body:
| | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/s/c/GT2J299UWTyDNRWSDL_0E1hFOVg6NxZQOT9Vho0QwjuUF7LdxpNLNCJRqEU4ZgDyAzwwcHRyzYfs_VN4BnDacuJ-rt2k5_hcY9qXIzh5WD7VNm5Gmhi9pdD0w1BioaFYj-pdwHTPp4Hdri5GGg4swUV0dhgqRgj4xHpJXfAqk_pbIpvZin99cK2aNH9uETL5mo8fLUoW-HCerj84lF7XZX1WPjhOvHbGB8gv_8SNwYNuE46Qy6-94q2mE6QZdCuYjKI9mxI7sn0K7OdzhofGX7J4nxVR8LMd3kyuSWqooi2ElTVEZo-LaCFlIPfN1iPDLO5r7XZ-h4cj-s4ZFoQPeU8holvxDRekfqikFUNgDtQNjFbNY9oEfMtUA-zK2YWdTmkzxoJCAfTPWN1gDTqMHjVk-opV0H23x69DhBgYGGPF2DJ8FQ561VrqfiI_vSjzzJtLvEFEL_YNCDvI7Ig/Sd1CJkz7SQfNd0_xPhng1w4q6URU6Tin/9) Friend, I don’t know about you, but May flew by. Hard to believe we’re already staring down June. The last month was packed—meeting folks across the district, showing up at events, and pushing hard to build this campaign from the ground up. I’m incredibly lucky to have a solid team at my side. But the truth is, none of this—none of it—happens without people like you stepping up. Whether you’ve shared your time, chipped in, spread the word, or just believed in what we’re trying to do—it means the world. Now we’ve got our eyes on a big FEC deadline at the end of this month. It's one of those moments that can really shape the path forward. And I won’t sugarcoat it—there’s a lot of work ahead. So thank you, in advance, for standing with me. Whether it's your time, your energy, or your financial support—it all matters, and I’m deeply grateful for every bit of it. Let’s keep pushing. Let’s shake things up. All my best,
John PS ******[If you can, please chip in to my campaign to help us build up the resources we need to publish a strong FEC report.](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/s/c/-VhLZ3az5CjUYVz7OIoc1uYJjvkaBcZTCcApdA4qLgUGGvp3kHq1cFTtXRWdvTPBfZSBP3thnvCaFP3UBubDrlCyjTJwS7Tt3aImVW38rEJ9Oci4EPzCiMZQ4lW8ebH4Hw8wDumz4Xm0yVpu7PRmQyNFvI215gebGs3-88sTl4aqsr4VDd5q--deufMlDq6zQcznrryshTp5uxK6zqiUZzOMevVBP9eT6z1YscnsEJ68aJxBCkZCJtp6piHbea7Ye8yFWPMIT7i2trAV9Oo2Iaj5ZVw4Z1NqfVgkm6UpXk3V7434_1TXRtQSMMOarviRR5OwiM6oUYbfEtcR_4XtQOAK_BZWfI82o5FUZiX35RuDleXWUXqvChZ2IKxn__G2lJYX3COPcUcwjQg_kXsETO96cM8rH25S1SRLhIwJHsKy860r-zpFt1oP3Uqj9RQh_qKOM2YmVrr4a_7YHf0/JRM1YGE1i8mKRLLIzTlrreY07Y5uIEnL/9)** [DONATE](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/s/c/SXf25Eu9Hv_oyaS1Jfhbg567CIyDU4due4OzCZVbkXdo0XeLloc6xiuTt0fVtwSzIr_Lmo4yqOKCy-lyPseqjqxkSg3CuvPZFgXziYx4wAotGOw0b98NI447KR1N22ZLhGcRVcvNhXskKiuXsEEBxd_uuBQnLpMb6UCIMTy2QYTqaFG2aOqaLekI2RYe2-ahoyhGAZQnJfMyS9M5r0jlXZY2C-dFvf9leDdBXnMQ-UR57p3y8u1zw7EYVP1MzRNlTTDkKuKNMvd3dUcXlISY00uwwvBvVHD3pIxeP175c0T4eNde_eNYx8kG0i3b3L74wOIHJor5x08ueN5DpA6iPPIUDxjIeIAV6HS_M7XmoXgjsznTXKyW_vS3M_FOAoe0BO1trHUAm4wGw7OiEJCdPYc2QzekaTKl4XLvT_U6nn6eSZwKzCKgpa0TOFihW9sV9peIIpIymziwxlyttMc/ix6JjjN-petS4SRv7Q2hxHeHUCG-_u6Q/9) Paid for by Padora for Colorado

subject: Just 15
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
This will be short and sweet
|
---

Peter,

I won't take too much of your time here.

[**I 'll be upfront from the get-go - I'm asking for just $15.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=0f4a40d2800446fc9b4a41042c3fa1e1&_e=D3laY6D8k54iOEH-TOMiEDIgDK3cflino90nHGYa1BaDWLCO44xTyZSIKp3mu6i5CWOz6pvlqkF6OwMqILH6IvI_QAAWE_i8J-W9zA5si2qBT9hMPqVJzP3t7XLEbxpiDVUn231AdmTpm5FuJYs_kNmOrqakcNn7_sDeUdN7qvtU9nS8CGugGP7XrpnZgh31y4yW7HHkcHpCFDR6hfgugHL1RGqMGJVGpwMGZv5zyHD8wnr73mmP8bilnsx3mKysdIW7vUN0kSs40GsKa6LKXRDiiZStkLK7TDTtTdw2PiHmt20RAqI8TdhDJW2FMJYMzhWX1_vyZsr9e26ybF1YoQ%3D%3D)

It may not seem like a lot of money, but $15 will go a lot farther for my campaign than you'd think.

Every dollar, every cent, and every prayer to God helps me continue fighting. Our nation is in trouble, led by corrupt career politicians who try to herd us like sheep while they line their pockets. I'm working every single day, hour, minute, and second to save our United States of America from hellfire.

name: Del. Sam Rasoul
subject: We've Knocked Over 6,000 Doors - Help Fund Us by June 5th!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate P
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| |
#
---
# We've Knocked Over 6,000 Doors!
---
#
---
| | We're hitting the pavement and meeting folks where they’re at, **and that takes people power**. Our team has already knocked on over 6,000 doors, directly connecting with voters and building the momentum we need to win in November. **We have an urgent fundraising deadline on June 5th, and we’re counting on you to help us get there. ** _"What's going to happen to education?"_ This is just one of the major concerns my team and I are hearing at the doors. **Folks are scared** \-- scared they'll lose their voting rights, scared their children may be exposed to once eradicated illnesses, and scared their basic groceries will become a luxury. **They are worried** \-- worried about their Social Security, their Medicaid coverage, and how they'll pay their next electric bill.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108860962/549247885/2006447650?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjhkODdiOC0wZDQwLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y3Z4CxqjcqUAXoLvAVBRUZ9PoYWX-bDgUDDbAPspbsA=)
---
| | [ **Donate Today!** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108860963/549247886/-1802580898?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjhkODdiOC0wZDQwLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y3Z4CxqjcqUAXoLvAVBRUZ9PoYWX-bDgUDDbAPspbsA=)
---
Every door we knock helps us work to address the needs of Virginians, but this also costs time, staff, and resources – that’s where your contribution can help. Can you help us reach our goal before **midnight on June 5th** to help us reach **every** voter in my district? Thank you for being part of this movement. **Let’s keep pushing forward, one door at a time.**
---
Yours in solidarity,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | **Delegate Sam Rasoul****VA House District 38**

body:
The NDRC’s podcast is live. Listen in now >>
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108861324/549250965/-3547583?sourceid=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjliOGQ4N2I4LTBkNDAtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lOCTwA8KtwGUjLO3y2eMyxwQQBxcXSL7truJjv7NDXs=&emci=84997390-ea3f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=9b8d87b8-0d40-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8431045)

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108861328/549250997/-1742941505?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_PodcastPromo_email_20250602-NDRC-Tier1-PodcastPromo_static&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250602-NDRC-Tier1-PodcastPromo_static&utm_campaign=PodcastPromo&sourceid=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjliOGQ4N2I4LTBkNDAtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lOCTwA8KtwGUjLO3y2eMyxwQQBxcXSL7truJjv7NDXs=)
---
Listen up, Peter: the NDRC’s new podcast is live! Alongside guest experts from our team, I’m diving deep into the issues that drive the work you help power. **We’re eight episodes in to “Drawing the Line,” and I wanted to share a few highlights:**
[Voting Rights on the Line](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108861333/549251001/-1742941503?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_PodcastPromo_email_20250602-NDRC-Tier1-PodcastPromo_gif&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250602-NDRC-Tier1-PodcastPromo_gif&utm_campaign=PodcastPromo&sourceid=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjliOGQ4N2I4LTBkNDAtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lOCTwA8KtwGUjLO3y2eMyxwQQBxcXSL7truJjv7NDXs=)

subject: The Senate must stop this before it's too late
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
We MUST stop this bill in the Senate and more like it but we need to unite and fight now, before opponents of voting rights in the Senate start checking voter suppression bills off their to-do list. Why? Listen to Senator Richard Blumenthal of Connecticut: [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2]
U.S. Senator Richard Blumenthal speaking against the SAVE Act [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/SAVE_RB.jpg]
RUSH $25 or more right now to stop the SAVE Act, defend our right to vote, and stop opponents of voting rights from destroying our democracy >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2]
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=OfcLcSu3JOb57lWCcoGrePJrCU6V2CS4O4/cFrERbqEhMDgJB6sNCOHmZu8CY/YKHfhtygxF22Dw9Nau9baaCvPNjaaTqFY7vNm0qJINb6U=]
The Senate is standing up to stop the SAVE Act in its tracks, folks.
Defenders of voting rights know that non-citizen voting is already illegal, extremely rare, and that this bill is written in a way that could disenfranchise millions of eligible women across the country. Here's Colorado Senator Michael Bennet:
U.S. Senator Michael Bennet speaking against the SAVE Act [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/SAVE_MB.jpg]
Opponents of voting rights in Congress -- and in the White House -- favor this bill because they know it could suppress millions of eligible voters, changing the composition of the electorate and potentially empowering them and their party for years to come.
Please, Team, join these brave Senators today. Fuel our efforts to stop this dangerous legislation with $25 or whatever you can and ensure millions of women's voices continue to be heard in our elections >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2]
If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=15.00&tknfa=XVbcCy9ZhtMHQIjBxDhLsJ_VEuxxVQUb7HV23cLerME=&contactdata=OfcLcSu3JOb57lWCcoGrePJrCU6V2CS4O4/cFrERbqEhMDgJB6sNCOHmZu8CY/YKHfhtygxF22Dw9Nau9baaCvPNjaaTqFY7vNm0qJINb6U=] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=25.00&tknfa=XVbcCy9ZhtMHQIjBxDhLsJ_VEuxxVQUb7HV23cLerME=&contactdata=OfcLcSu3JOb57lWCcoGrePJrCU6V2CS4O4/cFrERbqEhMDgJB6sNCOHmZu8CY/YKHfhtygxF22Dw9Nau9baaCvPNjaaTqFY7vNm0qJINb6U=] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=50.00&tknfa=XVbcCy9ZhtMHQIjBxDhLsJ_VEuxxVQUb7HV23cLerME=&contactdata=OfcLcSu3JOb57lWCcoGrePJrCU6V2CS4O4/cFrERbqEhMDgJB6sNCOHmZu8CY/YKHfhtygxF22Dw9Nau9baaCvPNjaaTqFY7vNm0qJINb6U=]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=100.00&tknfa=XVbcCy9ZhtMHQIjBxDhLsJ_VEuxxVQUb7HV23cLerME=&contactdata=OfcLcSu3JOb57lWCcoGrePJrCU6V2CS4O4/cFrERbqEhMDgJB6sNCOHmZu8CY/YKHfhtygxF22Dw9Nau9baaCvPNjaaTqFY7vNm0qJINb6U=] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=250.00&tknfa=XVbcCy9ZhtMHQIjBxDhLsJ_VEuxxVQUb7HV23cLerME=&contactdata=OfcLcSu3JOb57lWCcoGrePJrCU6V2CS4O4/cFrERbqEhMDgJB6sNCOHmZu8CY/YKHfhtygxF22Dw9Nau9baaCvPNjaaTqFY7vNm0qJINb6U=] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=20.00&contactdata=OfcLcSu3JOb57lWCcoGrePJrCU6V2CS4O4/cFrERbqEhMDgJB6sNCOHmZu8CY/YKHfhtygxF22Dw9Nau9baaCvPNjaaTqFY7vNm0qJINb6U=]
We know the SAVE Act was fast-tracked by opponents of voting rights to be in place before the next election, folks. This bill is a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote, and we can not afford to let this anti-democratic legislation become law.
If you missed it: This bill would force every voter to present proof of citizenship to register, either a passport or a birth certificate that matches their current first and last name -- something millions of eligible American women don’t have. And that’s the point.
The bill would also obliterate popular methods of voter registration for all voters, including:
* Registration by mail

* 3rd party voter registration drives

* Online voter registration in states that allow it

* Automatic voter registration
Some estimates say that this bill could disenfranchise anywhere from 11 million to 65 million eligible Americans , especially women and those who live in under-resourced communities.
“ There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this ,” said Alexander Keyssar, a professor of History and Social Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and a leading historian of voting rights. “ It’s always been the federal government trying to keep states in check on voting rights, for the most part. ”

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: I grew up Catholic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
When I decided to run for Congress in 2006, I wanted to focus my life and my career on helping others and being a public servant who puts people first.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108861785/549254911/1276597034?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.06.02_Christian-faith_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWIxMzUxZi0wZjQwLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RaREf9qaNyYTWzT1ShV8x9vn1WvmcsxciNhTam8suZM=) I grew up as a Catholic. Now I worship in Christian churches across New York. I always trusted that God had a hand in my life, and I ask him daily for wisdom and guidance. When I decided to run for Congress in 2006, I wanted to focus my life and my career on helping others and being a public servant who puts people first.

My faith informs my work in the Senate, and Jesus’ command of “love your neighbor as yourself” particularly informs my work for civil rights, civil liberties and humanitarian help for those in need.

When I see politicians weaponize their faith to divide our country, to demonize people, to dehumanize people, to spread hate and ignore those in need, it leaves me wondering if they truly know and believe God’s command. Loving one another is _hard_ to do. It’s hard to do when we disagree or live our lives differently, but it’s what I am commanded to do.

**No matter who you pray to — or whether you pray at all — I promise to fight for you and your family. We’ve got to care for one another.**

Together,

Kirsten | | [DONATE TODAY →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108861786/549254912/1276597034?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.06.02_Christian-faith_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWIxMzUxZi0wZjQwLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RaREf9qaNyYTWzT1ShV8x9vn1WvmcsxciNhTam8suZM=)

While we had many victories in New York this election season, our fight to retake control of the Senate is far from over. [**Please, donate today to make sure my team and I can continue securing crucial progress on the issues that matter the most and help flip the Senate blue in 2026.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108861788/549254914/1865269831?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.06.02_Christian-faith_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWIxMzUxZi0wZjQwLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RaREf9qaNyYTWzT1ShV8x9vn1WvmcsxciNhTam8suZM=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

clean_body: Democrats are raising massive amounts of money on this targeted race. We have ZERO room for error if we’re going to keep Montana in Republican hands. | Fellow American, I didn’t want to send this email, but it’s important. I’m personally reaching out because I was just informed that I missed May’s fundraising target by just a few hundred dollars. Democrats are raising massive amounts of money on this targeted race. We have ZERO room for error if we’re going to keep Montana in Republican hands. Chuck Schumer and every D.C. special interest group have us under a microscope. Any missed deadline will be interpreted as a sign of weakness, and they’ll bury us in spending. For America, Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

_Our Democratic heroes are sounding the alarm:_

➞ Elizabeth Warren said: **“This is not a drill. We need to fight back.”**

➞ Bernie Sanders said: **“This is the fight of our lifetime. It’s a fight we must win. It’s a fight we will win.”**

➞ And Hakeem Jeffries said **“We will NEVER bend the knee to a wannabe King”** — _but we can’t do this without you, friend!_

[**What we do next is make-or-break — so we need you to confirm your Democratic Supporter Membership IMMEDIATELY to boost brave Democrats like Hakeem Jeffries and Bernie Sanders in the must-win fight for our Democracy. _The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20067%2E878179%2Erf9VjF). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20067%2E878179%2Erf9VjF).**

subject: David Schweikert is a coward and a hypocrite
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS
body:
He literally fell asleep on the job.

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108862105/549276772/-1882479441?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.06.02_DS-Sleeping_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzczYTI0NDYtMTU0MC1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KLl4MBDioifQpfGV3D_RJnI8oQMIWEfUXr8QYXWLAhs=)
---
David Schweikert _literally_ fell asleep on the job. When House Republicans were voting to kick almost 14 million Americans off their healthcare, he couldn’t even bother to show up to do his job and vote. Instead, he laughed that he missed the vote and chuckled that they didn’t need him because they had the votes. Well, nothing could be more true. We do not need David Schweikert. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108862106/549276773/-141334335?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.06.02_DS-Sleeping_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzczYTI0NDYtMTU0MC1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KLl4MBDioifQpfGV3D_RJnI8oQMIWEfUXr8QYXWLAhs=) **We also know what he _would have_ done.** He’s made it clear that he supports kicking millions off Medicaid and taking food out of the mouths of children. clean_body: He literally fell asleep on the job. | | = David Schweikert literally fell asleep on the job. When House Republicans were voting to kick almost 14 million Americans off their healthcare, he couldn’t even bother to show up to do his job and vote. Instead, he laughed that he missed the vote and chuckled that they didn’t need him because they had the votes. Well, nothing could be more true. We do not need David Schweikert. = We also know what he would have done. He’s made it clear that he supports kicking millions off Medicaid and taking food out of the mouths of children. He is even OK with a deficit increase. Peter,

We just hit our end-of-month fundraising goal for May—and we mean just.

It came down to the final hours, but this incredible grassroots team stepped up like you always do, and thanks to a last minute handful of donations, we were able to make it past the finish line. We're so grateful for your support—**we truly couldn’t do this without you!**

But as we look ahead, our team is gearing up for the end of June, which marks the end of the second fiscal quarter of 2025. That means we need to ramp up our fundraising efforts to ensure we're able to demonstrate the strength of this campaign when our fundraising numbers go public for Republicans to see.

The GOP is already ramping up their spending to target swing districts and we need to ensure they don’t erase our momentum. [**If we’re going to hold this district, we need to keep our fundraising going strong— _and we need to do it now_ —not wait until the last minute. clean_body: Thank you. Peter, We just hit our end-of-month fundraising goal for May—and we mean just. It came down to the final hours, but this incredible grassroots team stepped up like you always do, and thanks to a last minute handful of donations, we were able to make it past the finish line. We're so grateful for your support—we truly couldn’t do this without you! But as we look ahead, our team is gearing up for the end of June, which marks the end of the second fiscal quarter of 2025. That means we need to ramp up our fundraising efforts to ensure we're able to demonstrate the strength of this campaign when our fundraising numbers go public for Republicans to see. The GOP is already ramping up their spending to target swing districts and we need to ensure they don’t erase our momentum. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thanks for all you do, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

body:

**➤➤ NEW:****House passes 10-YEAR BAN on state AI regulations** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108862418/549282387/-209663064?refcode=em-6.2.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzZjM2RkMC0xNjQwLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KEQ-mBSyvCogM6K1TxF7-J9KXT4EPhqJQ_Ay7FuEKtE=)
* * *
By just a single vote, House Republicans passed a sweeping provision that would bar states from enforcing any laws regulating artificial intelligence (AI) – _for the next decade._ Tucked into Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill,” this measure bulldozes state authority – BANNING states from tackling urgent AI threats like deep fakes, biased algorithms, and privacy violations. If this is signed into law, no state can act for _ten_ years, even as the risks grow every day. At a time when AI technologies are rapidly evolving and impacting every facet of our lives, **this federal overreach prevents states from enacting timely and necessary protections for their residents.** By the end of this moratorium, AI may far exceed our ability to regulate it – **and that’s exactly what Republicans are counting on.** Democratic Secretaries of State have been at the forefront of defending state authority and ensuring that technological advancements do not come at the expense of civil liberties and democratic principles. [**Your support is crucial. Peter,

**President Trump 's 79th birthday** on **June 14th** also happens to be the **250th birthday of the United States Army.**

President Trump is planning to spend the day **honoring our nation 's heroes** with a wreath-laying ceremony at Arlington National Cemetery and an Army birthday festival on the National Mall.

That's why we put together a **Birthday Card** with this special note. _**[Would you sign your name to the card, Peter?](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/iHwvxkB0d_3j0Y23cEq6SpOtbOfn6xY2D-19M95BO1xo3TfKHC8nGNpGMgw6EwUe_lopT-ubs_mtf_thsiB3AYRFZuztptBj9RosmK7IHy5IWf78eDN5TodMJ7_zPt_mwKj-WzxYfjfZ74FpNLgnQm1LgqwrBXWb7GzJC30CPiKaJXlOcH4qoV3LXVoPgEvunLVQLWr0oMTGTSBQG3KoJJgPmSXLZH3CyVqxiCwtEtLDVBdKaT3X3-tAeSR686iTYyUgcfsJE2r4OgsvgYZmH8vB05KSLJl0-TqyM6DORPij4LhcO0Y7MFrWc8kLkyY2VnbvfbYT3Jvh8FVkVDgvNe9mrm--SoMCHxQP-DT1NACS4vFTNQ8LDhYPGF-5rued9v2KAHIacfMBnnOiTrPWhucMVItcPItWCIa48IGvT_Cj8Cslr9kkg--06RGGcPP6TLAxsZrDbDyhFzyiYI5j79wqDQ1uzgqOVFpuSYpudE2NOoY0ZWctOiqAFxIMz24gUR_tHt_-4yyBIlUt8_0WraoiOQdjqgwJJdp5Wra0JA/AArU_S0oHWx68CAcuV6pZVxSZLYygmUJ/9)**_
Happy Birthday, President Trump!

We celebrate you today and recognize you for choosing to spend your special day honoring our brave men and women in uniform.

Your unwavering support for our troops means more than words can express. It's a true reflection of your love for this country and the people who defend it.

Wishing you a year filled with strength, health, and continued resolve as you fight to Make America Great Again.

Sincerely,
The American People

| **Meet Jim:** Congressman Jim Baird is a decorated Vietnam War Veteran and the proud representative for Indiana's 4th Congressional District in our nation's capital. A lifelong resident of West Central Indiana, Jim grew up on his family's farm and had the values of faith, family, and hard work instilled in him at an early age. He is an unwavering defender of America's Constitutional liberties and has spent the vast majority of his life serving our country. After earning both his bachelor's and his master's at Purdue University, Jim was assigned to the 523rd Transportation Company at Cha Rang Valley in Vietnam. He fought in two of the deadliest battles of Operation Lam Son 719 and lost his left arm during a convoy ambush in March of 1971. In a true embodiment of American sacrifice and patriotism, Jim Baird has put his life on the line time and time again fighting communism abroad. His belief in the American Dream and our American way of life go far beyond words. For the entirety of his life, Jim has fought the good fight for our country both physically and spiritually. And he wears his love for the world's greatest country on his sleeve each and every day that he shows up for work in Washington, D.C. Previously, Jim Baird spent eight years in the Indiana House of Representatives serving District 44 from 2010 to 2018. Prior to that, he was Putnam County Commissioner from 2006 to 2010. A fiscal conservative and America First Republican, Jim is incredibly proud to fight every day in DC to advance the best interests of Indiana's families through Congress. A loving husband to his wife Danise, a devoted father to his children, and the world's best pop-pop to his grandkids, Jim spends most of his free time in the company of his loved ones or tending to the family farm.

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action Needed: Tell Congress to Confirm, Strengthen & Cut!
body:
Push for real spending cuts, confirm Trump nominees, and strengthen the big bill.
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** We have multiple messages we want to send Congress today and the rest of this week, and we have made it really easy and simple for you to do so by using our **[action page!](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794ab887fda/1edb9794ab75e604 "https://action.teapartypatriots.org/petition/demand-action")** But, before I dive into what these messages are about, I need to let you know the following: **Congress is flooded with left-wing calls --right now, they're calling every day to stop President Trump's America First agenda. We need to match and exceed their intensity. Emails help, but **_phone calls move the needle_** _._ Members of Congress see calls as more influential than automated emails.** **The question is, does our side care as much about advancing America First as the left does in stopping it?** **If your answer is YES, I CARE ABOUT AMERICA FIRST, then please use our action page to be connected _by phone_ with members' offices and use our script to give them the right messages _after_ you click the button to send your automated emails.** **Messages to the Senate**
1. Get to work and confirm the nearly **100 presidential nominees who are still pending.

**
2. Urge your senators to strengthen the One, Big, Beautiful Bill and then pass it right away. The changes that would strengthen it are.

* **Eliminate all of the Green New Deal/Inflation "Reduction" Act spending; **especially the wind and solar tax credits that are draining taxpayers, sending jobs to China, and threatening our national security.*
* **Get rid of the $1,000 new taxpayer-funded entitlement for babies, or at least revising it so taxpayers aren 't funding them.**
* **Leave the State and Local Tax (SALT) cap untouched.

**
3. Tell your U.S. Senators to pass the rescission bill the White House is sending to Congress today. This bill will begin to codify the DOGE cuts and sets the stage for further cuts this summer, and making cuts this way means Democrats can't filibuster.
**Message to the House** This will be the same message about passing the rescission bill that we give to the Senate. Urge your representative to support the rescission bill sent to Congress by the White House today. Passing this legislation will lock in the DOGE cuts and lay the groundwork for additional spending reductions this summer, ensuring Democrats cannot block them through a filibuster. _*Additionally, Congressman Brecheen has recommended _**Fossil Future** _ by Alex Epstein as essential reading to fully understand energy policies and their economic and broader implications._ **__****__****__****__** __ **__** **** ************

clean_body: Push for real spending cuts, confirm Trump nominees, and strengthen the big bill. | | | | | | Patriot- | ** We have multiple messages we want to send Congress today and the rest of this week, and we have made it really easy and simple for you to do so by using our "" But, before I dive into what these messages are about, I need to let you know the following: Congress is flooded with left-wing calls --right now, they're calling every day to stop President Trump's America First agenda. We need to match and exceed their intensity. Emails help, but phone calls move the needle . Members of Congress see calls as more influential than automated emails. The question is, does our side care as much about advancing America First as the left does in stopping it? If your answer is YES, I CARE ABOUT AMERICA FIRST, then please use our action page to be connected by phone with members' offices and use our script to give them the right messages after you click the button to send your automated emails. Messages to the Senate 1. Get to work and confirm the nearly 100 presidential nominees who are still pending. 2. Urge your senators to strengthen the One, Big, Beautiful Bill and then pass it right away. The changes that would strengthen it are. Eliminate all of the Green New Deal/Inflation "Reduction" Act spending; especially the wind and solar tax credits that are draining taxpayers, sending jobs to China, and threatening our national security. Get rid of the $1,000 new taxpayer-funded entitlement for babies, or at least revising it so taxpayers aren 't funding them. Leave the State and Local Tax (SALT) cap untouched. 3. Tell your U.S. Senators to pass the rescission bill the White House is sending to Congress today. This bill will begin to codify the DOGE cuts and sets the stage for further cuts this summer, and making cuts this way means Democrats can't filibuster. name: Byron Donalds
subject: You up?
body:
I wanted to share what's keeping me awake

| | | | |
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/azrE/?__vbtrk=MjkzNzQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkzNzQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
|
---
The radical-left wants me to surrender...
The sad fact is, Democrats have all the money, an army of shady billionaires, and a complicit media who will spread their lies with zero remorse.
I need to make up ground fast. We can’t afford to lose this race, or see Republicans get _swept off the map_ across the entire country.
My name is Byron Donalds.
I’m a _Trump-endorsed MAGA Republican_ running for Governor in the Free State of Florida.
**When President Trump endorsed me, he told me if we lose Florida, we lose the whole country.**
I know Florida is our _firewall_ against the hateful Left who despise the USA. That’s why the radical left is fighting so hard to take me down.
If Republicans lose this race, it will be the _**beginning**_ of the _**end**_ for our entire country.
We will never have a chance again.
But if you can chip in just a few dollars before the day is over, I will crush my fundraising goal and we will deliver the Democrats a humiliating defeat they never saw coming.
So from one diehard Pro-Trump Republican to another, I have one humble ask: _**[can you please help me out, even just a little bit?](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/azrE/?__vbtrk=MjkzNzQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkzNzQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: The Flyover
subject: Boulder Hate Crime, Mount Etna Erupts, and Childhood Memories
body:
Mohamed Soliman, a 45-year-old Egyptian national living illegally in the U.S., has been charged with federal hate crimes and 16 counts of attempted murder after attacking a pro-Israel group in Boulder, Colorado, with Molotov cocktails on Sunday.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLmK5DAURb9GzlxotcqBgoHCWU86odHybKtHi9HSTf394KGgPqDTd-C8e--fj_VD--DT_ltHUG3La4LvGqA1KKvJPTgoh25gi48Qc08NWtIrxVSMeBoxW5324bnywakNgAIbQBHJ7zMXQsrhUIZRQq11dmbSSLvdZzbdDSOSg2NGiMGry4YnzAgmVIgbmZ3ks9MbIxxv1CGOwfmWy-0z-9QO2MIzf0G52RyHoI7WzorYL0QXRJeiffXpQogukMZeEV3qWXzaR5NTr6PJuTbElt7iGsH5HhF7vFsjOl2k5l4sIPZ4_3sRq-Op_Z4Qe3z2BFS87g3KZTIh279kKMqd3z4EXyeJON6j9uF_4Pajlb8U_RcAAP__0GKT3w) | |
# Tuesday, June 3, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1965, astronaut Edward H. White became the first American to walk in space during the Gemini 4 mission. Watch [the historic footage here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFu6yAUgOGnwVuswzEOycBwbyVLHdKxHRExh5gKTISPbfntq_QVOv_SN_xfN3tzMcX58eEyGQ7FzrQviZip2ntZk6c6Oaaxxky5rDMTz84iYH-C8wk6611Mh1WNN4EIqWvISK0uV9X3WjeTCSPcQULoZQdw0RccZdAUiEbtAdE10bw0OEMnQWLft_Lqtbp6FzqpIKAXCshHLrX9LnHmiUI6yka1HUtukpmYn4vo_gkcBA77vrdHWXm906sLHJapVF4EDo_3Y3j7v-FnvjXV-OceU4rLWQsFj-xi-vX4TxM2gz8BAAD__y7ZcL4). Most of us struggle to recall anything from before age 3 or 4--but that doesn't mean those moments are gone. As we report below, scientists believe our infant brains [do record early experiences](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOqzAQheGnMR3INjaOCxe3octtt0SGGWKvDIPMJChvv8q-wtafdI70f92ne8wl74__ccPAK007XmdBZqzTTM8CWFNkXGrecKPnzsh7nLTUtpVDK_sJYi7vyTQQVkSNfYNBOXPzxlrnmhSsRt_fFNzMvCzO-wFgdoNVNoJWflZNDp81OcheSaWt7ZQHZzzEtVdGrhqEkQiZqXbflHdOuJY3vbB2C21NCYn5OEX_T-hR6PG6ru6g41zyh4UeE8bC6SPp3V7YrlQfyC09a7ukXCARwSn02NQAx5VLyefghJGPLebye8F_6vIK-icAAP__vPF3qg); we just lose access to them over time. What's the earliest memory you can conjure? Hit reply and let us know. Later today, we will email you on behalf of our partner, [Legion M](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDuu2zAQRVdDdRL4FcWCRYAHd06bkqDFkTQBPwJF2fDuAzlBNvDaew9mLs6vu7t7jJjXnz6BbUtxGV5HhNagukc5Y4C6-QZzxQSpnLlBy95xylVPx54KFzzGt5NdsAsAB9GBZVpORiqldbdZboRZJFOGP6SCIKWgMC3SGx2moB-8Q3tdoyMVjDKu1MBM0NIEvwgm6cIDkRQCtlKH3wVz22CJ7_KEOswlddFure0HET8IvxF-w_yEow0RViw5XciVi9vZkjvKWWcg4guSx0j4eIUJAp6JiK_dY-h3X1uGemy4_-tnn3aPa_4Q_0s20V6Yyf11wNSoKVejZKKrNuwvjBGPURNJ1-vVZ2n7lt6n5X8CAAD__xlCjgE), with an investment opportunity in the world's first fan-owned movie studio. We're excited to welcome new advertiser [Raisin](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LtugzAUxvGnMRuR8QXC4KFVxJauHZHBBzipL8iXRHn7ii5R5s4_6Tv6n-_reNVo0a9f2oHKSxg9PJKFnCGOUyjWQNx0hjmiAxeKz5C9HhllsqZtTfloNNrnKCqjFgAGvALVdOLcCym7rtpUL_k0SaFn1suzaFvRLXo6S66l6YSWc4XqWKMt5Q1tmJSnpjed6I1eeCPowgwRFAzmEE-3gD5vsNhnuEM8zcFVVm0574nwD8IGwoaoMaE_iLABfF0SYUPaI_q1noIvqZ5CSJnwoWQ3OjBYHOGXVzVhrXY74Z-Hp1DiDIRfXlfffNZu17h6wi-34oHJN80Qj-3JhvmnqaIy-wOtxdR2RNDVabR_Cflff78r9hsAAP__svmZPA), the banking platform helping you find the best savings rates so your money can actually work for you.

|

Don’t feel like reading _The Flyover_? Tune in to _The Flyover Podcast_! New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | [ ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuqzAUgOGnMVuQfWwwDB7ucBmqhqpVq6pdkImPgytjIzhJRJ--Sl-h-69v-N-Pw9GGGNK5tzMa8nlIeNsiEuE6jPkSHa6TJTytYcY5XxIhJTsAh-rA6wOXg7Mh7oMqnPGIgLJAI7RqWlVVWheTaUc-utHqumlHLmtoaiHASyWdcLxBXQRz13jNpeACqqoUrdOqddZLobgHxxRHFyiv5VcOiSb0cc9XXMtTnotoJqJlY_Ifg45BlxdM5bZkCn6_Bwy6bco3Bp3qry8PT9_xuY_nt_7x9SP9b8VnsRq33EKMYas1U_w82xB_ZfrTjquBnwAAAP__BJJzTQ) [ ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OozAUhZ_GdCD7-g8KF9vQZdst0Q2-Dl4ZjOAmUd5-lNFIeYBpzzn6jvT9u0wXzCVvt7-4UuBUp42eZyFmOqZrvZdIx4JM85FXWut9Y-INJ5BgW-laqaeIubwm08SQiIB0Q0F50w_GWu-bJTgCqwzGK_iEaHtJ1xmcJ029d6hTk8ObJp3USiqwtlND9GaImLQyMkEURlLMXI_uf80bL5TKqz7o6Oa6NiUszPsp9B8Bo4Bxr3HGk88O973QeyJgvJ-fRsDIC7U_jPaT5qh6JUHD4FRzhLg_cyn5dF4YeVsxl-8__pWkR4CvAAAA___KbHsi) [ ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGO8yAQBOCnsTtbC6zNn4Lib9LlqpNSIgJL4IRNRNax8vYn3z3CtTOar5jrxV5cLnm9f7iFDMdqV9qfhZip2VvdSqCWHJNveaGlbisTr85KkNMA8wDKBpfL22IfTCSSpHoyQuO_E06T1n0yXpPwSqgY5hkBJaIgTwqEVt7LGPtsDg1mUAKEnKZRnILGU3BRCYQoQ4dAIXNt41fNKyeK5V1f1EZfl76YxPx4dup_J8-dPO_7Pr7rxtuNjv4IEa6OfRo-Ew3n32nfTHjsuZT8nHWHcF9cLj8e_-mEl5HfAQAA___8HHCJ)
---
|
---
## Illegal Immigrant Charged in Boulder Attack
Mohamed Soliman, a 45-year-old Egyptian national living illegally in the U.S., has been charged with federal [hate crimes and 16 counts of attempted murder](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2O5CAUhE-Ds9fCGOx1QLCJs950Q4uGR5sZfix47pZvP_JobjBJJSV9qq_-39e7CTHk5z-TUJMva8Z3i0iEdX2UIzqsmyG0NSRM5ciElM0quFDAR-DD6kyI5yo7pz2iwKFD3U_yzyyVmqZu0-is54-B44RWyR7HURk_S4HKoh-574K-aHzkQ897odStn90kZ2f80EvuhWOSowtU6u2jhEwb-niWF9abLamLeiPaGxv-MrEwseRzL42uionlAjOx8PEKwcRyNLj8mFh-3MCWWICw1lKhHW1HS5DKZhI6aOZRT2glhmQy7LEQoQOTKTRMgYIFQ2TsJ_hSoYcTTQWP7sJ3Vbv9HWIMbZyY5M9kQvweTL96-aXFVwAAAP__ZP6TSw) after attacking a pro-Israel group in Boulder, Colorado, with Molotov cocktails on Sunday. [Disguised as a gardener](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDuu2zAURFcjdTT4_xQs0rhz2pTCNXllMaFEgbq24d0Heng7eOVggMGc8-c23aDUsj1-w4qR5jZt-D4qEmGf7u1ZM_YFCFMvK67tuRHSBpPk0jBuGVdThlI_kx5znBElqhGjcNoHbYxz4xJRg74Hj8Zra5LKakZIEHRIRljN_VjiucYtV4ILacxFhOx0yDArofks86A55kKtX_62stGCc_20F_ZLautY40K0H4P6NcjrIK-wnwBndYZOJVUc5PUbhaVWW4fcGBBB-sfK0QEr26HiQWVDNldYkZbe3tjZjtArO6gjEnNoPbfaKyeSyiLdXeLSZu99DkG6MPaY93eptRzWDZo_Vij16yP9SOwryv8BAAD__-qrjXE), Soliman threw two incendiary devices—planning to use 18—at the group, which included an 88-year-old Holocaust survivor, while shouting “Free Palestine,” according to officials. He told authorities he’d planned the attack for a year, researched bomb-making online, and hoped to die during the assault, which he livestreamed. The incident drew [condemnation from President Trump](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0MGOnDAQBNCvMTcj0zYDHHyIFHGbXKIoR9TYDTgxeGQ3M-LvV7PaP9hzSaV69fc-3THEcKy_cCfLS5oOepVIzJSnOZ3RU96QyeWw057Og4kPnEBBK9VNKj15DPGaTOXtQgSkK7JNZ_rBtG3XVZtFItMhKe80Arh-wXn22JrGmLn3Dqtg323qpnSjGmjbuhl8ZwaPi26MWsALo8gHTrn-l8LBGy3xSk_KtUt7Fe3G_ChC_xAwChhxdm9BvaZ3LGD881vA-CWRyIzuvyxneZBjeRYZYqQVY7zklnaKeHhZyJ058CVgLJzyJfQYvNA_GwCjhn7oq2z94xViDOXWCaPWHUP8XMPfuvBp4SMAAP__LwuHHA), who blamed Biden’s immigration policy for allowing Soliman to remain in the U.S.
## Ukraine, Russia End Talks With POW Deal Only
Peace talks between Ukraine and Russia in Istanbul [ended in just over an hour](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1u3DAQBOCnobo9UKR-okLFBQE7p0nhUliJqxNt_gjkysy9fXB5BdcDDGa-97flDZ138fEbA828pyVSLZ6YKS9rurylfCDTll2gkK7IxBEXJVUPcgCpF4vOP5eusfNOpEg3NLdj92Pq-n4cm2O2alux1eswrttK0nbrTsNgpZyG0eppatz8apOD1K1sVd_f2smO3WRx120nd2VFJ8k6Tvn2kVzkg3b_TF-Ub1sKjZ8P5rMIfRfKCGVqrbdQ4isTylCEqwhlXqeEMokPykKZ6zOjiwT5KsUhnIQbAaP_LEDRQnV8wJkqlIon4CMTBYoM68UQEwT8SBksoRfKYIb7vTXv_HcX2qTNWaF__XyBUi1_KJ9Nnu1ZnfeuDKPo5COg8_-n87e8v2b1LwAA___fH5dE) Monday with no ceasefire deal, only a prisoner exchange for sick and young detainees. The meeting came on the heels of a surprise Ukrainian drone strike that destroyed more than 40 Russian aircraft, including nuclear-capable bombers, catching the [Trump administration off guard](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLuupDAMhp8GuoxCCDApKLahO9tuiQw2M97NBSVmjnj7VfYVtrEsW_r-y6-v9QvYc3z9hECzHGmN9F08iVBet3R5pPwGoT1zoJCuKCQRVqPNoPSodL8isL9X2-J8EBnqW5q7yT6dHYZpat8zbM44ROdofBIaRwC7dsc4mKelw1LLc6XpUfed7swwPDqHk3UIR99ZfRhsrCZkSfnxO3GUNx3-Th_Kjz2F1s9vkbM0_Y_GLI1Z4n2mIvXVmKWCG7PosY6uMctVVM1Xtz8ZOJJCRhWTqBd_SEm-wqkAPxB3qmfeSW10pEwqbZ6FMgjHl8pXKQxRYUqhINwqXrsnyGpLYaNcVKYzZalCbZ7x_GbvuYxTY_UrAPt_1uW_-v7M5m8AAAD__1Sil5M). President Trump, who has criticized both Vladimir Putin and Volodymyr Zelensky, [warned that Putin](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOnTAQRb8GOiNjGwiFizR0mzYlmucZPybP2MgMS_bvo5df2PpKV-ec3x_rB3Di_PwFO3mJZc10n4lEqK6PciWkuoFQqLzTXq4sJBlWo82g9Ki0XRE4fa2uRR-JDNmWfD-5H7MbhmlqN-8sOgo0oA4QBjsizsaB1YA4P8KoW_bvNz1q2-veDEPXzzi5GSHa3ulosHGakKXU7k_hLBvF9FU-qXah7G3ym8hxNvZnY5bGLPd9d7H8fVu898YsR0ksHM7GLFKv_VABUjpVuUQdl3BWN6TXqR4QXkoqICkkSCpsnEHhVTk_VT_Lpm6ilyoxcqC2ejxuTonPcWqcfu7A6T-PfCvipzf_AgAA__-4bImW) is “playing with fire” and said Russia risks consequences if it keeps stonewalling negotiations.
## Tourists Flee as Mount Etna Erupts in Sicily
Sicily's Mount Etna, Europe's tallest and most active volcano, [erupted early Monday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGO5CAQRU-DM1oYsN0OCDZxNptuaNVA0a4dDBaUp-XbrzxX2KSSJz3V-38-1g-gRPn1G3Z0HMua8d0SMmNdP8uZAtYNGH2lHfdyZkbOsGqlB6lGqcwagNK12i64iKjRdOj6yT5nOwzT1G3OxPk5oZ_BP4234H0_fpoxeBOg14DQkbttalSmV70ehkc_h8nOAaLprYo6CKswEJf6-Fso84YxXeUb68OXvUtuYz6aML-EXoRe8nWUxjcSernFQi9qvI8WenmXmoK8E4VeiCFdTf5UyTtLYj0PbpKybHv5umSgdiS4ZMMcKL_kAZn8FwbJ5azUuMl65nyTWKpsEJEvoZeuunC8KSVq4ySseu1A6edb_q-Jv53-FwAA__8ke5MY), spewing a massive plume of ash and smoke several miles high. The eruption, caused by a partial collapse of the southeast crater’s northern flank, triggered a fast-moving avalanche of hot ash, gas, and rock. Lava fountains and flows followed, but the activity remained confined to the summit area, posing no immediate danger to nearby populations. Tourists shared [footage of fleeing down](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1ygzAQQOHTiM6e1eoPFSrS0DltSkZGi1FGII9Y7Pj2GecKaV_xFe_rMl5iLnm7fcaVAs913Oi5F2KmNl7rURK1JTJNLa-01mNj4i2OCGhOYE-gxhRzeY26S2EmQlIdBel077UxznVLmGiipAwod5VTH42jvpdynoCcTBZsl8NbAwtKgkRjztInp32Ks5IaZkxCA6XMtZ2_a954obm86oPaeaprV8LCfN-F-hA4CBx-3lXgkAUOO0c-doGD9OiNBOstOunQg-u7FtL9mUvJu3VCw22NufyJ_K8Nj4C_AQAA__-kgm3t) the volcano’s slopes as a massive ash cloud loomed behind them. By midday, the ash [cloud emission](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L3u4yAQBPCnsTsiwPiroLgmXa690trLLjGnNViwduS3PyWv8K9HGs1v_jyWB0SO6fUbNvIS8pLoXZlEqCx_88FIZQWhZ4kbbflIQpJgsdr2Sg9KdwtC5GtxLfpAZKlryZvRTbPr-3FsVx9sb4cJ52Ey2oZJA9DYBxgAAk4GTRv9p00PujPa2L6_mRlHNyOEzjgdLDZOE0bJ5fYvxyQrBb7ySeX2zFvLfhXZa9P9auy9sfed8s70iRp7l3yUWKWqwEQKqtqg1niS-krUh6LOzE9IWdUDkRJfisqxS1V4lJheas0cES5lzOiGTndt8bi_I3Osw9g4_dog8neJ_Oi-09v_AQAA___ka4aV) had subsided, and the aviation alert was downgraded from red to orange, with minimal disruption to Catania’s airport.

The meeting came on the heels of a surprise Ukrainian drone strike that destroyed more than 40 Russian aircraft, including nuclear-capable bombers, catching the . President Trump, who has criticized both Vladimir Putin and Volodymyr Zelensky, is “playing with fire” and said Russia risks consequences if it keeps stonewalling negotiations. Tourists Flee as Mount Etna Erupts in Sicily Sicily's Mount Etna, Europe's tallest and most active volcano, , spewing a massive plume of ash and smoke several miles high. The eruption, caused by a partial collapse of the southeast crater’s northern flank, triggered a fast-moving avalanche of hot ash, gas, and rock. Lava fountains and flows followed, but the activity remained confined to the summit area, posing no immediate danger to nearby populations. Tourists shared the volcano’s slopes as a massive ash cloud loomed behind them. By midday, the ash had subsided, and the aviation alert was downgraded from red to orange, with minimal disruption to Catania’s airport. name: Erika Donalds
subject: The Byron I know
body:
He told me America needs President Trump

| | | | |
---
[](https://email.update.truedaily.news/c/eJyU0DvK4zAUxfHVyJ2MHn6lUDEQ3CXVwJTmWrp2RGxJXMkx2f3ggVnAt4H_-XH-PKYH-M2H9Qk7muImylN54fylGPw7xHNSQrVcdFzoKVHMCW2ZZOWMvEEjuwqN7Jvh1rS9FNXLwGyh1yC6DodF6uUGiG5pQMp5ttoOlTdXUHRCSyFbMdQDKKuthkG3rVrszBpxJAcF60IHOvDbtw545mozr1JSZvoXUyNTY0Z7ENanD4SutnFnavzn5i4G2FzmSyS-xg9SiMTU6GLgiXLiuIPfOJJ_A08xXTk9HmWfimX6_vv-5P-NTHV0zZAPK9P3S1SRcen02-Zz17NGrFfsmq_KD_77GPU3AAD___1JfEc)
|
---
I'm here to tell you the truth about the Byron I know.
My name is _Erika Donalds_ , I'm the proud mother of three beautiful sons, and I can no longer stay silent.
I was _**scared**_ for my children during the previous administration.
Democrats opened our borders and welcomed criminals into our lives.
Then they tore apart our safety and defunded the police.
And worst of all, they _**targeted**_ our children by forcing radical woke agendas into schools.
I'll _never forget_ what my husband, Byron Donalds, told me when I was the most scared I've ever been under Biden.
**" Erika, we need President Trump in the White House, and I will not let him lose".**
I knew when he looked me in the eyes and gave me his word that America would be back on track, and by the blessings of God, **MAGA** emerged victorious.
Now he's _**[running for Governor of Florida](https://email.update.truedaily.news/c/eJyU0DvK4zAUxfHVyJ2MHn6lUDEQ3CXVwJTmWrp2RGxJXMkx2f3ggVnAt4H_-XH-PKYH-M2H9Qk7muImylN54fylGPw7xHNSQrVcdFzoKVHMCW2ZZOWMvEEjuwqN7Jvh1rS9FNXLwGyh1yC6DodF6uUGiG5pQMp5ttoOlTdXUHRCSyFbMdQDKKuthkG3rVrszBpxJAcF60IHOvDbtw545mozr1JSZvoXUyNTY0Z7ENanD4SutnFnavzn5i4G2FzmSyS-xg9SiMTU6GLgiXLiuIPfOJJ_A08xXTk9HmWfimX6_vv-5P-NTHV0zZAPK9P3S1SRcen02-Zz17NGrFfsmq_KD_77GPU3AAD___1JfEc)**_ to bring the America First agenda home and keep our great state red, but the backlash from the radical-left has been overwhelming.
They saw everything he did to help President Trump, and they won't admit it, but they're terrified of the _**true Patriot**_ that Byron is.
But I know Byron - President Trump tasked him with keeping Florida MAGA Country, and that's what he intends to do.
So it's with a humble heart and the grace of God that I ask you to _**[join me today](https://email.update.truedaily.news/c/eJyU0DvK4zAUxfHVyJ2MHn6lUDEQ3CXVwJTmWrp2RGxJXMkx2f3ggVnAt4H_-XH-PKYH-M2H9Qk7muImylN54fylGPw7xHNSQrVcdFzoKVHMCW2ZZOWMvEEjuwqN7Jvh1rS9FNXLwGyh1yC6DodF6uUGiG5pQMp5ttoOlTdXUHRCSyFbMdQDKKuthkG3rVrszBpxJAcF60IHOvDbtw545mozr1JSZvoXUyNTY0Z7ENanD4SutnFnavzn5i4G2FzmSyS-xg9SiMTU6GLgiXLiuIPfOJJ_A08xXTk9HmWfimX6_vv-5P-NTHV0zZAPK9P3S1SRcen02-Zz17NGrFfsmq_KD_77GPU3AAD___1JfEc)**_ and support his race by chipping in whatever you can below:

| **Discover New Ways To Message the Republican Brand****Please Join Me Thursday**
**SECOND-ANNUAL**
**Frederick Douglass Celebration Event****Thursday, June 5, 2025 | Oceanside at The Owenego, 40 Linden Ave., Branford, CT 06405**
_**Join the Dominic Rapini in Celebrating a Great American and Great Republican**_
_**Special Guests**_ _**Gary Byron**_ _**Peter Lumaj**_ _**Matt Corey**_ _**Chairman Ben Proto**_ _**Vice Chair MaryAnne Turner**_
[**BUY TICKETS**](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=3027f268be&e=8763c56857)

## **About Frederick**
## **Douglass**
**A Force for Uniting the United States** Frederick Douglass, born into slavery in 1818, became a leading advocate for uniting our nation after the Civil War. His conviction in our founding values and principles helped guide the Republican party to win a second term under Abraham Lincoln’s leadership. Lincoln faced the challenge of rescuing a divided nation.
**Frederick Douglass played a crucial role in the birth of the Republican Party** The Republican Party was founded in 1854 by abolitionists who aimed to end slavery and advocate for the civil rights of Black people, with Frederick Douglass playing a significant role in initiating the political campaign.
**Believed in American Principles** Lincoln embraced Douglass’s message of preserving our nation’s values, and it became a roadmap for reunification. Today, Douglass’s contribution offers the most effective messaging for winning new hearts and minds.
**A Symbol of Republican Values** Republicans can use Frederick Douglass as a symbol to unite the voters and realize the greatness of our country, just like Lincoln did.

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1973, Governor Dolph Briscoe signed the [Bilingual Education and Training Act](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2StCAUAE-D2ViPH1ECgi8xmy_d0EJ5KrUIU_AcZ26_tXOFvUB3dX_dp7sLMaTtvzvQ0mvNU8KrRiTCMh25YMJrzwfW9dwChScu7kHnJEB0N9A3kJN3Ib4n1Xg7gze8Qct7NRg1KC2a3UoPBqXG1axo5kGaYZFOcQTe66HvVBPsLww0SM4BOtOiNl5JjY53qncATAH6QLm0tCPhy9U1vvMTS7vko4l2J3pUJv8xMTIxXtfVUt1dTjEkbHPZmBh3l_yc8zcTIyYqASsT4_wJP128oT8XRyGnplj_uEKMoeqeKdgOF-JHQ3-b87TiJwAA___KinqO) into law. The bill required Texas elementary public schools to provide bilingual instruction if they enrolled 20 or more children of limited English ability. The largest school district in Texas will be under state control for at least two more years. ## Major Bills Die As Session Ends
State lawmakers were unable to agree on several high-profile bills before the [conclusion of the regular legislative session](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGSqzAMQE9jOjPCGAOFi9_Q5bdbMg7IoFmDGayE5PY7zh5h26fRGz193cabo0D78t9taPnl47jjlQIy4zlu8cQdrzVumPxjIaYnTu7gx6hANRKMhHqcHYX3qIvZ3mHuqwJt1equ1502qlht0zc19v7uW1977JzpYPJ1BR6ccXPVFmSzDAzUVQXQ9CWafta1QVc1unUAQgPOxPEseUXGl0s-vOMTz3KKWxHsynwkUf8TahBquK6r_H65PQ-FGnKNUMNnTR4xENOUwZlD5C_uel5lwIVScDlRJkyJ4i4v4lVmmVBDcdr5uCgESqYVGpbNUfhcwH_729OqnwAAAP__pQWEew) yesterday. Among the most notable was House Bill 4, which would have [scrapped the much-maligned end-of-year STAAR test](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOgzAQBNCvMZ3RYhsDhYtr6HLtlWiBBawzAdmbOPn7E_mFa6YZ6Y00P7fhhj74-_qNOzl-Lcdwp5wCMVMc9iPSnfJ27JSWx-rZP2nCkx-DAlVLsBL0MKMP78EUsxth7qqCXNWYtjOtsarYXDvpcdFjaydbY40WrGqs0WrSddMt7VR4d2FgQVcVQN2VZLvZaEtY1aZBAGGAZs9HLHkjphemJbyPJ8VyOvYiuI35TEJ_CdUL1eecy9_Mr6sUqr9soXqwVyih-tGHINMU8ZSJEaNkSixnT0l-bBlo9SkgPyIJ1RfRzWf2IfhkG2Fg3dGHzzD_766nU38BAAD__9jSfgw) for students in favor of three shorter tests throughout the year. The House and Senate were unable to agree on how much authority the state’s education commissioner should have. House Bill 3225, which would have barred minors from [borrowing books deemed sexually explicit](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uhDAQBOCnMZ2Rbcxf4SIN3aVNiQwsx-oWjOw9ON4-Iq-QZpqRPo3m59E_PBJuz2-_guPPHPoNzkTADLFfQ4QNziWskOb3ExkPGP3O794oU0pVSVX0k0e6eptNblBTqzNwurZNaxtbmWxxTTOX7Vg3g59VU6umsEa3YL222tt50hm6G1OVKrRWqmxzqNrJFhV4XdraKyWsggk5xJwXYPj4NNMVDoj5GNaM3MK8J1F8CdMJ053nmb-Ij7sUprttYTp1h2mF6fgiiDLCnuSARHLwm4TPTjgiS8Ih-njJIYRXkituISY5e2KISZgui27aTyTCVNXCqufqkf5W8P--O5z5DQAA__-BnYMW) from public libraries, was scheduled to be considered in the Senate last Wednesday but was never brought up for a vote. Lawmakers also failed to agree on bills that would have [restricted payouts in personal injury lawsuits](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2y2yAQhZ8GdXgWjLFVUKShu2lTarBYWZsgoYHFunr7jPwKt9lqz3d-_nwNX4ESra_fYUHH31MeVtxrQmYsw5ILrrjPecE6tRcxvXEMG7dBg75JsBKuQwyUjsF00T0h9qpDp-7m0ZuHsbqbnbkjmtg_7UPZqADBoDYxTDgauD3HviN3wsDCVSmAW39B20dztRjUzdwDgDCAkTiXC8_I-B3qlI78xnIZ89IlNzNvVVx_Ce2F9vu-X8ZE4z8951Y5r-eX0P6sJbT_6IX2p6fQHux5lNAepykXlpzl2MpTblhqXkOStP5t5ZAp7LURyy0cuXGVkbBKWiXPKD9MmfBFNQVuBYX2XXFx2yklqvYuDLyWQOkTmH8289vp_wEAAP__OdKT7Q) and authorized the attorney general to [prosecute election crimes](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSpCAURb9GM7oQEcaAYJPOZtMNrdfw1FeD0AVPHf9-y_mFye-5de_59zl9AkVKy1_Y0PH3nKeEZ43IjGXacsGE55o3rPO-ENOBHt68T0qqQUgjZD8FoHhNug3uJcPYteg6qz9G_aGNalc3vlSwxmrE0QDMg5q9CgP0QQ4dwsu35O4yaWTfdVIO4wPNGHRvELpBW5Cy0RIDcS4PXpHxG-ocr3xgefi8tdGtzO_a9H8a9WzU8zzPRwW_l4KJ70SjnvelRj1_WBFxoRqB94IiIISY_VcVOYmFDkqLAOZcEl5iwYQForgtCNh5zYX4EpyFL-C_RMhnujmM6JlyEr7QhlX01mg5WtsWF94nxUjV2EbLZQOKP5v5d6YPp_4HAAD__5wZl8s) when a local district attorney declined to do so.
## State Control of Houston ISD Extended
The Texas Education Agency will continue to [manage Houston ISD for two more years](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2upDAQBODTmMyjpjE2Dgg2IXubboj80x6sZ_AImmHe7VfsFTYu6VNV_fmav1wueXv-diuN_El13ug6CjHTPq91p42upa50pPOZOb8puBefMwL2ErSEbo4ul59ZNXH0EG3b0NgaNVg1KI3NMiqVrAKN3g4paeV1F01rLIY2EaEJTR5vDDR0bQvQ2wdpG1WnybW9Mg5AKKCYue4PXojp445Ufuqb9keoa1PGhfl1iO6XwEngdF3X43up5x0KnNzOORQSON27BE4Uz-A4103gtNTz4LrJfETJ7ptuVDI5SR-m7ch1kwhoBE449DJ460IbemlNAKmC99Kr4OWgvfYxmQSOmn2MryuXkg9thILn6nL515P_7933iH8DAAD__-MxjeU). Texas Education Commissioner Mike Morath announced the decision yesterday, citing the district’s failure to meet the exit criteria while acknowledging “significant progress.” A prerequisite for returning control of the district to an elected board of directors is that none of its schools receive academically unacceptable ratings in back-to-back years. In 2024, HISD reported [41 schools received an unacceptable rating](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykULuSrCAQ_RrMtFrABwHBTczmphtaPdKO1KJY0I4zf7_lRJtvfN7n6zbe0Ae_Pf7jSpZfcxw3OnMgZkrjGhNtdC5xpTwfD8_-SRPufIwSZFNCW4IaHfrwHnXh7B2cqQuydad7o3vdymKx7k6TBpw77RoHc69gMtSr3uk7Nmh04e1lBi2ougZoTEWtcVq1hHWjOwQQGsh5jqnihZhemOfwjk9K1RTXItiFec9C_RNyEHI4z7OalhS3CxVyuOYIOSzxyBy38qMXciB3TMg-bkIOmNhPgX6xfHZlZmQqGb_pyiolqKY1RlX7shfJuv30IfjcdkLDY0UfPm34bx8-rfwJAAD__8n7h_0), down from 121 in 2023. [Morath said](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOozAURb_GdEb2wzG4cLENXbbdEj3iR7DW4Ag_Avn7EaP5g-mPztU9_-7DHWOK6_MvLuT5nPKw0lESMdM2LHmjlY45L1Sm_Rk5vumBL94HUHCTykrVDAFj-gymCn5UwemKvG5N50xnLFSzdx06MORwDI17GGtoNNhoF0bdTQBtFf0lU1Y1Wit1czVZF0xjCfXNtKiUMIpC5LzVPBPTiWVKn_ymrX7kpUp-Zn4V0fwR0Avoj-Oop3yCnfNeOK8XJKC_XgnomVDSybSGIhn_06WRP6SMJch95ZgkKGirzYfXEVOKxbbCqOeCMX1P8u9CvT18BQAA__-taX6R) that “two years has not been enough time to fix district systems that were broken for decades” and insisted the extension would allow the district to “build on its progress and achieve lasting success for students.” HISD families have been [highly critical of the reforms](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2uozAQhZ8GuomMMQ4UFGno7ra3RIOZwOz6J8JDuLz9irzC7UYa6fvOOd9f4xey57j8wUC9_DzTGOnInkRoG0PaKNKxpkD5uS8s_CaHL9lHrXQDyoKqxxnZn6Mp535Sc1eV1Fd303amNVaXa6_s1E5YtabRzk1GOWy6BquW6nayT9OV3F8wZVVdVUo13Y1sN5vaElaNuaNShVE0s6TtJisJ_WB--jO9abu5FErfryKvXNSPQg-FHo7juIUcr1-hB4qw50IPV6lCD5975TxDFhQCwX90keBg78GlKBx3gj0Ke0ABT5gF_u6RQCt9h48daN4dCqcIuFB0J7gUAufMKdIGGc_Lghs8HtXwbZe63Pr5dRk423th1BKQ_Se8_G7yd6__BwAA__-KkZht) implemented by Superintendent Mike Miles, which have contributed to high staff turnover and the rejection of a $4.4 billion school bond last November.
## Texas Leads Nation in New Home Construction
Four Texas cities led the nation in sales and building permits for new homes during the first two months of this year, according to an [analysis of U.S. Census Bureau data](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGuszAQBODTQAcytmOgcPE3dPnbV6IFL7CSjSN7iZPbPyVXeP1oRt_83Oc7kKdz_w8BLb-2OJ9YskdmTHOICU8sRwyYt2snpieu8OBrlkLeGmEaoWYH5N-zrp1dhBu7Gm3X62HUgzayPqxRvRNiBONUJxcJyzZ0qHQPcnBqHaEm-ykTRqiuE-I2tmhGp5VB6G66ByEqLdARx9TygYwvyJt_xyemdo2h9vZgfuRK_avkVMmplNKu8cxXwATbBpTyJ1fJ6cOI5cSUKzmtxIS5WS7yjs694QObEDM3J5bmC24PDr5O1j0KeU_Z9JUWewDy313-21tPK38DAAD__7D7gZo) by Consumer Affairs. [Houston was No. 1](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L-OhCAQx_GnwU4DiP8Kimvs9torzQjjSoJgYNTdt7-4uTe4fvKdfH4_j-kBzrvw_IYNNb2WOAW8skciTNMWEwa81rhhXo6nI3eigZ2OSXLZlLwteT1ZcP49qcLqmdtBFKhFp_pB9aqVxaoXMwtjhBn6ZW76GcRsZ7kIW3cAsgZeOH3HeMtrIThvhgrbwaq6RRCN6oBzpjhaRzFVtCLhC_Li3_HEVJm4FV6vRHtm9ReTI5PjGo9MMVTm8HQk3GC_z5gcbxeTY0LwJWYCQibHjyPgVd7G0sSQKR2GXAzlX4jJsUja7pfz3uW2Y4o_N3D-85z-N9mp5W8AAAD__6rggwU), with 11,047 permits issued. It’s the biggest city in the country that doesn’t regulate neighborhood density or community type through zoning laws, which has contributed to its infamous urban sprawl. [Dallas was No. 2](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbGypCAURL8GM6YAETUw2MTsbbqhdYXLSC2CBXeGN3-_5fuFTburuut0__naviDEkJ6_4cSFvn3eErYakQjLduaCCduRT6z-9QwU3mjhotemhBq4MFz0m4MQP5vu3LILN8sOFznqadaTNqo7FqW926W1s3HKKLMLEIMzDs2opZQGu7DcYcKIXkohhvmBZna6Nwhy0CMIwbRAFyiXBx1I-A3Vx09-Y3nYfHZxOYiuyvpfTK1Mra21R_MAt8nUCoWCjcjUenMxtdYLbYDIC1650K3sOZ-UW-LON6ZWBzFC5QXS38oV3_EIyXFImQ4s_Kef20AfnrDxexpuc6pUXpZCTkytahr5BLufnfRcDz1yLUfHZ7Fb7icnpsH4QfVzVxZ3tRBjqGZkWjxPCPGHif7vifei_gUAAP__gRCdxA), with 9,811 permits issued. The $450,000 average price for new builds in Dallas is the highest among Texas metros. Last year, the city council eased restrictions on high-density housing, and state lawmakers recently approved a bill that also [addresses the issue](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2SozAMgJ_GdGaEbQwULq6hy7VXMj4sgicCZ7ASJ2-_Q2Z2X2AbFfr5JH3_LtPFR4r79a_f0PFrSdOOJRMy4zFt6cAdy5o2zMvjGjk-cfZ3fkwKVCvBStBT8JHek6mC-w9haCp0TWf6wfTGqmp12nZhVl3oNCxN1y-9GQbQrZ01qN5bU0V3wsCCbhqAdqjRDsFoi75pTecBhAEMkdNR84qML58XeqcnHvWctorcynzPQv8RahRqLKXUM8X5ptb0yJz2s0uo8XxLqPEzL9R47hRqBHuG5rsgyZfN3_DIkpP0RKnIvHkiPOTHgkz7T4ISn6TqcOFeIlHMthMGrpuP9DmNfyf06dRXAAAA__8ZJ4n1). San Antonio and Austin were No. 8 and No. 9, respectively. Meanwhile, a different study ranked McAllen as the [best market in the country for first-time homebuyers](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuu4zAMRL9G7hxQD8tRoWIbd9l2S4OJ6JiAFAcSncffL3x_4dYDzMw5_y7zBTnz4_4XC0X5LNv8oHfLJEJ1LlulB73XrVBb9jsLv-iGT9lnA2bowfdg54Scv7PrUrxCCrqjqEd3Du7svOnWOLoBdRjIXhdA0iFYPXinR0yewFjoOB5l4MFqDTCEE_mQnPWEenAjAigHlFi2epKVhD7YlvzdXlRPt610Oa4iz6bsH2UmZaZWsAq2RnLEykwJBfsme2JqykwL1ya9cKH-4LruX6qtPy50Nabnm3Pm5kfl4F6Q88-G_M7MK5r_AQAA___DPXhn). subject: Maine Legislative Republicans Denounce Democrat Ploy to Block Public Hearing on “Red Flag” Gun-Grab Bill
body:
Here's the latest breaking news at The Maine Wire

** Maine Legislative Republicans Denounce Democrat Ploy to Block Public Hearing on “Red Flag” Gun-Grab Bill (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=86921a15cd&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Edward Tomic on Jun 03, 2025 06:27 am
Who’s afraid of a public hearing? Maine legislative Republicans held a press conference on Monday to call out a move by Democrats on the Judiciary Committee to deny a public hearing for a proposed “red flag” gun control law as undemocratic and potentially illegal. The bill in question, LD 1378, or An Act to Protect [...]

The post Maine Legislative Republicans Denounce Democrat Ploy to Block Public Hearing on “Red Flag” Gun-Grab Bill (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=083acb7068&e=f093fa355c) appeared first on The Maine Wire (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=3c2561197c&e=f093fa355c) .

------------------------------------------------------------

An effort to make the process of Maine public school students transferring from one district to another more transparent was voted down in the state legislature this past week, stalling a move towards greater school choice. Some Maine students are granted the ability to attend a public school outside of their home district through what [...]

Laurel Libby’s Bill Expanding Maine’s Public School Choice Program Rejected Along Party Lines (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=fc7bd52125&e=f093fa355c) appeared first on The Maine Wire (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=3fb272e4f7&e=f093fa355c) .

** Mainers Are Stuck with Annual Inspection Stickers as Lawmakers Reject Bill to Make Requirement Biannual (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=338f8b0005&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Libby Palanza on Jun 03, 2025 06:12 am
Taking your car in every year for its inspection sticker is a familiar ordeal to all Maine drivers, and a proposal introduced earlier this year sought to make this a less frequent occurrence. This bill, LD 1010, has now been unanimously rejected by lawmakers, however, following a strong Ought Not to Pass recommendation by the [...]

Read the full story » (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=d159bb8ac8&e=f093fa355c)

** Lawmakers Kill Bid to Abolish Maine’s Income Tax and Require “Zero-Based Budgeting” (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=8642e5595c&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Libby Palanza on Jun 03, 2025 06:08 am
Maine legislators have killed a bill that would have abolished the state’s income tax and required agencies to regularly engage in “zero-based budgeting.” Although the rejection of this bill was still divided primarily along partisan lines, there was a greater degree of crossover in both the House and the Senate than is typical for high-profile [...]

by Robert Muldoon When Bates College did not release its admissions applications figures this March or April — as it does annually, like clockwork — I grew concerned. ** Portland Police Arrest Allegedly Crack Carrying Fugitive Wanted by US Marshals (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=c7b4e47cc9&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Edward Tomic on Jun 02, 2025 04:19 pm
Portland Police last week apprehended a fugitive wanted by federal law enforcement after officers chased him down and found him in possession of crack cocaine and other illegal drugs. Police say their crime reduction unit was working in the area of Portland Street and Forest Avenue shortly after 7 p.m. on Thursday when they observed [...]

------------------------------------------------------------

The Maine Customs and Border Patrol (CBP) sent 42 illegal immigrants out of state for further deportation proceedings on a single flight on May 23, following a record number of arrests in April. South Portland’s People’s Inclusive Welding (PIW) held a rally with other groups on Friday to protest the arrest of two Brazilian nationals in the U.S. illegally who have been transferred into Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) custody and are currently being processed for removal. name: Troubling
subject: The plan to ensure Dems never win an election again
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015slNc-PofSMQEgsD8otrzwg1cqN2GIb2nISdtm79YNdsZn6Du0kIw_bf4Lylg9fbDrT5M4VhafPfBrWijvDVWyI3No6N9WRs2CB5-G7cK1LxANFcmZRUot6Nddw2JuvgbeZ2IZV8hbnNjaj0xUzBuBra7cuhBfpNqCGHE5hw4i9Y3jI1dDXGT_444yNjj-w0VO-QblpaBKtctIBm4zaAlBBC9ktbYhESy2swRZsClLM=&c=TvBdfF1VPGVRqXJizg8Dif4no7MFzAuS7Z0OsIrjup1yDP1WmUQEog==&ch=3GLmHNEAWgr_3AjY25VXOmgu0k5AU931sGCsZMf2LTwuGzuYLc3QnA==)

| Friend,
When the Elon Musk-backed Wisconsin supreme court candidate lost in April, many assumed the fight for our courts was over. But we saw what was coming:
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015slNc-PofSMQEgsD8otrzwg1cqN2GIb2nISdtm79YNdsZn6Du0kIw_bf4Lylg9fbDrT5M4VhafPfBrWijvDVWyI3No6N9WRs2CB5-G7cK1LxANFcmZRUot6Nddw2JuvgbeZ2IZV8hbnNjaj0xUzBuBra7cuhBfpNqCGHE5hw4i9Y3jI1dDXGT_444yNjj-w0VO-QblpaBKtctIBm4zaAlKi9d0NRs39pvEC_Rrl7w6E=&c=TvBdfF1VPGVRqXJizg8Dif4no7MFzAuS7Z0OsIrjup1yDP1WmUQEog==&ch=3GLmHNEAWgr_3AjY25VXOmgu0k5AU931sGCsZMf2LTwuGzuYLc3QnA==)
---
MAGA has launched a coordinated campaign to take over state courts in key swing states to tilt the scales in their favor in the upcoming 2026 & 2028 elections. Trump wants loyalist judges in place to issue MAGA-friendly decisions on election lawsuits that will suppress Democratic votes. Defend Our Courts has a plan to fight back. PA state law limits the ability of judges to campaign, so it's up to us to build the infrastructure necessary to support the three Democratic judges Trump is targeting.
[Can you rush a donation right now to help us meet our $100,000 goal and give Democrats some firepower to defend against Trump's attempt to overtake the PA judiciary?](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015slNc-PofSMQEgsD8otrzwg1cqN2GIb2nISdtm79YNdsZn6Du0kIw_bf4Lylg9fbDrT5M4VhafPfBrWijvDVWyI3No6N9WRs2CB5-G7cK1LxANFcmZRUot6Nddw2JuvgbeZ2IZV8hbnNjaj0xUzBuBra7cuhBfpNqCGHE5hw4i9Y3jI1dDXGT_444yNjj-w0VO-QblpaBKtctIBm4zaAlIk27zlqF04mfrI4mZA8Pn8=&c=TvBdfF1VPGVRqXJizg8Dif4no7MFzAuS7Z0OsIrjup1yDP1WmUQEog==&ch=3GLmHNEAWgr_3AjY25VXOmgu0k5AU931sGCsZMf2LTwuGzuYLc3QnA==)

name: Solar Go Fridge
subject: New Solar-Powered King of Coolers
body:
It may look like an ordinary cooler, but you've never seen anything like this...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21554/6374453/6abecaab925462bdf2669aafbf38b72b92155638/9aca74ac26bd6c560354d1603f66eab196260860)
---
| | |
---
_June 3rd, 2025_
---
| | |
---
| | **NEW Solar-Powered
"King of Coolers"
Never Needs Ice!**
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21554/6374453/6abecaab925462bdf2669aafbf38b72b92155638/9aca74ac26bd6c560354d1603f66eab196260860)
---
**No More Soggy Food!** This revolutionary fridge on wheels keeps your food and drinks ice cold... **But it NEVER needs ice!** It may look like an ordinary cooler, but you've never seen anything like this... Instead of ice, it uses advanced technology to keep all your important food and drinks ice cold. So you'll never have to stop for ice every couple of hours... And you'll never have to dip your hands into soggy food or gross puddles of water. And since you'll never need ice, you'll have all that precious cooler space available for MORE of your favorite food and drinks. **And it's super flexible.** This revolutionary Solar Go-Fridge is **not JUST a cooler – it's a refrigerator, freezer, and deep freezer** all in one! It can work as a fridge for hot dogs and drinks, or as a freezer for ice cream, popsicles and frozen meats... And it can even go down to subzero temperatures! **The Solar Go-Fridge
Charges For FREE With
The Power of the Sun!** Unlike other run-of-the-mill coolers, your Solar Go-Fridge... **Charges for FREE in the Sun!** Yes, you can recharge your Solar Go-Fridge using the FREE power of the sun. After all, we couldn’t call it a "Solar" Go-Fridge if it wasn't solar powered... And that's why... **You get a FREE 40-Watt Solar Panel with your Solar Go-Fridge.**
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21554/6374453/6abecaab925462bdf2669aafbf38b72b92155638/9aca74ac26bd6c560354d1603f66eab196260860)
---
You can use your solar panel to power your Solar Go-Fridge on the go... So you can take it to campsites, sporting events, RV trips, tailgates, backyard BBQs, pool parties and so much more... Or use it to power your critical devices. It's like a mini power cell in its own right. It works with phones, tablets and your other critical electronic devices. Plus, if a tree falls on some power lines and cuts the power to your neighborhood, you don't have to worry about the food in your fridge spoiling. **Look What You Can Fit
In Your Solar Go-Fridge** Your Solar Go-Fridge can take any kind of frozen supplies with you. And when we say _any kind of supplies_ , we mean it. It has a small footprint, but has spacious capacity. **You get 42 quarts of space** for your critical items – that's like 46 cans or bottles of water. And no bulky ice bags!
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21554/6374453/6abecaab925462bdf2669aafbf38b72b92155638/9aca74ac26bd6c560354d1603f66eab196260860)
---
Its compact size and all-terrain wheels make it easy to throw in the trunk. Or to bring with you to tailgates. It's truly small, but mighty. Drinks, hot dogs, medicine and more. It can all fit in your Solar Go-Fridge. **[Limited Time] Get
Exclusive Introductory
Pricing, Plus 11 Bonus
Gifts Worth $388 And
FREE Shipping!** Order now to take advantage of our special introductory pricing, 11 free bonus gifts worth $388, and free shipping. Your exclusive 11 FREE Bonus Gifts package includes:
* **FREE** 40-Watt Solar Panel

* **FREE** 72-Hour Survival Food Kit

* **FREE** Survival Coffee

* **FREE** Survival Cocoa

* **FREE** StarFire Camp Stove

* **FREE** Freedom Flame

* **FREE** Multi-Use Flashlight

* **FREE** Solar Power Digital Report

* **FREE** $25 Certificate

* **FREE** Shipping & Handling

* **FREE** VIP Phone Line

Plus there's an easy payment plan available with no credit check...

[**Order Now To Lock In Your
Low Pricing, FREE Bonus
Gifts and FREE Shipping!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21554/6374453/656be489f9e6188d103d05b7fa4c9a587f03bae9/9aca74ac26bd6c560354d1603f66eab196260860)
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21554/6374453/6abecaab925462bdf2669aafbf38b72b92155638/9aca74ac26bd6c560354d1603f66eab196260860)
---
**But Hurry... Last Time
The Solar Go-Fridge
SOLD OUT In 24 Hours** **There is one catch:** We can't reserve any Solar Go-Fridges or give out any IOUs. You'll need to ACT FAST... Because the last version of the Solar Go-Fridge sold out in 24 hours after only a couple of text messages... And that version couldn't do half the things this NEW model can. So when people find out about this space-age ice chest, there could be a mad rush. **So don't wait...** If you miss out on this special Introductory Pricing, there's nothing we can do. There's only one way to guarantee your Introductory Pricing, FREE gifts and FREE shipping... And that's by clicking the link below to grab your Solar Go-Fridge while they're in stock and ready to ship: [**Order Now To Lock In Your
Low Pricing, FREE Bonus
Gifts and FREE Shipping!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21554/6374453/656be489f9e6188d103d05b7fa4c9a587f03bae9/9aca74ac26bd6c560354d1603f66eab196260860) So make sure to grab yours now. **I know you'll love it!** Stay safe and have fun out there,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. **Customers Are
Raving About Their
Solar Go-Fridge** **Kristen G.**
"It was super fun to use. We were gone for four nights, and didn't have to get ice at all. Not having to deal with ice the whole time was amazing. I was worried that it wasn't big enough. But it held absolutely everything I was planning to take because I didn't have to put any ice in there. It didn't have to be as big as my regular cooler." **Randy M.**
"You cannot beat it. It is awesome. No running around, looking for drinks. No more opening up your drink and setting it on the tractor and coming back 20 minutes later and it's warm. Everything's cold. Everything's cold all the time. Just a wonderful, wonderful unit. I am a Type 1 diabetic. It's been keeping my insulin cold to the point where I don't worry about my insulin. I know it's good." **Damon H.**
"We all have lots of coolers. But this is a cooler extraordinaire. Not only is it a cooler, it's a fully-functioning refrigerator. It's great for me being a fisherman and an outdoor guy. I can put a bunch of fish in here and set it at freezing temperatures. And when I get home, my fish will stay frozen and I don't need any ice. It's a great tool. It's absolutely a must for campers and fisherman. It looks like a cooler, but it's actually a refrigerator which makes it a really special thing." **Lisa W.**
"You don't have to stop and get ice anymore. That was one thing I hated to do early in the morning when we had to leave to go out of town to play in a baseball tournament. We had to leave at 5 or 6 or sometimes 4:30 in the morning and had to stop to get ice for our cooler. So this is nice because you just have to set it on refrigerator mode and you get your cold drinks or whatever you put in your cooler. People are already taking pictures with it, trying to find out more information so they could get their own." **Lou H.**
"Please get one or two of them like I did. They will come in handy next time you have a power failure or going on a trip. I use mine whenever we travel or recently when we had a power failure a few weeks ago. You won't be sorry." [**Order Now To Lock In Your
Low Pricing, FREE Bonus
Gifts and FREE Shipping!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21554/6374453/656be489f9e6188d103d05b7fa4c9a587f03bae9/9aca74ac26bd6c560354d1603f66eab196260860)
---

body:
With only two weeks left until Virginia’s Primary Election, we’re itching to do as mu

| Only TWO WEEKS Until Virginia's Primary Election!
---
| Friends-
With only two weeks left until Virginia's primary election, we're itching to do as much as we can to create an affordable Virginia, and we know you are too! News and social media leave everyone feeling overwhelmed when looking for ways to get involved, so here are a few simple ways you can help out before this important election:
Contribute! [A contribution of $5 today can make a huge difference](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Lr-Br1Fe6fG_6BXJNL5aKm9_ilRIZI0R5ZvyyoPV26T66oEyPYgc8_oofuwP1excf6cpbz6jUya0nP0T68e1fHAcLRXNMLJ3dniIlrUyq5cpI4I6_X64SBbELJmRCfKJuURCzKC3pRizObkExDd_QCeW2kxdMkJPJsMDg8MNvl12OyBBIact_cvO6_Jm7-tNE6sq09f3XL8daA1ULCeUawcDCw7fsp1z&c=v33LDTEiTq3xNlbLSAIHrR72XYmDJHZq0wR6fNmZXfmdsqyiulpXtw==&ch=A_EnlmtmlZVl6KwgPEd4KyIgyEsLfsQ6flC2-DHyDossYYZxu_3ElQ==) as we advocate for legislation and support candidates that will foster a more fair and affordable economy in Virginia
