name: Jennifer Anju Grossman (JAG)
subject: The cult of envy is alive and well
body:
Why the Elon Musk Derangement Syndrome? Sure, it’s partly politics. But I think there’s something deeper at work

|
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq2vfig4s7incsgitunev145erdjb4vmtt6gve0g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjhm6ob2c1h2bs) Friend,

The cult of envy has come for Elon Musk.

I was recently driving through San Francisco in my elderly father’s Tesla when I found myself stopped at a red light in the middle of an angry street protest. This group of “activists” had gathered, waving signs and screaming at me, insisting that I sell my car! They were chanting not against pollution or big government, but _against Tesla — and Elon Musk!_

The very next day, in nearby Berkeley, a vandal spray-painted a Tesla with swastikas, while another cut the tires and smashed the window of another Tesla.

In the midst of all of this mayhem, my broker called and tried to convince me (unsuccessfully) to sell my Tesla stock! I told him instead to double my Tesla holdings (small though they are).

I admit, I partially did it out of pique at the unfair treatment of Tesla and Musk — but more fundamentally because I’m a big believer in the company, its future, and its founder.

_Why the Elon Musk Derangement Syndrome?_

Sure, it’s partly politics. But I think there’s something deeper at work, something Ayn Rand perfectly described in this quote:
_**“Thousands of years ago, the first man discovered how to make fire. He was probably burnt at the stake he'd taught his brothers to light, but he left them a gift they had not conceived, and he lifted darkness from the face of the Earth.”**_
What we witnessed with the “protests” against Tesla, and the vandalization of the cars, charging stations, and dealerships, is exactly the kind of perverse moral inversion Ayn Rand warned us about: _**when producers are demonized and looters praised**_.

Envy is evil, and it is consuming our culture.

The Atlas Society is fighting back by igniting the minds of the next generation with the ideas of Ayn Rand — a celebration of reason, individualism, and the boundless potential of the human spirit.

Through our viral videos, graphic novels, online courses, and live events, we are giving them the intellectual tools they need to reject the ideology of envy and embrace a life of achievement.

[If you agree that entrepreneurs and innovators should be celebrated — not vilified — please make a tax-deductible donation to support our work.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf0mbegndgsvifn0mb000vi0ir1tv2bkf5nt2p38_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjhm6ob2c1h2bs)
[Donate](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmsh3seva2rvohgkksltrjova9av5plpdr1nnk2o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjhm6ob2c1h2bs)
Having been inspired by Ayn Rand’s work, I would never bet against an innovator like Elon Musk.

I love my Tesla, my Tesla solar roof, my Tesla Powerwalls, and my Starlink.

The latter three were my lifeline during the recent fires — when power and internet outages were the norm here in Malibu.
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0r91pg1jp077m98pjk742eg9if637a0aq0p69eo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjhm6ob2c1h2bs)
_Here I am bringing flowers to my local Tesla dealer in Malibu to show my moral support. Thank you, Elon!_
To me, Elon Musk is a living manifestation of the kind of heroes Ayn Rand celebrated in her literature. Part Hank Rearden, part John Galt, part Howard Roark, he builds rockets, revolutionizes industries, builds beautiful products, defends free speech, hunts down government waste, and refuses to apologize for his success.

**This entrepreneurial spirit is what we’re trying to cultivate in the rising generation!**

Whether it’s through our action-packed animated book trailers, thought-provoking Draw My Life videos, or captivating graphic novels, The Atlas Society is using art to engage young minds with the message that everyone has the opportunity to be victorious.

[By donating today, you can help The Atlas Society build a future where the next Elon Musks and the next Ayn Rands are inspired to rise. Click below to make your donation now. >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7t8il4hmgrtqjr0ekqdmqj33g60jol42r8p30og_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjhm6ob2c1h2bs) [Donate $10 >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvodkp854ff3jec9scvmhoarh8i2g6vkl0ftv1r0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjhm6ob2c1h2bs)

[Donate $35 >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zub3uj8nlk9c1sf97sbktbtbv04sce7us5bjrrvo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjhm6ob2c1h2bs)

[Donate $50 >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhstomgo3n99vnm904703r4lu6ehibq73dqgmqi0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjhm6ob2c1h2bs)

[Donate $100 >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zn7cm51vrm369fpf7or38dgmt2n12t46810v2m78_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjhm6ob2c1h2bs)

[Donate $250 >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za68pdoj3c30ang48gcnblmtaoshdd06rq7csmf8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjhm6ob2c1h2bs)

[Donate $500 >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7o2ie5qv2t9kbddo78gdcctmdrtu9hfc0soff0g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjhm6ob2c1h2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7t3p3dkn74p8am445evm1borbstdh2qmaptbqv0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjhm6ob2c1h2bs)

[Donate Any Other Amount](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp9hthifulerj23kakc816ecjthi47g994mg19o8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjhm6ob2c1h2bs)
With grit, grace, and gratitude,

Jennifer Grossman (JAG)
CEO , The Atlas Society

__The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible.__

---
|
# A Historic Legislative Session!
---
| |
---
| Yesterday was Sine Die, or the last day of the 89th Texas Legislative Session! Despite a rough start to the Session, TFVC is proud to announce** the passage of six bills **that will strengthen Texans’ vaccine choice rights! Most notably,**two legislative priorities** were finally achieved - **HB 1586** (Hull/Kolkhorst), which streamlines the process of requesting and submitting vaccine exemptions by allowing Texans to print the forms from their own computers and **HB 4076** (Leach/Kolkhorst), which prohibits the unethical practice of denying organ transplants to patients who opt out of vaccinations. Once these bills become effective in September 2025, Texas’ most vulnerable patients will be protected from medical discrimination and parents will no longer have to jump through numerous bureaucratic hurdles to exempt their children from school-required vaccines. One other bill garnered unexpected attention and bipartisan support - **HB 3441** by freshman Representative and medical freedom champion Shelley Luther. This bill would **hold vaccine manufacturers responsible for harm** if they advertise their products in our state. This is a clever way to circumvent the 1986 federal law that indemnified Big Pharma and created a bloated, corrupt vaccination program in our country. It was amazing to support this “little bill that could” and watch it cross the finish line with only minutes left before the deadline. Other TFVC-supported bills that are headed to the Governor’s desk include: **
HB 4535**(McQueeney/Hancock): requires doctors to provide truthful information about COVID injections. **
SB 269** (Perry/Frank): requires Texas physicians to report vaccine side effects to VAERS.**
SJR 34**(Hughes/Frank): if passed on the November ballot, would protect the right of parents to control the upbringing of their children. On top of these six legislative wins, we also celebrate **ten years of killing bad legislation**! Not a single TFVC-opposed bill is headed to the Governor’s desk, but we did get a lot of attention from Representative Donna Howard when she nuked her own Gardasil bill on the floor and gave an [epic speech about our effective advocacy](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTU2MTg4NDQyNTMwNjc4MTM3LFwiclwiOjE1NjE4ODQ3OTQ1NDE4NTM2MH0iLCJzIjoiMjM5MmRmMGFhMmIxZGU3OCJ9)! Of course, despite issuing 28 [Action Alerts](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTU2MTg4NDQyNTM5MDY2NzQ2LFwiclwiOjE1NjE4ODQ3OTQ1NDE4NTM2MH0iLCJzIjoiNWQ3YmZmYWI4NmVkYmNhZiJ9) this Session, **some stellar bills failed to cross the threshold** due to negligence from House Public Health Committee **Chairman Gary VanDeaver** \- particularly SB 95, SB 407 and SB 2119. Because of [VanDeaver’s slow pace](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTU2MTg4NDQyNTQ1MzU4MjA0LFwiclwiOjE1NjE4ODQ3OTQ1NDE4NTM2MH0iLCJzIjoiZTA1YmU2OTAxYWRhOTIyZiJ9), hospital employees and healthcare students are still subject to mandates, and physicians are not required to provide informed consent to parents. But never fear - **TFVC will never back down or give up**! We will continue to work in the interim and beyond to protect and advance informed consent, medical privacy and vaccine choice in Texas!
---

clean_body: | | Six Good Bills, Zero Bad Bills! | | | | | | A Historic Legislative Session! | | | Yesterday was Sine Die, or the last day of the 89th Texas Legislative Session! Despite a rough start to the Session, TFVC is proud to announce the passage of six bills that will strengthen Texans’ vaccine choice rights! Most notably,two legislative priorities were finally achieved - HB 1586 (Hull/Kolkhorst), which streamlines the process of requesting and submitting vaccine exemptions by allowing Texans to print the forms from their own computers and HB 4076 (Leach/Kolkhorst), which prohibits the unethical practice of denying organ transplants to patients who opt out of vaccinations. Once these bills become effective in September 2025, Texas’ most vulnerable patients will be protected from medical discrimination and parents will no longer have to jump through numerous bureaucratic hurdles to exempt their children from school-required vaccines. One other bill garnered unexpected attention and bipartisan support - HB 3441 by freshman Representative and medical freedom champion Shelley Luther. This bill would hold vaccine manufacturers responsible for harm if they advertise their products in our state. This is a clever way to circumvent the 1986 federal law that indemnified Big Pharma and created a bloated, corrupt vaccination program in our country. It was amazing to support this “little bill that could” and watch it cross the finish line with only minutes left before the deadline. Other TFVC-supported bills that are headed to the Governor’s desk include: HB 4535(McQueeney/Hancock): requires doctors to provide truthful information about COVID injections. SB 269 (Perry/Frank): requires Texas physicians to report vaccine side effects to VAERS. SJR 34(Hughes/Frank): if passed on the November ballot, would protect the right of parents to control the upbringing of their children. On top of these six legislative wins, we also celebrate ten years of killing bad legislation! Not a single TFVC-opposed bill is headed to the Governor’s desk, but we did get a lot of attention from Representative Donna Howard when she nuked her own Gardasil bill on the floor and gave an ! Of course, despite issuing 28 this Session, some stellar bills failed to cross the threshold due to negligence from House Public Health Committee Chairman Gary VanDeaver \- particularly SB 95, SB 407 and SB 2119. Because of , hospital employees and healthcare students are still subject to mandates, and physicians are not required to provide informed consent to parents. But never fear - TFVC will never back down or give up! We will continue to work in the interim and beyond to protect and advance informed consent, medical privacy and vaccine choice in Texas! | | | News | | | | | | Volunteer Opportunity | Join us at the TFVC booth during the THSC Convention! Make a real impact by helping protect medical freedom in Texas. Volunteer today to connect with like-minded advocates and support our mission. Your time makes a difference! | | | | | | Baby on the Way? | If you have a loved one with a baby on the way and have struggled to have ‘the talk’ with them about vaccine safety and exemptions, let Team TFVC do the heavy lifting by sending our ! | | | | | | Watch Toxic Nation Now! | This MAHA Films production breaks down how Big Food, Big Pharma, and government agencies have worked together (and profited massively) while chronic illness has exploded. This isn’t a conspiracy theory. It’s receipts. Don't miss it! | | | Upcoming Events | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Texans for Vaccine Choice 1540 Keller Parkway Ste 108 #166, Keller, TX 76248 United States | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- | You are receiving this email because you donated or signed up. |

name: Ramaswamy, Vivek
subject: Ohio changed everything in 2022, 2024, and soon – 2026
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
Ohio has been a battleground state for a long time – especially lately.

[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._BBdurA6Q)My fellow Americans:
[Indulge me for a moment. Let me take you back to the last few elections in my home state of Ohio.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
In 2022: There was a Senate race between our now-Vice President JD Vance and Democrat Tim Ryan. Everyone in the country was talking about this race. Tim Ryan scooped up 55 million bucks in hopes of giving him a fighting chance. They outspent us by over 300%, and it quickly became one of the most expensive Senate races of the entire cycle.
Despite all that, JD Vance wiped the floor with him, winning by 6.5+ points. It was a knock-down, drag-out fight for this seat, and we were lucky to have a stellar candidate in the race. Otherwise, we might not have made it out from under the tidal wave of Democrat fundraising. [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._U_15-mMScm4nCQig) In 2024: We had a lot of things going for us. First and foremost, President Trump was on the ballot. That helped a ton. Democrats also had multiple vulnerable incumbents to defend - including far-left liberal Sherrod Brown. Now former Senator Sherrod Brown. Our horse in the race was the excellent Bernie Moreno.
Sherrod Brown raised over 100 million dollars to cling to his seat. Democrat outside groups came in with another 70 million on top of that. It was one of the most expensive races in the history of our country. Luckily, Bernie Moreno was a better candidate, a better fit for our state, had the better story, and had the backing of President Trump. He won and helped deliver our Republican Senate Majority. [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.) In 2026: We have a major opportunity to build on their success. I'm honored to have received the endorsement of the Ohio Republican Party with an overwhelming margin. I'm laser-focused on defeating the Democrat and winning this race. **
**One of my opponents is the Anthony Fauci of Ohio. She shuttered businesses, closed schools, and locked our state down. The AP called her a 'household name' in the state. And she's a well-connected, well-funded bigwig in Democrat circles. It's even possible that other big-name Democrats may enter this race too (maybe even some mentioned above...), and that's why this race is already gaining national attention.
I wouldn't be in this race if I didn't think I could win. I'm confident I can - especially with President Trump endorsing my campaign. However, I'm bracing for the fight of my life. Given the previous two big races here, this very well could be more expensive than BOTH OF THEM! That's why I'm readying my defenses right here and now. If there's anything I can say to convince you to donate to my campaign, I would be extremely grateful! I can't win this without good folks like you stepping up once again. [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._QlW3Fss7ebX90dLaucg)| | [**CONTRIBUTE $4 HERE** ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
---
| [**CONTRIBUTE $40 HERE** ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
---
| [**CONTRIBUTE $400 HERE** ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._TzrP5JVmEZGXKS4e0Zkg)
---
You see, Ohio has been a battleground state for a long time - especially lately. If the last few years are any indication, I'll need a LOT of help to win.
**
**
PLEASE:
**
**
[So if you 're willing to help win what could be the biggest race of the cycle, I humbly ask you to donate now.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
**
**
God bless America,
**Vivek Ramaswamy**
| |
---
| | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
---

350 E 1st Ave

Columbus, OH 43201

name: Jennifer Anju Grossman (JAG)
subject: The cult of envy is alive and well
body:
Why the Elon Musk Derangement Syndrome? Sure, it’s partly politics. But I think there’s something deeper at work

|
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zpl64si76rvb8r2r460dv562kiclo6hnqnkfonp8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjjm0o32cjh2bs) Friend,

The cult of envy has come for Elon Musk.

I was recently driving through San Francisco in my elderly father’s Tesla when I found myself stopped at a red light in the middle of an angry street protest. This group of “activists” had gathered, waving signs and screaming at me, insisting that I sell my car! They were chanting not against pollution or big government, but _against Tesla — and Elon Musk!_

The very next day, in nearby Berkeley, a vandal spray-painted a Tesla with swastikas, while another cut the tires and smashed the window of another Tesla.

In the midst of all of this mayhem, my broker called and tried to convince me (unsuccessfully) to sell my Tesla stock! I told him instead to double my Tesla holdings (small though they are).

I admit, I partially did it out of pique at the unfair treatment of Tesla and Musk — but more fundamentally because I’m a big believer in the company, its future, and its founder.

_Why the Elon Musk Derangement Syndrome?_

Sure, it’s partly politics. But I think there’s something deeper at work, something Ayn Rand perfectly described in this quote:
_**“Thousands of years ago, the first man discovered how to make fire. He was probably burnt at the stake he'd taught his brothers to light, but he left them a gift they had not conceived, and he lifted darkness from the face of the Earth.”**_
What we witnessed with the “protests” against Tesla, and the vandalization of the cars, charging stations, and dealerships, is exactly the kind of perverse moral inversion Ayn Rand warned us about: _**when producers are demonized and looters praised**_.

Envy is evil, and it is consuming our culture.

The Atlas Society is fighting back by igniting the minds of the next generation with the ideas of Ayn Rand — a celebration of reason, individualism, and the boundless potential of the human spirit.

Through our viral videos, graphic novels, online courses, and live events, we are giving them the intellectual tools they need to reject the ideology of envy and embrace a life of achievement.

[If you agree that entrepreneurs and innovators should be celebrated — not vilified — please make a tax-deductible donation to support our work.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zbpn0668chiuaihf90crjqjdpf2mbmo48jk043t8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjjm0o32cjh2bs)
[Donate](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zhdlncqf806v5ro53pfffmfqb9d0skmdid7uavdg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjjm0o32cjh2bs)
Having been inspired by Ayn Rand’s work, I would never bet against an innovator like Elon Musk.

I love my Tesla, my Tesla solar roof, my Tesla Powerwalls, and my Starlink.

The latter three were my lifeline during the recent fires — when power and internet outages were the norm here in Malibu.
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmnenii4dlnufhc1kdiinat8uvglc7sj7mv2nmj0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjjm0o32cjh2bs)
_Here I am bringing flowers to my local Tesla dealer in Malibu to show my moral support. Thank you, Elon!_
To me, Elon Musk is a living manifestation of the kind of heroes Ayn Rand celebrated in her literature. Part Hank Rearden, part John Galt, part Howard Roark, he builds rockets, revolutionizes industries, builds beautiful products, defends free speech, hunts down government waste, and refuses to apologize for his success.

**This entrepreneurial spirit is what we’re trying to cultivate in the rising generation!**

Whether it’s through our action-packed animated book trailers, thought-provoking Draw My Life videos, or captivating graphic novels, The Atlas Society is using art to engage young minds with the message that everyone has the opportunity to be victorious.

[By donating today, you can help The Atlas Society build a future where the next Elon Musks and the next Ayn Rands are inspired to rise. Click below to make your donation now. >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ztjoc1pdk71ofimklp9d2dtj62p7jmujokigpr80_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjjm0o32cjh2bs) [Donate $10 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z1dke1drj7c9ksleftof1bev1uv50l50s9ossncg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjjm0o32cjh2bs)

[Donate $35 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zj6100b4o9je0rus5bth9enu60pulkd94k8j9tdo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjjm0o32cjh2bs)

[Donate $50 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zr3s0sfd91lglg3iu7u283jj2dskfk9rt23u1a9o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjjm0o32cjh2bs)

[Donate $100 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zek1gb6lse9bij7rcf2fn2tt01loivemanub5mmg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjjm0o32cjh2bs)

[Donate $250 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z3nr8sc6pjugolk2dm95892enisf9op9dvujfaa0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjjm0o32cjh2bs)

[Donate $500 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zj7ee68r6m1cm4g2hhq0vdbmfj9tmr6ve0h82nd8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjjm0o32cjh2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2znovhs6u6idpti0cd69i11gg1ce1v097g3fp3evo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjjm0o32cjh2bs)

[Donate Any Other Amount](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zh4fehnr0ablc7o4cr8aohd913908h5uthdseklo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjjm0o32cjh2bs)
With grit, grace, and gratitude,

Jennifer Grossman (JAG)
CEO , The Atlas Society

**Trump and MAGA Republicans are already attacking him relentlessly, so we’re sending Sen. Bernie Sanders a MASSIVE letter thanking him for all his amazing work!**

[**You’ve been PERSONALLY selected to sign, friend, so please don’t let us down: Add your name to thank Senator Sanders now! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90618?t=7&akid=20065%2E878179%2Es3G4sU) | [**Donate $3 to sign the card now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90618?t=8&akid=20065%2E878179%2Es3G4sU)

TO: Sen. Bernie Sanders
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear Senator Bernie Sanders,**

__Thank you for all your hard work leading the Anti-Trump resistance!__

It’s easy to feel helpless with MAGA Republicans in charge of the House, Senate, and White House, but you keep us hopeful that we can fight back.

**I know it isn’t easy fighting off Trump and the GOP’s escalating threats to take you down, so please know that Democrats _across the country_ stand with you.**

Your leadership is absolutely critical right now, and we hope more Democrats follow your lead.

[**I can’t thank you enough for all of your work to stop Donald Trump and save our Democracy! So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and to keep electing incredible Democrats who will save our democracy from MAGA extremists like Donald Trump. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90618?t=9&akid=20065%2E878179%2Es3G4sU) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90618?t=10&akid=20065%2E878179%2Es3G4sU)

body:
Peter, Early Voting in the NJ Primary is now open! Common Sense friends, get out there and VOTE. Taking back New Jersey from the establishment elites and Leftist Lunatics starts TODAY.
| | [ ]()
---
Peter, **Early Voting in the NJ Primary is now open!** Common Sense friends, get out there and VOTE. Taking back New Jersey from the establishment elites and Leftist Lunatics starts TODAY. 🗓️ **When can I vote early?** Today – Sunday, June 8, 2025

Ken describes himself as someone who is politically homeless like so many of us, and just looking for some common sense in a political world gone mad. I look forward to more common sense conversations with him. What’s the only way to break the cycle of madness so many of us have grown sick of? Vote out the lemons. The polls are open. Hello, and thank you for taking the time to read this email. This message is part of an ongoing conversation between us, and I want to take a moment to ensure you have full transparency about why you received this message, how your information is handled, and what to expect from future emails. Why You’re Receiving This Email You’re receiving this email because at some point, you opted in to receive updates, news, or information on a specific topic we’ve previously discussed or shared. Whether it was through a subscription, a form submission, or another form of communication, your information was shared willingly, and we respect your decision to connect with us. If you’re wondering about the nature of our correspondence, rest assured that we aim to keep all emails relevant, timely, and free from unnecessary clutter. This includes respecting your inbox and refraining from sending irrelevant messages. Your Privacy is Important We value your trust and take your privacy very seriously. The information you provide is securely stored and never shared, sold, or used outside the purpose for which you provided it. If you ever want to review how we handle your data, feel free to contact us directly. Transparency is our priority, and we’re happy to address any questions you might have. You are always in control of the information you share. If you feel that any part of your subscription or interaction needs clarification, let us know. We’re here to provide accurate answers and ensure your satisfaction. How to Unsubscribe or Manage Your Preferences We understand that everyone’s inbox is different. If you ever find our emails no longer relevant, there’s no hard feelings. You can easily manage your email preferences or unsubscribe using the link provided below. By clicking the unsubscribe link, you’ll be taken to a page where you can either adjust your communication preferences (such as receiving fewer emails or only on specific topics) or completely remove yourself from our list. The process is straightforward, and any changes will take effect promptly. We don’t use tricks or gimmicks to keep you subscribed. Our priority is to ensure that our emails add value to your day, and if they don’t, we respect your decision to part ways. Accessibility and Communication If you have any trouble accessing the unsubscribe page, managing preferences, or understanding why you’re receiving this email, you can reach out directly to our support team at info@commonsenseclub.org. We aim to provide a response within a reasonable time frame and address your concerns effectively. Our communication is designed to be as inclusive as possible, but we know there’s always room for improvement. If you have any feedback on how we can make our emails more accessible or relevant, please don’t hesitate to share. A Commitment to Non-Intrusive Emails We aim to create a non-intrusive communication experience. This means we won’t overwhelm your inbox with excessive messages, and we work hard to ensure our content remains clear and concise. The purpose of this email is to stay connected with you and provide updates or information that we believe is meaningful. If we ever fail to meet these standards, we encourage you to let us know. Feedback, whether positive or constructive, is always appreciated. Your thoughts help us understand how we can do better and improve our communication approach. While we cannot guarantee every suggestion will be implemented, we will take the time to carefully review and consider your input. Contact Information If you’d like to get in touch with us outside of managing your preferences, here’s how you can reach us: Email: info@commonsenseclub.org
Phone: (866) 916-3221 (please note this is a text-only line)
Mailing Address:
Common Sense Club
165 Route 35
Red Bank, New Jersey, 07701 We strive to ensure all communication channels are open and readily available to you. Whether it’s a question, comment, or concern, our team is ready to assist. Legal Information We comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding email communication. This includes adhering to anti-spam laws and maintaining the highest standards for consent-based communication. Your trust matters, and we work diligently to ensure every email you receive meets these requirements. If you need further clarification on our compliance policies or legal obligations, please feel free to ask. Transparency and accountability are central to our communication strategy, and we’re happy to provide additional details if needed. A Final Note Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel, we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you. We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. Thank you for allowing us to stay in touch with you. This footer was designed to ensure transparency, provide essential information, and give you full control over your communication preferences. We hope it meets your expectations, but if there’s anything you’d like to see improved, we’re always here to listen.

body:

Senator Ted Cruz

name: Barack Obama
subject: I’d love to meet you
body:
I’m excited to share that later this summer, I’ll get to meet a supporter like you and thank you personally for the work you’re doing.
**[You can use this link to make a contribution to the Democratic National Committee and to enter the contest.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-obama-contest?refcode=em250602-contest}&amount=10&refcode2=637_2563979_BI8BP4&akid=637%2E2563979%2EBI8BP4)**
Right now, with everything going on, it would be easy to give in to fear or despair — but people like you aren’t doing that. You’re showing up at town halls in your communities, holding your representatives accountable, and maybe even planning to run for office yourself.
I’m excited to say thank you in person.
**[If you use this email to chip in $10 or any amount that feels right to you to support the DNC’s work, you’ll be automatically entered to meet with me. Plus, you’ll get to bring a guest, too.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-obama-contest?refcode=em250602-contest}&amount=10&refcode2=637_2563979_BI8BP4&akid=637%2E2563979%2EBI8BP4)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-obama-contest?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em250602-contest&refcode2=637_2563979_BI8BP4&akid=637%2E2563979%2EBI8BP4)**

---
****
Your travel and hotel will be covered. We’ll get a chance to chat and even take a few photos together. And your contribution will go directly toward funding the DNC’s work to organize across the country as Democrats lay the groundwork to take back Congress.
I hope to see you soon,
Barack
Barack Obama
44th President of the United States
[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-obama-contest?refcode=em250602-contest&amount=10&refcode2=637_2563979_BI8BP4&akid=637%2E2563979%2EBI8BP4)

Paid for by Harris Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Harris for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY.
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. Thank you so much for being a supporter. But we don't want to bother you. If you’d like to unsubscribe, you can **[click here.](https://harris.actionkit.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=637%2E2563979%2EBI8BP4)**
No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to enter or win and will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. This promotion begins on May 30, 2025, at 12:01 AM ET. Entries must be received by June 30, 2025 at 11:59 PM ET. Enter by [contributing here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/meet-obama-sweepstakes-2025?t=2&refcode2=637_2563979_BI8BP4&akid=637%2E2563979%2EBI8BP4) or [click here](https://democrats.org/meet-obama-sweepstakes-2025) to enter without contributing. One winner will receive the following prize package: transportation to and from Princeton, NJ (domestic travel only, via plane and/or train at Sponsor’s discretion) on July 11, 2025 for two people, a one (1) night hotel stay (one room), two tickets to the fundraiser, and a meeting with President Obama at the fundraiser photo line (approx. retail value $1,000). Odds depend on the number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or lawful permanent U.S. residents, who are natural persons, legal residents of the fifty (50) United States, District of Columbia, or Puerto Rico, and who are 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). View full official rules [here.](https://democrats.org/meet-obama-sweepstakes-2025-rules) By entering, each entrant accepts and agrees to be bound by the official rules. Failure to comply with the official rules may result in disqualification. Sponsor: DNC Services Corporation, 430 South Capitol St SE, Washington DC 20003.

Trump Border Czar Tom Homan **[set the record straight during an interview on ABC News](https://substack.com/redirect/2f09323a-662e-4b56-aa22-4e197ea5766b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** when the interview asked a series of misleading questions regarding the deportation of illegal aliens and anti-American visa-holders.
Homan showed a lot of patience...
[Watch The Video](https://substack.com/redirect/2f09323a-662e-4b56-aa22-4e197ea5766b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2f09323a-662e-4b56-aa22-4e197ea5766b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"A federal judge said that he has a strong suspicion the administration deported a 2-year-old with no meaningful process,... why deport them before the court weigh in?" the reporter asked.
Homan was beside himself at the premise of the question, "The mother of a 2-year-old wanted her baby to go with her... if we didn't do that, the story would be we are separating families again!"
**["Having a U.S. citizen child doesn't make you immune from the law!"](https://substack.com/redirect/2f09323a-662e-4b56-aa22-4e197ea5766b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Homan added. "We can't send a message to the whole world that it's okay to enter this country illegally,... just simply have a U.S. citizen child and you're off the books, you're immune!"
Watch Homan hold the line on fake news ABC:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/2f09323a-662e-4b56-aa22-4e197ea5766b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# Bryson DeChambeau plays golf on Trump's new White House course
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a2b32b27-890a-443d-b877-48861c3e2405?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dan Scavino/X
Friend of President Trump and professional golfer Bryson DeChambeau**[played golf on the White House South Lawn](https://substack.com/redirect/d12f37cb-9a68-4493-ac51-8b4a9de3ceb4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Monday evening after the grounds were converted into a par 3 course.
* **DeChambeau was spotted playing on the White House South Lawn** \- The pro golfer, who has developed a relationship with Trump through previous rounds including his **["Break 50" series video](https://substack.com/redirect/1b128d45-f8ec-419a-9d16-2ac697e7b47d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and LIV golf events, was seen playing on the presidential grounds Monday evening.
* **The White House has a long history with golf facilities dating back to Eisenhower** \- The putting green was first installed in 1954, removed during Nixon's presidency, then reinstalled under George H.W. Bush in 1991 with help from the USGA, and has been improved by subsequent administrations including Clinton and Obama.
* **DeChambeau has praised Trump as a golf ambassador and "normal person"** \- The golfer, who was brought on stage during Trump's election victory celebration in November, said in April that Trump "loves golf" and is "such a great ambassador for the game of golf and for diplomacy," describing him as "just a normal person" after getting to know him better through their rounds together.

* * *
# **Harvard commencement speaker worked for Chinese Communist Party-controlled org with military ties**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a8fd1d51-e737-4486-946c-f5a3e25c5f60?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Luanna Jiang, who delivered Harvard's 2025 commencement speech, volunteered for the China Biodiversity Conservation and Green Development Foundation (CBCGDF) from 2018-2022, which is controlled by the CCP and has signed cooperative agreements with Chinese military arms and hosts a branch of China's United Front Work Department intelligence service, **[the Daily Caller News Foundation reports.](https://substack.com/redirect/a8fd1d51-e737-4486-946c-f5a3e25c5f60?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* **The organization's leadership has extensive ties to Chinese intelligence and military networks** \- CBCGDF's secretary-general Zhou Jinfeng, who wrote Jiang's Harvard recommendation letter, has served in multiple Chinese government intelligence roles and met with Harvard officials at the headquarters of China Poly Group, a sanctioned Chinese defense contractor founded by the People's Liberation Army.
* **Harvard is facing intense scrutiny over its Chinese government connections** \- The Department of Homeland Security revoked Harvard's right to host foreign students in May, citing the university's "coordinated activity with the CCP," while the House Select Committee accused Harvard of hosting members of a CCP paramilitary organization involved in Uyghur genocide.
* **China experts are calling for extreme measures against Harvard** \- Gordon Chang warned that "Harvard will have no choice but to end its existence" if it continues allowing itself to be used by those seeking America's destruction, suggesting the Trump administration should revoke the university's charter during what he calls a "national emergency."

Watch Homan hold the line on fake news ABC: Expect an economic "heart attack" | | ---|---|--- The simple truth is this... Even if the government doesn't default on its debt, and even if Congress never votes to take away your social security... Inflation is not going anywhere, and, Social Security is still going to go insolvent. Your money WILL be WORTH LESS. The time is now to do what you can to help Start by requesting your . Inside you'll learn what you can do to help protect your retirement savings from these horrific threats, with simple and legal options. Options that are TAX FREE & PENALTY FREE! Don't wait for the debt bomb to explode. Act now to protect what you've worked your entire life to build. Bryson DeChambeau plays golf on Trump's new White House course | | ---|---|--- Dan Scavino/X Friend of President Trump and professional golfer Bryson DeChambeau Monday evening after the grounds were converted into a par 3 course. DeChambeau was spotted playing on the White House South Lawn \- The pro golfer, who has developed a relationship with Trump through previous rounds including his and LIV golf events, was seen playing on the presidential grounds Monday evening. The White House has a long history with golf facilities dating back to Eisenhower \- The putting green was first installed in 1954, removed during Nixon's presidency, then reinstalled under George H.W. Bush in 1991 with help from the USGA, and has been improved by subsequent administrations including Clinton and Obama. DeChambeau has praised Trump as a golf ambassador and "normal person" \- The golfer, who was brought on stage during Trump's election victory celebration in November, said in April that Trump "loves golf" and is "such a great ambassador for the game of golf and for diplomacy," describing him as "just a normal person" after getting to know him better through their rounds together. Harvard commencement speaker worked for Chinese Communist Party-controlled org with military ties | | ---|---|--- Luanna Jiang, who delivered Harvard's 2025 commencement speech, volunteered for the China Biodiversity Conservation and Green Development Foundation (CBCGDF) from 2018-2022, which is controlled by the CCP and has signed cooperative agreements with Chinese military arms and hosts a branch of China's United Front Work Department intelligence service, The organization's leadership has extensive ties to Chinese intelligence and military networks \- CBCGDF's secretary-general Zhou Jinfeng, who wrote Jiang's Harvard recommendation letter, has served in multiple Chinese government intelligence roles and met with Harvard officials at the headquarters of China Poly Group, a sanctioned Chinese defense contractor founded by the People's Liberation Army. Harvard is facing intense scrutiny over its Chinese government connections \- The Department of Homeland Security revoked Harvard's right to host foreign students in May, citing the university's "coordinated activity with the CCP," while the House Select Committee accused Harvard of hosting members of a CCP paramilitary organization involved in Uyghur genocide. China experts are calling for extreme measures against Harvard \- Gordon Chang warned that "Harvard will have no choice but to end its existence" if it continues allowing itself to be used by those seeking America's destruction, suggesting the Trump administration should revoke the university's charter during what he calls a "national emergency." | | POLL What do you think of Harvard? | ? ? ? * PolitiBrawl is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support our work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. You're currently a free subscriber to . ---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3bcef75d2c&e=b7b3eddce2)

* * *
---
| ''When nearly half of Pennsylvania’s third graders can’t read at grade level, we don’t have an education gap; we have an emergency.

It doesn’t matter if a child lives in Pittsburgh, Philadelphia or a small town like Cecil or McDonald — if they can’t read by third grade, the odds of success in school, work and life begin slipping away fast.

And yet, Pennsylvania has no comprehensive, statewide plan to address this. No structured strategy. No urgent action..."

name: Reid Rasner, CEO
subject: Where most travelers are going this year
body:
Hi Peter,

Guess what Italy, Egypt, Cuba, Morocco, Greece, and South Korea all have in common?
They're all top recommended travel destinations this year.1
And whether you're planning to visit one of these exciting locales -- or your upcoming trip takes you off the beaten path -- your next adventure could be a _disaster_ if you're not careful.
[](https://financeinsights.net/JVeqS6L2AsznEejSG8DZnI5mBgL?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
Travel safety is a must these days, but it doesn't have to be a big chore.
It just means taking some simple steps before jetting off to make sure we're really prepared for the risks we could be facing.
That's the focus of this month's Visual Insights Newsletter.
[**Click here to see it!**](https://financeinsights.net/JVeqS6L2AsznEejSG8DZnI5mBgL?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
Traveling well is all about staying a step ahead and setting up a safety net just in case the unexpected happens.
With that, we can make any vacation safer and far more enjoyable, both during the trip and when we look back at it.
[**Go ahead and click here to learn practical, simple tips for modern travel safety.**](https://financeinsights.net/JVeqS6L2AsznEejSG8DZnI5mBgL?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

Sincerely,
**Reid Rasner - CEO**
Omnivest Financial
(307) 337-1223

body:

| |
---|---

| 🫏 If you are a local Democrat: please continue reading.

With Trump and his allies doubling down on their extremist agenda, **the states are not only our last line of defense, they're our best opportunity for progress.**

State Democrats are facing several competitive special elections over the coming months, and this November, every seat in the Virginia House and governorship are up for grabs. 👀

**We’re counting on grassroots supporters to help elect Democrats who will fight the extreme MAGA agenda.** [ A $7 donation is all it takes to fuel our work → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDqV2bKIMRGsvIJOaErTgze4PCjsHMzvKkQMRSSS8IyoZp_qpYzX4I9Wc_R1d42LJcsyVHrO80JCNGAJoWQZ9ceRGebtAS4NWsFM4J8zXrHrOb34j5ZsB9_8pn-BraBq0RqXgdFpOt3S82On3FmltS9_DeLmQ4CqqXXPkgkO1S3W9piqlP8EEzuHhQ2hPqzw02El_CcN34kqjeXr3iBh7hHNwYpnoNuzYnAs6r0Il_vp29PsgtwiyZSeZH484Fizc4bC0jDU6c4VM0bgPhe36GXwlRGU8vIoK9sNLG8xhD3o1RxM87yS_r0U5ducX_8fkfCisZzt9D4-s4_RQNA2ZbWVngU67MhD3xYbiWqjZ5yCGJi06C9fiMYUTCC5YAdd4x/4h1/9LGexUuCRySsFj3Ak63OFA/h0/h001.UmMa9uc1QeuUxo29mUwXYtl_vHURc-oMy7VUN4ppfnA)

But we know not everyone can pitch in right now, so we’re relying on our most dedicated supporters to make your first donation of the year to the DLCC.

name: Rural Americans United
subject: Reclaiming Education, Reclaiming Democracy
body:
It’s up to us—those who live in rural communities
| | | | |
---
| What Is In This Newsletter?

* Reclaiming Education, Reclaiming Democracy
* No Kings - June 14
* BBBB
* Potpourri

---
| |
---
| Education. Our government was established with checks and balances to ensure that no branch could corrupt the will of the people. But what was not written into the Constitution is this: the greatest check on our system of government is an informed electorate. As Thomas Jefferson wrote, "A well-informed citizenry is the best defense against tyranny."
Educating the electorate is Rural Americans United's primary goal. We use our communication skills to reach newly registered voters, young people, and marginalized communities with messages that resonate and in language that is accessible.
We know the Republican Party has taken full advantage of educating the public. You may question this, since as the party has moved further right, it has increased its lies, fictions, and hate-filled rhetoric--which doesn't sound much like education. But it is. And it has been effective.
Meanwhile, Democrats remain stuck in a 1970s version of education. Republicans have evolved--or devolved--with the times. They understood that as the public education system declined, so did Americans' interest in engaging with complex or nuanced topics. In its place, they offered spoon-fed messages that reinforce people's existing prejudices. By appealing to the lowest common denominator, everyone gets to feel informed, even when they're not. It's easy to build a web of lies when it's full of ideas people already want to believe--and when those beliefs are echoed by everyone around them.
Democrats, on the other hand, continue to rely on academic-style explanations that often sound condescending. The desire to "explain" has diminishing value in today's fast-moving political environment. Sound bites--true or not--land quickly and stick. Lengthy rebuttals, no matter how accurate, are tuned out. And while that was happening, the Democratic Party abandoned rural America in favor of deep-pocketed, college-educated urban centers. It was a lazy move. It was an arrogant move. And rural Americans saw it as such.
---
---
| |
---
| -Published in the Yakima Republican Party Newsletter May 2025
It's up to us--those who live in rural communities--to reeducate the American people on democratic values (which are not always the same as Democratic Party values). It is clear that Americans are hungry for strong voices, clear direction, and understandable leadership they can trust. So much so that some have become devoted to authoritarian figures with a cult-like intensity. Meanwhile, the Democratic Party is faltering--and fighting internal change every step of the way. The last eight members of Congress to die in office have all been Democrats. That's not just a statistic--it's a warning (source:[ ](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZtD-uQ5R4JDLZtNoVERx2x0k6of6jYD3S7e7Ubqcm13p9wuxk87J3OIiwDH6ReW0eisWUhlkurQ4cVmMfX5jVrTskfZEuyoxKAgPX3KvlOhnkJ59UaxY0Yz1X31unOgv0jCMJl2mIgQUg9pBvn66M9Bd8c-rdRuSUsSqo8fkkJ7gc7waOtE5EtrZEGqnJxpun81VhdGfHQdPRonXKjtLYuIlr0pXY9cTbwzN61liTKs=&c=dq4WS-U-XM-C8DcYRBIj8rsBFjQshKy_7Zil63yJTrLEEcUq1CgAOw==&ch=vBib38YlbmfOvZwzWktYSMZpIEGxrAlRzwMWjSs9d8_LWgV_njlqTA==)[Business Insider](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZtD-uQ5R4JDLZtNoVERx2x0k6of6jYD3S7e7Ubqcm13p9wuxk87J3OIiwDH6ReW0eisWUhlkurQ4cVmMfX5jVrTskfZEuyoxKAgPX3KvlOhnkJ59UaxY0Yz1X31unOgv0jCMJl2mIgQUg9pBvn66M9Bd8c-rdRuSUsSqo8fkkJ7gc7waOtE5EtrZEGqnJxpun81VhdGfHQdPRonXKjtLYu5gYLAvb-CviKqTobbibXo=&c=dq4WS-U-XM-C8DcYRBIj8rsBFjQshKy_7Zil63yJTrLEEcUq1CgAOw==&ch=vBib38YlbmfOvZwzWktYSMZpIEGxrAlRzwMWjSs9d8_LWgV_njlqTA==)).
So what can we do locally?
* Instead of explaining, we start conversations.
* Instead of offering stinging rebuttals, we lead the narrative.
* And we redouble our efforts to reach the communities that are shifting rightward at an alarming pace--especially Latino voters and our youth.

Now is the time to act. The stakes are too high for us to sit back and hope national strategies will fix what has been neglected. Change must begin where we live, with the people we know and the values we hold. Rural Americans United is committed to rebuilding trust, restoring democratic principles, and reigniting civic engagement in the places that have been overlooked for too long.
But we cannot do this alone. We need your voice. We need your commitment.
Join us. Attend a meeting. Bring a friend. Share our message. Help shape a movement that speaks with honesty, listens with humility, and leads with courage. Together, we can reclaim the promise of democracy--community by community, conversation by conversation.

| PoliticsGirl on TikTok offers one of the most insightful summaries of the Big Beautiful Budget Bill.
PoliticsGirl breaks down how the budget bill isn't just about spending--it's also a tool used to shape what government can and cannot do. She highlights how conservative lawmakers quietly insert restrictive language that limits the enforcement powers of agencies like the DOJ or even the courts, effectively allowing certain laws to go unenforced. This creates a dangerous imbalance where only the executive branch (under a president's control) can decide what gets enforced--paving the way for authoritarianism. She stresses that what seems like "boring fine print" can actually erode democracy if people aren't paying attention.

clean_body: It’s up to us—those who live in rural communities | | | | | | What Is In This Newsletter? Reclaiming Education, Reclaiming Democracy No Kings - June 14 BBBB Potpourri | | | Education. Our government was established with checks and balances to ensure that no branch could corrupt the will of the people. But what was not written into the Constitution is this: the greatest check on our system of government is an informed electorate. As Thomas Jefferson wrote, "A well-informed citizenry is the best defense against tyranny." Educating the electorate is Rural Americans United's primary goal. We use our communication skills to reach newly registered voters, young people, and marginalized communities with messages that resonate and in language that is accessible. We know the Republican Party has taken full advantage of educating the public. You may question this, since as the party has moved further right, it has increased its lies, fictions, and hate-filled rhetoric--which doesn't sound much like education. But it is. And it has been effective. Meanwhile, Democrats remain stuck in a 1970s version of education. Republicans have evolved--or devolved--with the times. They understood that as the public education system declined, so did Americans' interest in engaging with complex or nuanced topics. In its place, they offered spoon-fed messages that reinforce people's existing prejudices. By appealing to the lowest common denominator, everyone gets to feel informed, even when they're not. It's easy to build a web of lies when it's full of ideas people already want to believe--and when those beliefs are echoed by everyone around them. Democrats, on the other hand, continue to rely on academic-style explanations that often sound condescending. The desire to "explain" has diminishing value in today's fast-moving political environment. Sound bites--true or not--land quickly and stick. Lengthy rebuttals, no matter how accurate, are tuned out. And while that was happening, the Democratic Party abandoned rural America in favor of deep-pocketed, college-educated urban centers. It was a lazy move. It was an arrogant move. And rural Americans saw it as such. | | | -Published in the Yakima Republican Party Newsletter May 2025 It's up to us--those who live in rural communities--to reeducate the American people on democratic values (which are not always the same as Democratic Party values). It is clear that Americans are hungry for strong voices, clear direction, and understandable leadership they can trust. So much so that some have become devoted to authoritarian figures with a cult-like intensity. Meanwhile, the Democratic Party is faltering--and fighting internal change every step of the way. The last eight members of Congress to die in office have all been Democrats. That's not just a statistic--it's a warning (source:==). So what can we do locally? Instead of explaining, we start conversations. Instead of offering stinging rebuttals, we lead the narrative. * And we redouble our efforts to reach the communities that are shifting rightward at an alarming pace--especially Latino voters and our youth. Now is the time to act. The stakes are too high for us to sit back and hope national strategies will fix what has been neglected. Change must begin where we live, with the people we know and the values we hold. Rural Americans United is committed to rebuilding trust, restoring democratic principles, and reigniting civic engagement in the places that have been overlooked for too long. But we cannot do this alone. We need your voice. We need your commitment. Join us. Attend a meeting. Bring a friend. Share our message. Help shape a movement that speaks with honesty, listens with humility, and leads with courage. Together, we can reclaim the promise of democracy--community by community, conversation by conversation. | | | | == | | | | | | No Kings! | | Contact your local Democratic party organization, Indivisible group or search Facebook for the event nearest you. | | | | BBBB | | == | PoliticsGirl on TikTok offers one of the most insightful summaries of the Big Beautiful Budget Bill. PoliticsGirl breaks down how the budget bill isn't just about spending--it's also a tool used to shape what government can and cannot do. She highlights how conservative lawmakers quietly insert restrictive language that limits the enforcement powers of agencies like the DOJ or even the courts, effectively allowing certain laws to go unenforced. This creates a dangerous imbalance where only the executive branch (under a president's control) can decide what gets enforced--paving the way for authoritarianism. She stresses that what seems like "boring fine print" can actually erode democracy if people aren't paying attention. | | | | Potpourri | | | Information provided by Angie Girrard. | URGENT: Trump is DISMANTLING the Justice Department's Civil Rights Division!! [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta674850f-75c8-4ecc-849f-6b14f57a76d5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, the Trump administration is GUTTING civil rights protections! That means ANY marginalized community – people of color, immigrants, women, the LGBTQ+ community – could be left without protections from the government!! The Department of Justice has spent decades protecting Americans’ constitutional freedoms but all that’s changed under Trump. Under him, the Department of Justice has quit investigating or dropped support for dozens of cases involving voting rights, racial discrimination, and other rights violations. It’s clear he’s trying to remake our Justice Department into another agency more focused on backing his far-right politics than actually serving the needs of the American people! [We have to push back on attacks against our rights and freedoms, Peter! We need to elect more Democrats who can stand up for us. Will you chip in whatever you can today to help Blue Amp Action invest in key races and give Democrats more power to hold Trump accountable?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9f19009d-51c6-480e-9fcc-5c59ca03a68e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4082266c-0964-4405-a2da-24c886f63e71/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:
The Hill just came out with its long-awaited list of the five Senate seats most likely to flip
#

Peter -
We know you didn't jump out of bed this morning and think "I've got to rush a donation to Jon Ossoff immediately," but that is what we're asking you to do.
We're asking you to rush a donation to Jon Ossoff's re-election campaign.
The Hill just came out with its long-awaited list of the five Senate seats most likely to flip to either party in the midterms and Jon Ossoff's seat was first.
Not the 5th most. Not even the 2nd most. They are saying Jon Ossoff's seat is the MOST likely to flip in the midterms.
That is the kind of news that attracts significant outside spending from Republicans who are desperately trying to expand their margins in the Senate.
Emails like this are the number one way Jon Ossoff funds his re-election against the right-wing Super PACs and MAGA megadonors trying to beat us. And while he'd never expect you to donate to every email we send, we are hoping this news convinces you to give in response to this one.
Please:
[**If holding this Senate seat and keeping Jon Ossoff in the Senate feels worth $5 to you, that is the donation we're asking you to make to his re-election campaign today.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-june25.2OdyOr&refcode=em250603&t=1&akid=409%2E5691347%2EM0e79U)

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: we're airing our first ad 📺
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
"Too many politicians talk when they should listen."
Peter, I have some big news: we're airing our first TV and digital ad in the race for Governor.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89152?refcode=em20250603-8975&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8975%2E614464%2E54V7xL)
As I say in the ad, _"too many politicians talk when they should listen."_
From my days as an intelligence officer at CIA to my time in Congress, I've learned to ignore the noise and focus on the mission at hand. _And that's what I'll do as Governor of Virginia._
But today, as the only Democrat in the country who can flip a Governor's seat this year, I need your help.
**[Will you split a contribution between our campaign and Heartland Patriots today so we can afford to get our ad in front of voters across Virginia?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89152?refcode=em20250603-8975&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8975%2E614464%2E54V7xL)**

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
Before you move on to your next email—I would appreciate it if you would participate in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the Department of Justice.

_Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/jlnhpy5OsNgvGRVljUlYx2aEltGx1KOghfwawQXvhaStzQ3uoL0LE4n4ziLD5C93BaoB-Rc3hAzIODgGelyVuED2pmBUuqcwUvkPv-Z05mFa0j9xIrFbSH-SEPC6yB4TbAcPXgVJMvWQZau_NDRKG7BmS-KhCikgnjxDi5hIktXxkwQHcw5UkWHX/FlODf4sgCckf7eZ8ReRHXQg0_ToK_fQb/9)_
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/1ZEdEW06uCdbRiGXs1VtLpA7sJwjNYPGicSFMVq1hPdedCSLUxFn-Q8vtKuRBFYUaURIc7K6hdKU0r1SJWSAmPp2ozj2r4akMggDf7jBuJmrVMwpD9OOiuf3BIhLnygEfuLQdjmO-f7ehuYTgxiq_VM7_RXHnb3RN8YqIX4jLOMMBFrfhOXD-zL5dHs-5ex6H9mLQYjxkxbmS8KemMqmTsL81dyPJY0Khfg0-OYVCQdBF45TgRyBOU-CP5-7aDd8aU1Rp_YkVdL594FZOL7gLuDDfHno9FBQdK1hsCn1X7RWajPQcdCijKM4xqWrjK5f4ilRkefgySvtZP9p28tsnuei2AvZL8npAnMU0RM1l_hxdvShfdBkPmbM8JR01khVk4iybmhJihidchYlc6OPinLK2magyDR5fBrFSqmfxTu8Khb-k5SdlyVswVvdBA/m39Wz84SMfk6S4dVC24-H_6UzDHzyAlD/9) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the revival of the rule of law in America. **We have an opportunity to reverse the horrendous weaponization of the Department of Justice. This is our chance to right the wrongs of the past few years.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the previous administration used the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dared to stand up for our constitutional liberties. **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue.

Your responses will help Hillsdale improve its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including teaching citizens about the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. You can complete the **National Survey on the Department of Justice** by using the link below: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/zZ7M6MNT3J5GLG-ICXxz3f1Sd8Qv3YW5S1Pf9XQqlvnFFMtZSAnpT3tj3Nk7boRaS82P-dyIr73McA7e1EZM3D6OeuwM9VeCrDY0TXBt_EBbUaHy52Mr6yanxklPUTAQLmIrPBMZqnO5CDCJjBDYAt_LgbFvvXKxyGwT-WtAaXfugGhgus_W7rbUphRrP3RRR8gMvJFZvrLfkWMpHHAkbACGhjKtD0E1vDusUh9jx9GsxlQsoGpKEA4guVLxSzlrvjHQScapqRfmyxZypKzlfSehEItq6LtyXqRvCmykgTcrKWsFyYF_BVVjfOhCLYn22Rxe7EpIFMo_LpL4j1f3gLpI-_t8WKInFok8pvEuyDCFECR-y8lGD69Q7xWRbMiN_rS96zVVmKxgQdg5HOdsno6RsnPnUAgOdofO8DfM53jDsc6BfMHb9obWREIBSQ/jP71Mv0TqLeJqX5LdVtCrsv7NIZKni9b/9)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** , and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet, the ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people. Over the last few years, we have experienced a constant attack on our rights--on the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, on due process, on gun ownership, and more. **Today, we are returning to what Abraham Lincoln in his Gettysburg Address called a "government of the people, by the people, for the people."** **That means we have an opportunity to make sure that the weaponization of government _never_ happens again in this country.** Hillsdale College is a leader in this fight--we are **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens with the **truth** about America's great heritage of liberty. We are working to expand our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
****

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.7 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
****

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
****

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've experienced over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So, please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept **even one penny** of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/mfqDBVSTKyiIS4nfZYFuQA3qvgNVF9zh8yu2vlr5-d6GLSuxkZrnxzphzfp7-p22kl7Meaqz-N-efEHYUAUoUtsdZUbqln9tx1kcUzNCaFgR5reDwR2Nuyj50VTP_QloI_DqaOlALTUtGmpFY8DWuurXC2Wckin4fm5CSJpBb1emXUiC_9kncPfJnpJPKzH1p_cFxWXZz1JbkS1HR-ym-N1hXPb2Gafdus7wlO7XTpHiW-ckffcSsRlN-DU_UszE5ACrtkvJz9bE_Yk3iQswCJ_d7n5JMlP8Ksz-q0oWMHXp6Raj6l_lmRnvK-Bur-dh3WbHo6K8xmhNZ0N0Fa9V6wERQ6a-xkzWdrk7rjsBaLIK3q0PmQIRc8OtS9j-Yxi_fQ_GaWfySTNhja-_oZXTIx0pBuLJYRYGEktV_LP2jdidXw6hvgAWJ4Qf95it6w/2VQg1p30LB4AEiuWHZTMPH8ooKnpC8EV/9)** Thank you for your time and attention. clean_body: | | | We outraised my MAGA opponent last quarter - but ahead of our June 5 pre-primary fundraising deadline, we know he’s working hard to catch up. Friend, we have a special fundraising deadline just days from now. While I don’t have a primary, I’ll still need to file a public June 5 pre-primary report, and I need your help to show big strength. Grassroots donors like you have pitched in over 3,000 times to my campaign to flip VA-HD22 this November and deliver Donald Trump a big defeat. In our first fundraising report last quarter, we outraised our MAGA opponent, earning national attention as a DLCC Spotlight race. But we know he’s working hard to catch up - we can’t rest. We can win this TOSS-UP race. My MAGA opponent was elected by just 1,416 votes - and Donald Trump lost this district. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thanks for your support, Elizabeth Guzman | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. name: Larry Elder
subject: Who is going to stop you?
body:
Our culture doesn’t suffer from a lack of information – it suffers from a lack of inspiration.

|
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlehdce890am0bn0234h72fdrc16q4ojbsd7u768_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjjm6pj1c1h2bs) Friend,

Our culture doesn’t suffer from a lack of information – it suffers from a lack of _inspiration_.

Young people are told to conform, to feel guilty, to seek approval, instead of aspiring to greatness and pursuing their independent vision.

But the quest to be the independent man was my main takeaway from my favorite Ayn Rand book, _The Fountainhead_.

Rand’s hero of the story, the architect Howard Roark, is a man who refuses to compromise his creative vision — even for the woman he loves. His nemesis, Ellsworth Toohey, a critic (and a socialist) who seeks to build collective resentment against Roark to tear down this symbol of independent genius and enshrine mediocrity. He openly admits his mission: “Make man feel small. Make him feel guilty. Kill his aspiration and his integrity.”

However, today’s Tooheys don’t wear bow ties or talk of architecture. They run institutions and call themselves activists or “experts.” They smear and attack people like Elon Musk — not because he did something wrong, but because he’s achieved something great.

But today’s Tooheys still preach the same gospel of envy, the hatred of the good simply for being good.

**At a time like this, our country could use more Howard Roarks – people who are willing to stand their ground, even when the whole world is against them.**

That’s why [I support The Atlas Society](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zfkej9al5fvv7039jnj920e0n2913rdtv1142c8o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjjm6pj1c1h2bs), and I hope you’ll join me.

My friend of 30 years, Jennifer Grossman, is the CEO of The Atlas Society, the leading non-profit organization **reaching young people with Ayn Rand’s bold, life-changing ideas:_independence, limited government, personal responsibility, and hard work_** — the very values that resonate most with me.

[You can help The Atlas Society introduce these ideas to the next generation by clicking below and donating $10, $35, $100, or even $250 today.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znd77oovhou6ubdvao8pck9kjtj1sje3tctv9cp0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjjm6pj1c1h2bs)
[Donate $10](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z58s2teenmdr3jblbm11ruohmv7uu27jkhnprapg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjjm6pj1c1h2bs)

[Donate $35](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbedttvbbunfd3jfp4qn36jqu45ac3abjc56b8t8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjjm6pj1c1h2bs)

[Donate $50](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zuclck3aj18lff7ng068o3g68etj29r32t0m053g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjjm6pj1c1h2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztj80cve56hmvm6d0ebp2bkc1aj5trja2mls210g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjjm6pj1c1h2bs)

[Donate $250](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcjfgss3c7p49jh2q078ot4o1flashgtad5crnt8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjjm6pj1c1h2bs)

[Donate $500](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zo9beau8h9k5uova5vpci10o7n9da4rdglf6urqg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjjm6pj1c1h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1t40rnu1fh2hfnkh0qbun8ncd5uujbrf36g7v5g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjjm6pj1c1h2bs)
Ayn Rand’s literature, like _The Fountainhead_ , shows young people that there is another way: to pursue their own happiness, to achieve boldly and unapologetically.

The problem is that today, **_just 12% of young people read books daily for fun_**. How are they supposed to learn these important ideas if they are trapped within a 700+ page book?!

Here are a few of the innovative ways Jennifer and her team have made my favorite book more accessible to young people:
* Turning the book into a **graphic novel** , the most popular form of book for today’s generation
* Creating an **animated Book Trailer** to inspire interest
* Producing **_Draw My Life_ videos** of Howard Roark and Ayn Rand.
* Writing a **Pocket Guide** to help readers stay abreast of all the twists and turns in Rand's epic story.

The Atlas Society is replicating this process with several of Ayn Rand’s works to make them more accessible to young people and challenge the collective idea of mediocrity over greatness.

_And it’s working!_

Young people ARE responding, but [The Atlas Society needs your help to push their incredible work even further. Please donate right away to bring Ayn Rand’s ideas to life. >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z26dj3je785tb0dd32ti1ton6f6s98givc222nmo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjjm6pj1c1h2bs)
[Donate](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zn5rlmbd2j1pf7d1frbprscug9t14s9vcqnc4ve8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjjm6pj1c1h2bs)
Like Howard Roark, The Atlas Society is pioneering new ways to achieve their mission and present Ayn Rand’s philosophy to new audiences.

However, the Tooheys of today are still preaching mediocrity. They’re still smearing achievement as privilege. They’re still parading envy as a virtue.

But, with your help, it doesn't have to be this way.

_**So if you believe in honoring excellence instead of punishing it...
If you believe in thinking for yourself instead of submitting to the mob...
If you believe that one honest man or woman can stand against the world and win...**_

[Then please, join me in supporting The Atlas Society’s mission.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zae6250praue1i69p8kc6iq1u7vq5k2gmc0vma98_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjjm6pj1c1h2bs)
[Donate $10](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjbm7lkha2e4ib6g6rhb00hpgtspemduu94hm470_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjjm6pj1c1h2bs)

[Donate $35](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdd5uf1vuilirg24cso0eri23l5a1e82ofb6e01g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjjm6pj1c1h2bs)

[Donate $50](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zuoi51kq6vnv7qakck2hc0fbsopkoj4ptnc87c20_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjjm6pj1c1h2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zql9kcsomesvo434s3s2j6akhjq2kfqq489osbh0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjjm6pj1c1h2bs)

[Donate $250](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3qqcnhjeipf19gm8eju6b1vm5jhje12ilrgaphg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjjm6pj1c1h2bs)

[Donate $500](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zd3mra3mvd74sqe8rr2qsrs6295v9pk3t2v46118_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjjm6pj1c1h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z42tbumjdl4uo0e4jiid3jr30apv962l494tep10_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjjm6pj1c1h2bs)
Thanks for your help!

Larry Elder

_The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible._

clean_body: Our culture doesn’t suffer from a lack of information – it suffers from a lack of inspiration. | | | Friend, Our culture doesn’t suffer from a lack of information – it suffers from a lack of inspiration. Young people are told to conform, to feel guilty, to seek approval, instead of aspiring to greatness and pursuing their independent vision. But the quest to be the independent man was my main takeaway from my favorite Ayn Rand book, The Fountainhead. Rand’s hero of the story, the architect Howard Roark, is a man who refuses to compromise his creative vision — even for the woman he loves. His nemesis, Ellsworth Toohey, a critic (and a socialist) who seeks to build collective resentment against Roark to tear down this symbol of independent genius and enshrine mediocrity. He openly admits his mission: “Make man feel small. Make him feel guilty. Kill his aspiration and his integrity.” However, today’s Tooheys don’t wear bow ties or talk of architecture. They run institutions and call themselves activists or “experts.” They smear and attack people like Elon Musk — not because he did something wrong, but because he’s achieved something great. But today’s Tooheys still preach the same gospel of envy, the hatred of the good simply for being good. At a time like this, our country could use more Howard Roarks – people who are willing to stand their ground, even when the whole world is against them. That’s why , and I hope you’ll join me. My friend of 30 years, Jennifer Grossman, is the CEO of The Atlas Society, the leading non-profit organization reaching young people with Ayn Rand’s bold, life-changing ideas:independence, limited government, personal responsibility, and hard work — the very values that resonate most with me. Ayn Rand’s literature, like The Fountainhead , shows young people that there is another way: to pursue their own happiness, to achieve boldly and unapologetically. The problem is that today, just 12% of young people read books daily for fun. How are they supposed to learn these important ideas if they are trapped within a 700+ page book?! Here are a few of the innovative ways Jennifer and her team have made my favorite book more accessible to young people: Turning the book into a graphic novel , the most popular form of book for today’s generation Creating an animated Book Trailer to inspire interest Producing Draw My Life videos of Howard Roark and Ayn Rand. Writing a Pocket Guide to help readers stay abreast of all the twists and turns in Rand's epic story. The Atlas Society is replicating this process with several of Ayn Rand’s works to make them more accessible to young people and challenge the collective idea of mediocrity over greatness. And it’s working! Young people ARE responding, but Like Howard Roark, The Atlas Society is pioneering new ways to achieve their mission and present Ayn Rand’s philosophy to new audiences. However, the Tooheys of today are still preaching mediocrity. They’re still smearing achievement as privilege. They’re still parading envy as a virtue. But, with your help, it doesn't have to be this way. So if you believe in honoring excellence instead of punishing it... If you believe in thinking for yourself instead of submitting to the mob... If you believe that one honest man or woman can stand against the world and win... Thanks for your help! Larry Elder The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible. Pop Acta Media | Your America PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |
