Peter, I'm sure you've seen my name in the headlines – and that won't be changing anytime soon.

Our fight for our government, our economy, and our very democracy is only just beginning, and, with fearless fighters like you behind me, **I know I won't have to face it alone.**
Whether it's holding the dark forces that rule this nation accountable or defending the Constitution and the rule of law, the work we're doing has truly never been more important to the fate of this nation.
Every legal victory, every battle to safeguard the most vulnerable among us and keep our democracy alive is powered by your unwavering belief in the pursuit of justice for _all_ Americans.
With more eyes on our fight than ever, your support gives me the strength to keep going, no matter how tough the road ahead may be.
**So as we prepare to take on more obstacles in the weeks, months, and years ahead, I want to say** _**thank you:

Thank you** _for helping me stand strong against this administration's targeted attacks.

_**Thank you**_ for ensuring New York remains a safe haven for progress in the face of extremism.

And _**thank you** _for playing such a crucial role in defending our democracy.
**Truly, I wouldn't have the platform I do without this grassroots team. Together, we're sending a powerful message to bad actors everywhere: We will not bend, we will not break, and we will not be bullied.

Take Uganda, 2014. USAID didn’t deliver food or medicine—**they pumped millions into LGBTQ groups, igniting a firestorm.**

Ugandans, rooted in tradition, saw it as a cultural assault. Protests exploded, and their parliament rammed through a harsh anti-LGBTQ law, blaming “Western meddling.”

**This wasn’t aid; it was a leftist fiasco that trashed America’s reputation and endangered our people.** Locals burned USAID posters, shouting “No to gringo values!”—**all funded by your tax dollars.**

And it’s not just Uganda. From Poland to Saudi Arabia, USAID’s LGBTQ pushes spark chaos and resentment.

clean_body: On March 28, 2025, the 4th Circuit allowed some cuts but kept USAID staggering on. Every day these courts stall, your wallet bleeds—$220 per family, year after year. | | Patriot, Freedom Watch is gearing up to slam USAID with a class action lawsuit for their rogue LGBTQ agenda —but . This lawsuit will be a MONSTER! President Trump’s fighting to gut this leftist cesspool, and I’m his bulldog in this war. Take Uganda, 2014. USAID didn’t deliver food or medicine—they pumped millions into LGBTQ groups, igniting a firestorm. Ugandans, rooted in tradition, saw it as a cultural assault. Protests exploded, and their parliament rammed through a harsh anti-LGBTQ law, blaming “Western meddling.” This wasn’t aid; it was a leftist fiasco that trashed America’s reputation and endangered our people. Locals burned USAID posters, shouting “No to gringo values!”—all funded by your tax dollars. And it’s not just Uganda. From Poland to Saudi Arabia, USAID’s LGBTQ pushes spark chaos and resentment. Your family’s tax hit? $220 a year—part of USAID’s $27 billion budget—wasted on woke stunts that turn allies into enemies. Trump’s livid, and so am I. Here’s the outrage: Trump’s battling to kill USAID, but activist judges keep it alive. On March 18, 2025, U.S. District Judge Theodore Chuang—a leftist puppet—blocked Trump’s shutdown plan, whining about “worker rights.” Then, on March 28, 2025, the 4th Circuit allowed some cuts but kept USAID staggering on. Every day these courts stall, your wallet bleeds—$220 per family, year after year. USAID’s flops make America a global laughingstock, and China’s loving it. Think of your family. USAID’s Uganda mess burned $10 million—part of the $220 you lose yearly. That’s $220 that could pay bills or fund your kids’ future, not leftist experiments that backfire. Patriots, we can’t sit still. Our lawsuit’s a monster—alleging 10th Amendment violations, fraud, and more. I’ve beaten federal giants before, but this fight needs millions for lawyers, evidence, and experts. Trump’s counting on us; your family’s counting on us. USAID’s robbing every American taxpayer—$220 a year stolen from your pocket. Let’s hit back hard. For America, Larry Klayman Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

name: Team DPVA
subject: Love isn’t up for debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
We’re fighting for fairness every month of the year

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108894706/549355382/-793144256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzUzOGZhNC04YjQwLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jEEP4dDdnyqP_fXsvTlTOfQpL_M7WifPmhyZ6aQJleI=&emci=acb6f99d-8b40-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=47538fa4-8b40-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=15759664)
---
Happy Pride Month, Derek! This month is a time to celebrate love, joy, and the power of living our lives for ourselves. But it’s also a reminder that our rights didn’t just appear. _They were organized for, marched for, and fought for._ This year, LGBTQ+ Virginians face a Republican ticket that’s openly hostile to those rights. Winsome Earle-Sears even put her opposition to marriage equality in writing. Their GOP movement wants to drag us back to a time when who you love or how you identify could cost you everything. **We won’t stand for that.** Up and down the ballot, Virginia Democrats are committed to protecting LGBTQ+ rights, advancing equity, and building a Commonwealth where everyone — _and we mean everyone_ — is free to thrive. **So this Pride Month, and every other month, we’re not just celebrating our progress._We’re working to protect it._** Thank you for being in this fight with us. clean_body: We’re fighting for fairness every month of the year | Happy Pride Month, Derek! This month is a time to celebrate love, joy, and the power of living our lives for ourselves. But it’s also a reminder that our rights didn’t just appear. They were organized for, marched for, and fought for. This year, LGBTQ+ Virginians face a Republican ticket that’s openly hostile to those rights. Winsome Earle-Sears even put her opposition to marriage equality in writing. Their GOP movement wants to drag us back to a time when who you love or how you identify could cost you everything. We won’t stand for that. Up and down the ballot, Virginia Democrats are committed to protecting LGBTQ+ rights, advancing equity, and building a Commonwealth where everyone — and we mean everyone — is free to thrive. So this Pride Month, and every other month, we’re not just celebrating our progress.We’re working to protect it. Thank you for being in this fight with us. = | ************=************ With gratitude, – Team DPVA [content goes here] Forwarded this email? Rachel Bruno shares a story of courage in the face of government agencies and wrongful accusations. In her book, "Fractured Hope:
A Mother's Fight for Justice" Rachel writes about taking her infant son to the emergency room with a fractured skull.

In the terrifying events that followed, she was falsely accused of child abuse. She and her husband almost had both of their
children taken from them by the foster care system, which is supposed to protect children. They chose to fight and, ultimately,
win. Like, subscribe and share.

Teaching Your Family About America's Founding Faith

What is missing from modern accounts of our nation's history? The faith of our Founding Fathers and the miracles that God
accomplished throughout our history. To any student of history, ignoring the story of faith in America makes no sense; the
founding documents, letters, accounts, and diaries of early Americans are full of expressions of religious faith, prayer, and
miracles.

We're sharing fun ways for you to study America's founding faith with your children.

clean_body: This week, on the Moms for America Podcast, we have an incredible story of one mother's fight for justice when the system turned against her family. If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] June 3, 2025 • Newsletter Fractured Hope: A Mother's Fight for Justice Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] Rachel Bruno shares a story of courage in the face of government agencies and wrongful accusations. In her book, "Fractured Hope: A Mother's Fight for Justice" Rachel writes about taking her infant son to the emergency room with a fractured skull. In the terrifying events that followed, she was falsely accused of child abuse. She and her husband almost had both of their children taken from them by the foster care system, which is supposed to protect children. They chose to fight and, ultimately, win. Like, subscribe and share. View the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] Moms for America Weekly Blog [] [] Teaching Your Family About America's Founding Faith What is missing from modern accounts of our nation's history? The faith of our Founding Fathers and the miracles that God accomplished throughout our history. To any student of history, ignoring the story of faith in America makes no sense; the founding documents, letters, accounts, and diaries of early Americans are full of expressions of religious faith, prayer, and miracles. We're sharing fun ways for you to study America's founding faith with your children. Read the Blog [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® The Mom View [] [] Empowering Conversations Start Here! From parenting to public policy, The MomView delves into the topics that shape our culture, impact our nation and influence our homes, because every issue is a mom issue. name: Ted Cruz
subject: I’m proud to be leading the charge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
Learn more about the game-changing Invest America Act >>>

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9JbnZlc3QtQW1lcmljYS1BY3RfMjAyNTA1MjImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1JbnZlc3QtQW1lcmljYS1BY3QmdXRtX2FnZW5jeT1QRyZhbW91bnQ9NzUmcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUifQ/R6KRuA2MGFCx9iR4V3FN-g)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, For more than a year now, I've been working with a coalition of CEOs and business leaders across the country on a game-changing proposal that will transform lives. It will enhance the financial security and personal freedoms of the American people for generations.

If passed and signed into law, it will be one of our Republican Party's landmark achievements.

Getting the Invest America Act across the finish line is among my top priorities - and if you missed the news, I'm thrilled to report that it has been rolled into the draft reconciliation bill released last week by the House Ways and Means Committee!

**The Invest America Act would create private investment accounts for every American child, seeded with $1,000 when they are a newborn.** Additional contributions can be made by family members and employers, and the money will be tax-deferred.

When these children turn 18, they will have a resource to put to work to pursue higher education, start a business, or buy a home. **[HELP US MAKE HISTORY- LET'S GET THE JOB DONE!](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9JbnZlc3QtQW1lcmljYS1BY3RfMjAyNTA1MjImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1JbnZlc3QtQW1lcmljYS1BY3QmdXRtX2FnZW5jeT1QRyZhbW91bnQ9NzUmcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUifQ/uajbYl8v-em7D3sixSiylQ)** Today, there's a huge percentage of the American people who don't own stocks or bonds, are not interested in the market, and may not feel particularly invested in our free enterprise system.

**The Invest America Act will give everyone a stake - it will enhance economic participation and provide a major boost to help the least privileged escape a life of poverty.**

I'm proud to be leading the charge and I'm grateful for your steadfast support. [**Please pitch in whatever you can**](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9JbnZlc3QtQW1lcmljYS1BY3RfMjAyNTA1MjImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1JbnZlc3QtQW1lcmljYS1BY3QmdXRtX2FnZW5jeT1QRyZhbW91bnQ9NzUmcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUifQ/un8P1tHgPt-e8vU4IgqqhQ) to help us share my message and keep up our momentum.

_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvcGF0cmlja211cnBoeXBhL3Avd2hlcmUtaXMtY29uZ3Jlc3NzLW1vcmFsLWNvdXJhZ2U_.xh0eV5uNq2UGKWEJnxlzD9rEURNixVI4rmsNUdj0uAo?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/patrickmurphypa/p/where-is-congresss-moral-courage?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

In my days as a constitutional law professor at West Point, I'd begin the semester with the analogy that our Constitution is like the game "Rock, paper, scissors."
The purpose being that no branch is more powerful than the other. Each is supposed to keep the others in check. Checks and balances are the genius of American democracy.
But lately, one of those branches has stopped doing its job.
And it's not the president. And it's not the courts.
_It 's Congress._
[Subscribed](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wYXRyaWNrbXVycGh5cGEuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FjY291bnQiLCJwIjoxNjUxMDQ4NDUsInMiOjQzOTkxMzMsImYiOnRydWUsInUiOjkwNTAxMTkyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDg5NjQzNzIsImV4cCI6MTc1MTU1NjM3MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTAiLCJzdWIiOiJsaW5rLXJlZGlyZWN0In0.ZEtZqIZk6xnGGXhubyXaSfEeBGhk0JwYxksPk_cjbIw?)
You see it in the big things: in bills that swell the deficit by trillions while slashing Medicaid for seniors and children. You see it in the small things: in provisions buried in legislation that would allow jury verdicts to be overturned if they go against Donald Trump.
We saw this same dynamic during the Trump administration's tariff debacle. Unilaterally imposed under the guise of executive authority, those tariffs not only stifled economic growth but were repeatedly [challenged by the courts.](https://substack.com/redirect/ebabf921-f3ff-485f-82c4-9146dc2cbfb1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) The [U.S. Court of International Trade ruled that President Trump had overstepped his authority](https://substack.com/redirect/13f53dfc-407d-4003-9a61-56f3ce58b98a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) when issuing baseline tariffs of 10%--and even higher for key allies like Canada and Mexico. That wasn't just bad economics; it was a power grab. And Congress barely flinched.
Now, we're seeing it with higher education.
From the President's vague threats behind revoking student visas of some Palestinian protestors to ending federal funding from Ivy League Universities, he's created an environment of hostility, uncertainty, and fear. The policy is so sweeping and ill-defined that even the Anti-Defamation League--the country's leading organization on antisemitism--has [walked back its initial support.](https://substack.com/redirect/573f7049-430b-404b-b28a-97d0bd81741e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) It's no wonder international students are thinking twice about coming here.
Every year, **international students contribute** more than **$50 billion** to the **U.S. economy**. They fund research. They fill critical STEM jobs. They help keep American universities globally competitive. But after years of hostile immigration policies and political grandstanding, we're watching that pipeline dry up.
According to _USA Today_ , **54% of prospective international students are now less likely to enroll in U.S. universities** this fall. This purge is a form of economic sabotage. This is not just about college campuses. This is about innovation, economic growth, and global standing.
We are turning these students away. Not with a law, but with a signal saying, 'You're not welcome here.' American colleges and universities are already facing stiff headwinds with a demographic cliff - [400K less American high school students will graduate in the next 15 years - a 13% decrease.](https://substack.com/redirect/d909e1c2-933e-46c5-a8cb-5b99c3e0333e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Where is Congress to step in?
The same place it was when tariffs were imposed on our allies under the banner of economic nationalism. The same place it was when the courts had to step in and say: actually, the president doesn't have the authority to unilaterally rewrite trade policy.
The same place it's been for too long: on the sidelines.
Congress isn't broken because it lacks power. It's broken because it doesn't have the moral courage to _use_ the power it has. The founders didn't design the legislative branch to be a fan club. They designed it to be the voice of the people--the place where hard questions get asked, executive overreach gets checked, and laws get made with consensus.
Let me be clear. This isn't about Trump. Or Biden. Or red states or blue ones. This is about something deeper than politics.
The real crisis in American government isn't that one party is too extreme, or that one man has too much power. The real crisis is that the branch of government designed to keep that power in check has lost its backbone.
Instead of acting as the people's voice, Congress has become a rubber stamp.
That's not how this country is supposed to work. And Americans know it.
In recent elections across Pennsylvania--a swing state if there ever was one--voter turnout has surged, especially **in purple districts like[Bucks County](https://substack.com/redirect/fc626bc3-1f37-4507-9ef1-90c00eb79580?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). **The razor-thin results reflect just how divided our country really is. In the 2024 presidential election, over 80% of registered voters in Bucks County turned out, with Donald Trump narrowly winning the county by 291 votes. This marked the first Republican victory there since 1988.**** Independents, who swung for Trump in 2016, Biden in 2020, and Trump in 2024, are breaking away again from Republicans. But not necessarily because they love the Democratic Party. Because they're fed up with both sides' dysfunction and cowardice.
This moment isn't about left versus right. It's about remembering the oath every federal official takes: _to support and defend the Constitution of the United States against all enemies, foreign and domestic._
That doesn't mean posting performative tweets for clout or introducing legislation that's dead on arrival. It means doing the hard, unglamorous work of governing. Asking tough questions. Drawing real red lines. Saying _no_ , even when it's politically inconvenient. When I served in Congress and voted against budgets - when it was President Bush's budget but especially when it was President Obama's budget - I wasn't the most popular member in my party. But I wasn't in Congress to make friends or be invited to fancy cocktail parties - I was there to do my job, look people in the eye and let them know where I stood and rally against immoral deficits my son and daughter (and yours) will have to pay for.
Yes, working with the executive branch is part of the job. But being its doormat is not.
It's easy to blame any president, especially this one. Even the president's former confidant, Elon Musk, has been vocal about his distaste for the bill and Trump's support for a budget that would drastically increase the deficit. It's harder to look at the institution with the power to say "enough," and ask why it never steps up.
We cannot afford a Congress that folds every time because the current president might attack you personally (trust me, he's attacked me by name on Truth Social twice, it's not pleasant, but frankly, a badge of honor). I'd remind my former colleagues that Judgment Day is more important than Election Day.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8a00333a-3d56-402c-b1d9-9c6e2a7c54f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Some of the lovely words President Trump has shared about me.
Thanks for reading! This post is public so feel free to share it.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=165104845&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1MTA0ODQ1LCJpYXQiOjE3NDg5NjQzNzIsImV4cCI6MTc1MTU1NjM3MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQzOTkxMzMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.VGcuBBFoI4AhR0fPt_GPpx3fLcJVZahqYdn5BvH1Jxs)
Because in a system of checks and balances, when one branch fails, the entire system fails with it. And when that happens, it's not just students or scientists or Medicaid recipients who suffer. It's all of us.
So here's my ask, as a former Army officer, as an educator, and as an engaged citizen:
To our representatives--do your job. Not for your party. Not for your base. But for the people who elected you. And for the republic you swore to support and defend.
Do it for the kids who'll be stuck inheriting whatever fragile democracy we leave behind.
It's not too late to remember how our democracy is supposed to work.
But time is running out.
-Patrick
_The Honorable Patrick J. Murphy is a Wharton lecturer, Vetrepreneur, and the 32nd Army Under Secretary after earning the Bronze Star for service in Baghdad, Iraq as an All-American with the 82nd Airborne Division --@PatrickMurphyPA on Instagram and Twitter._
\- _**Honorable Patrick J. Murphy**_

If you're not especially interested in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our reports will be simple to understand. You know that the political and economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic and international matters, both political and financial, so we can help you stay on top of the latest happenings. DISCLAIMER Your privacy is important to us. name: Democrats.org
subject: re: Joni Ernst
body:

Did you see this, Derek? At a town hall in Iowa, Republican Senator Joni Ernst responded to her constituents’ concerns about Iowans suffering due to Medicaid and SNAP cuts in Trump and Senate Republicans’ budget bill by saying, “Well, we all are going to die.” [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-ia-split?refcode=em_20250603_3625_fr&amount=10&refcode2=3634_22930333_qHeQxD&akid=3634%2E22930333%2EqHeQxD) Under Chair Ken Martin, the DNC is competing _everywhere_ — including in states like Iowa, where Joni Ernst is on the ballot in the midterms. name: Sean Feucht
subject: Testimony Tuesday!
body:
God Is moving in Gen-Z!| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=89dc27afcad443dba272e5f96d8893d4&_e=kVe5o_gXV2_9G8mOGBozqYmAddQ2RXoBXZtG-vjtivWyrvqbZblZuJjx2H6zuZGdxdA1YEtD0SSCuMU3Hmw4S0ygyFEdftWK9XEIaEwKtS-QarclGqORwg85_HDxcnJkuwrAauzMpIFA-xdO1ZUoXfNZBOt108RGmlBNBatYEur52_oHgj-Os4RcVN1nRr9RuovowO808T402A63xrGEUigcOOkcdjIS6yU2ZOiFK6UCA3WTS3xvMbphpWwVV9JqgiVCgIRkhnQPuZpvb2Skcw1oYzoFgWPJuQNHuFCARIPTi8osbObtHuHiOHVBL48jL5Xl2B1u5fsLLeq4iBfLcA%3D%3D)
---
Dear Peter,
---
Gen-Z for Jesus! We've seen the Lord work in the hearts of young people in ways that didn't seem possible! He is raising up a new generation of leaders to carry the mantle and advance the Gospel further than ever before!

This photo came to us on Instagram, and it filled us with joy, hope, and a renewed faith in Gen-Z! Believers are pouring into Gen-Z and the Lord is breaking off spirits of addiction, self-harm, and depression. These are the seeds that we get to sow every week, not knowing how the fruit will bloom, but expectant to hear stories in heaven!
---
| | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=89dc27afcad443dba272e5f96d8893d4&_e=kVe5o_gXV2_9G8mOGBozqYmAddQ2RXoBXZtG-vjtivWyrvqbZblZuJjx2H6zuZGdxdA1YEtD0SSCuMU3Hmw4S0ygyFEdftWK9XEIaEwKtS-QarclGqORwg85_HDxcnJkuwrAauzMpIFA-xdO1ZUoXfNZBOt108RGmlBNBatYEurt0GsDuEGAyQgMAI5LkjT3_H3KG6CLIXEzZki1nDviArDd_pMTChDXKXamZ8PD9VGm8Ix2Rjz_zbxN3u3Zd_0o28hFZlU5_ZOWbq34PlcxFMV9knPZOYRx5zRgJ0yqSn0a3z9ymE6M6AlORd08_ggzCa8nmHUll-pT8Oza8y1-UQ%3D%3D)
---
| | As a reminder, we have not one, but TWO, incredible events this week. On Friday at 7PM, we're **[**celebrating FIVE YEARS of Let Us Worship**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=89dc27afcad443dba272e5f96d8893d4&_e=kVe5o_gXV2_9G8mOGBozqYmAddQ2RXoBXZtG-vjtivXIvF2AVmr2U87roif_ODyGxAYwbWYWhcquPfyhVZIRtaWZHMW7VEgK4cV_zv5vZ4sBmYdkNQaxWSoCmi8H2vVNZZunk4KeRgPVx-UGy64Un7dOZX_VcdZ91ZJL4cFMUT3qjGxAo-AMynY6dp-18P7ojBRC1Z7xWUKBlhzbt2Orhe1Z-MTJqT6Bh9aeBT9qkJKUx4GPOuUgOt--ZZlGcZjqyS5qF5cxvqZ2mBoj2vsfQTtw_va6i0e42vhOF1PEICH-_qrsEObMQ_hY70olKkcmnIc1o6tm2WaJH42eQG_I-A%3D%3D)** on the Rooftop of Fearless Church (1611 S Hope St. Los Angeles Downtown, CA). body:

You need to know this.
Democrats only need to flip [THREE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108899996/549365866/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250603_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzk1Y2EyMi04YzQwLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wmYudOiPmTn--QjELCx_QmB8TwhALcwSPbP2zJrK3qE=) seats in the House to TAKE BACK our Majority.
And a brand new poll shows that Democrats have come from behind and taken a narrow [ONE-POINT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108899997/549365867/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250603_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzk1Y2EyMi04YzQwLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wmYudOiPmTn--QjELCx_QmB8TwhALcwSPbP2zJrK3qE=) lead.
But House Republicans are outraising Democrats by almost [DOUBLE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108899998/549365868/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250603_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzk1Y2EyMi04YzQwLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wmYudOiPmTn--QjELCx_QmB8TwhALcwSPbP2zJrK3qE=) in vital battleground races that will decide the majority in the House.
[I’ll be blunt: If we don’t close this fundraising gap ASAP, Democrats may lose our chance of flipping the House and putting a LEGISLATIVE BLOCK on Donald Trump’s extremist MAGA agenda.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108899999/549365869/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250603_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzk1Y2EyMi04YzQwLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wmYudOiPmTn--QjELCx_QmB8TwhALcwSPbP2zJrK3qE=)
[_So, I’m reaching out to my top supporters to rally an unprecedented surge of grassroots support and ensure that every single Democrat has what they need to WIN. Far-right Republicans are rushing MILLIONS to try to salvage their House Majority and keep empowering Trump’s lawlessness. But I refuse to let them get away with it. name: Niki Conforti
subject: Exciting News!
body:
Exciting News! | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9d6e1635879b/conforti-for-congress-10609495?e=25f4fa3311)
---
| | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,

It is with humility and excitement that I am reaching out to say I will be running for U.S. House IL-06 in the 2025-2026 election against Sean Casten.

As the top Republican vote-getter across Illinois, out-performing all 14 challenged congressional races in the 2024 election, we are building on our past successes and carrying our strong momentum forward to win in 2026!

We are in a fight here in our community - and in WDC, and**I need your help**!

Please consider a contribution to help us come out strong against Casten, and his liberal policies that are driving our taxes higher and making our communities less safe.

Thank you for your leadership and strong consideration to invest in my campaign by clicking the button below.

[](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=b12c056745&e=25f4fa3311)

Your support is greatly appreciated.
Don't stop believing in what we can achieve when we work together!
---
| Thank you,

Niki Conforti
Candidate
Illinois 6th Congressional District
---
| PS: Follow my campaign on [Facebook](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=c0e27a2e11&e=25f4fa3311), [Twitter](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=3bed8cbaf4&e=25f4fa3311), and [Instagram](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=a8969b801f&e=25f4fa3311)!

[Supreme Court takes on a GOP challenge to mail-in voting](https://substack.com/redirect/71eb3698-76a0-4764-9f7e-0c82e55cfee1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via Axios
[Trump Tells Congress Just How Much To Slash Budget As GOP Lawmakers Revolt Ahead Of Shutdown Showdown](https://substack.com/redirect/fa1718ad-dc3a-4948-a1ae-c55032e67863?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via Daily Caller
[Senior DOJ Officials Didn't Know Database Allowed FBI To Bury Existence Of Russiagate Documents](https://substack.com/redirect/1c4bfc92-d244-4cc6-a5d6-7e331d57f1d9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via The Federalist

## This week on The Sean Spicer Show...
You're not gonna want to miss this week. Today, we've got our friend Seb Gorka from the White House National Security Council to update us on how the Administration is keeping is safe. Then tomorrow, Representative Andy Harris AND Rep Jim Jordan-- of the House Freedom Caucus -- give their take on the Big Beautiful Bill on Wednesday. Plus, tune in Thursday for our panel with Tim Graham, author Elsa Kurt, and National Review's Caroline Downey. I don't want to give it away -- but let's just a say there is going to be a suprise "guest." Then, to top it all off, I'll be talking with James Blair, Deputy Chief of Staff at the White House for a great Friday show. Make sure you subscribe and hit the notification button.
[Subscribe here!](https://substack.com/redirect/41ae370c-72d8-4e00-b41a-34b64cf8f38f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## The media's dirty laundry....
Have you noticed a double standard when it comes to the mainstream media?
You're not alone.
I've spent most of my career either around or directly involved in news media, and let's be honest, there's always been a bit of a leftist tilt to most major news organizations.
But for the most part it was tolerable -- a little bias here, a bad angle there -- nothing a smart listener couldn't see right through.
That was before 2016.
One of the many things that Trump has done is pull the curtain back on the corrupt media machine.
Russia-gate, the Hunter laptop story, Biden's decline, the list goes on.
These outlets aren't doing their job, plain and simple.
But now that Trump is calling their bluff -- using the legal system -- and he's the bad guy?
Let's break it down...

subject: I’m now forced to say it

body:
........................

---
Friend,
---
All of my life, those closest to me – and even those who only knew me from politics – have known me to be a _helper_.
---
I helped take down the mob in New York...
---
I helped unify our city and our country as America’s mayor after tragedy struck on September 11th...
---
I helped keep our streets and our citizens safe... **
---
And I helped successfully defend President Trump from one of the Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable.
---
Those were the headlines that defined me to so many Americans like _YOU_.
---
But over the last year, I’ve instead woken up in the mornings to headlines like these:
---

**_“Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...”_**
_[MSNBC]_

**_“Giuliani bankruptcy case dismissed, opening door to creditors pursuing collection”_**
_[CNBC]_

**_“Giuliani Disbarred from the Practice of Law in New York” _**
_[New York Times]_

---
**And sadly, as I stare down the Democrats’ _FINAL_ sham indictment against me, I am now the one forced to ask _you_ to help _me_. **
---
That’s truly something I NEVER wanted to have to say, Friend...
---
_Asking for help as opposed to offering it unsettles me to my core._
---
But I hope you understand that you truly are my FINAL HOPE.
---
_**Right now in Arizona, the Democrat Attorney General is seeking to use a _state-level_ charge that President Trump cannot pardon in order to throw me in prison until I’m 100 years old!** _
---
My crime? Refusing to forsake the TRUTH and standing by the side of my dear friend and our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump.
---
_And the punishment the Left wants in return? My personal, professional, and financial ruin along with me taking my last breath in a prison cell!_
---
Make no mistake, if we can’t beat this sham case here and now, if we fail to secure true justice and my ultimate vindication, then this scheme of the Left’s can be used against every last red-blooded patriot as the Deep State’s bulletproof measure to TAKE DOWN their political enemies.
---
And the _ONLY_ way to defeat a regime like the Deep State is to **NEVER,_EVER_ SURRENDER** to it.
---
_...Just ask President Trump!_
---
The Democrats unjustly filed my MUGSHOT under **booking # 2313757.**
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z003i5nu2jbfkvth5bifgd3l7cbfkjckcbh05758_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge0o71chh2bs)
__
---
_So, to show these left-wing crooks that good and honest Americans like _YOU_ will also never surrender as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise **$231,375.70** for my Legal Defense Trust to win this last fight for my freedom and justice. _

He led the impeachment efforts after January 6. He stood firm against lies, conspiracy, and corruption. And now, he’s calling on all of us to rise to the moment.

The stakes couldn’t be higher. If we let this pass, we let Trump escape accountability again, and we risk allowing lawlessness at the highest level of power.

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: Trump is weaponizing the DOJ, and Democrats like YOU are the target. This is an EMERGENCY!!!
body:
This isn’t politics as usual. This is an authoritarian move to choke off Democratic fundraising and silence our movement. Chip in IMMEDIATELY - we need an overwhelming response to show we won't be intimidated by Trump and his rogue Department of Justice. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=060325_1]
Donald Trump has launched a full-scale attack on the backbone of our movement — it’s crucial that we respond IMMEDIATELY.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=060325_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=060325_1]
In a chilling abuse of power, Trump signed an Executive Order instructing his Department of Justice to investigate and target ActBlue — the trusted platform used by millions of Democrats to donate to campaigns, causes, and candidates across the country.
This is not a hypothetical.
This is not symbolic.
This is the sitting president of the United States trying to shut down the Democratic Party’s ability to fund itself.
That’s not democracy — that’s authoritarianism.
We need to raise a massive wave of grassroots donations TODAY to defend ActBlue, defend our candidates, and defend democracy itself. 👉 Rush a donation right now to fight back before it’s too late: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=060325_1]

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: What an honor to welcome President Trump
body:
What an honor to welcome President DONALD TRUMP as the keynote speaker at Turning Point’s AMERICAFEST, the biggest and boldest celebration of our country and our freedoms!

| | | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zr6agpi9et1p08jh7l159hjbl6uvlqa9bs0cbivo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge8pr4c9h2bs)
---
Friend, What an honor to welcome President DONALD TRUMP as the keynote speaker at Turning Point’s AMERICAFEST, the biggest and boldest celebration of our country and our freedoms! Friend, thanks to YOU, thousands of young people have been inspired by the President’s message of FREEDOM, PATRIOTISM, and AMERICAN GREATNESS... **...and the Turning Point Generation –– as I call these high school and college students –– are leading MASSIVE GENERATIONAL CHANGE among young people.**
---
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zqngcpt1fer4ktfmkgle01nadkd7rq691apcco6o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge8pr4c9h2bs)
---
To celebrate this PRO-AMERICA MOMENTUM, I wanted to send you a LIMITED EDITION “47” hat to honor our 47th president: DONALD TRUMP. _**[_**All I ask for in return is a gift of ANY amount to help Turning Point USA inspire MILLIONS MORE kids to LOVE AMERICA again in the year ahead!**_](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zob5deu5m7bage41e60mg36ftfh8r0g82bfaomv0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge8pr4c9h2bs)**_
---
[ **Make your gift & claim your “47” hat!**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z1nectb64qb534163d6vh41bkqvchtfto1dbsneg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge8pr4c9h2bs)
---
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zjp9qgrl1fhpifpoggqqsa1rndsflnjtu6h7snbg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge8pr4c9h2bs)
---
Thanks to generous patriots like YOU, Turning Point USA:
* **Leads the BIGGEST and MOST IMPACTFUL patriotic student movement** in American history, with 820,000+ student activists in ALL 50 states,

* **Reaches nearly EVERY smartphone and computer in our country with POWERFUL, PRO-AMERICA content** –– as only Turning Point USA can go HEAD-TO-HEAD with the Fake News Media in online reach, AND

* **Continues to INSPIRE millions of kids to LOVE AMERICA again** , with a MASSIVE SWING in favor of conservative principles among young people under age 25!

But while we’re seeing MAJOR WINS every day ... we must keep up our momentum until we TOTALLY WIN the American Culture War against the “Woke” Left! _**[Please, Friend, make your gift of any amount today to help Turning Point USA make MILLIONS MORE kids LOVE AMERICA again, and I’ll send YOU a limited-edition “47” hat as my personal thanks.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zrss8hp69i00bhl3fc7h1obrs5ho1gf913fnug9o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge8pr4c9h2bs)**_
---
[ **Make your gift & claim your “47” hat!**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zeabdjsmrap193sc74gu6q6fj1flood3gpc1tnrg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge8pr4c9h2bs)
---
Thank YOU for your patriotism, moral courage, and generous support of the 820,000+ America-loving young people of Turning Point USA. Working together, I know we will totally defeat the “Woke” Left to WIN the American Culture War and restore PATRIOTISM and FREEDOM as our country’s way of life again! Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA
---
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z53mftt51dngpb51g72kattcl784pcis6fsmmcd8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge8pr4c9h2bs)
---

subject: The Democrats shared their secret plan >>
body:

---
Friend,
---
All of my life, those closest to me – and even those who only knew me from politics – have known me to be a _helper_.
---
I helped take down the mob in New York...
---
I helped unify our city and our country as America’s mayor after tragedy struck on September 11th...
---
I helped keep our streets and our citizens safe... **
---
And I helped successfully defend President Trump from one of the Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable.
---
Those were the headlines that defined me to so many Americans like _YOU_.
---
But over the last year, I’ve instead woken up in the mornings to headlines like these:
---

**_“Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...”_**
_[MSNBC]_

**_“Giuliani bankruptcy case dismissed, opening door to creditors pursuing collection”_**
_[CNBC]_

**_“Giuliani Disbarred from the Practice of Law in New York” _**
_[New York Times]_

---
**And sadly, as I stare down the Democrats’ _FINAL_ sham indictment against me, I am now the one forced to ask _you_ to help _me_. **
---
That’s truly something I NEVER wanted to have to say, Friend...
---
_Asking for help as opposed to offering it unsettles me to my core._
---
But I hope you understand that you truly are my FINAL HOPE.
---
_**Right now in Arizona, the Democrat Attorney General is seeking to use a _state-level_ charge that President Trump cannot pardon in order to throw me in prison until I’m 100 years old!** _
---
My crime? Refusing to forsake the TRUTH and standing by the side of my dear friend and our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump.
---
_And the punishment the Left wants in return? My personal, professional, and financial ruin along with me taking my last breath in a prison cell!_
---
Make no mistake, if we can’t beat this sham case here and now, if we fail to secure true justice and my ultimate vindication, then this scheme of the Left’s can be used against every last red-blooded patriot as the Deep State’s bulletproof measure to TAKE DOWN their political enemies.
---
And the _ONLY_ way to defeat a regime like the Deep State is to **NEVER,_EVER_ SURRENDER** to it.
---
_...Just ask President Trump!_
---
The Democrats unjustly filed my MUGSHOT under **booking # 2313757.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmpts03752o1sj9isnvuhke6uqb2ibvmr9930g8g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge8pr2chh2bs)
__
---
_So, to show these left-wing crooks that good and honest Americans like _YOU_ will also never surrender as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise **$231,375.70** for my Legal Defense Trust to win this last fight for my freedom and justice. _

Back in the mid-1990s, when I was teaching at Mankato West High School, a group of students asked me if I’d help them start the school’s first gay-straight alliance.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108904327/549379107/21732355?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGE5MmI1YS05NzQwLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RzJ7M2V9ULnz1uvsNcguanVVlPPtFw1nW76cnLCwirc=)
---
Peter,
Back in the mid-1990s, when I was teaching at Mankato West High School, a group of students asked me if I’d help them start the school’s first gay-straight alliance.
They were concerned about anti-LGBTQ bullying and wanted to create a safe, supportive space for everyone.
My answer? _Absolutely._
As a teacher, it was my responsibility to ensure every student felt safe and free to be themselves.
I think about that moment often during Pride Month.
We’ve come a long way since then. But today, Trump and his MAGA allies are doing everything they can to turn back the clock. We can’t let that happen.
Love has only ever won because people like you and me have fought for it.
The work isn’t done until everyone—regardless of who they are or who they love—can live freely and equally. And I won’t stop fighting until that future is real.
Happy Pride,
Tim Walz

| | Peter,Communities across America remain overwhelmed by millions of illegal aliens President Biden waved across the border. The biased media keeps flooding our airwaves with open borders propaganda.And billionaires like George Soros are propping up Leftist NGOS, radical activists, and political puppets to advance the globalist, anti-American agenda of the oligarchs.They want to keep all of Biden’s illegal aliens in this country and turn America into a socialist “Open Society.” For the past fifty years, they’ve undermined American workers, American culture, and the American Dream...But I’m not writing today just to tell you about how open borders have hurt hard-working Americans.You already know that. I’m writing to tell you about the organization that is poised to put the screws to these open borders politicians and reshape the entire public discussion around immigration.That organization is **[**NumbersUSA.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=44fa37921bc047c3ab2402c0286c7dc1&_e=XuJ0rvkCUiLr_i1PVW29CJ3_Zi4qiXZ02agDo72K0ICpzdvBMAzzHHgpkMe2hP95I0G7SeatYfdqETrEw-Rv8JOKTqt5gjMPKrHATmTjNUCt6dPKbgsXIbC12yhJy7yRMD3gS3pf2OlLJkbkc0oCRmcQYnBY0nOXt_-5ZvKJLe5LBCkiA2fXMspVVSjQOCoqD0qgE42Nyxt27vaVHamS991FJXxSgTT_kGuWHKuUP3pras1NPcz9QagaM-_CDdkwQEOqYn-RgDmYgN_i6ZKsCnvHwpNWhXKuAz1g9-Ur5r-E_H4h4NkDM_sJSmePeiZMSE-vBQApHOW9YS-MfpL0wgpU7FNJVFXTv3FTzsj-IKCgSNa3mYGHZKjwJcoBCkL8)** You may not have heard of them before, but since I took office in 2013, I’ve seen time after time how powerful they are in exerting public pressure on wishy-washy politicians.**NumbersUSA** harnesses the power of over 8 million grassroots members all focused on one issue: immigration.They are the voice on Capitol Hill for an America-first immigration agenda.And they grade every member of Congress to show who truly puts America first on immigration and who just talks a big game on the campaign trail. I’m honored that, after twelve years of service, **NumbersUSA** calculates I’ve earned an “A” on my career immigration report card. This sort of pressure and public accountability are vital if we want to execute President Trump’s immigration agenda. You see, many of my colleagues don’t have deeply held convictions like you, me, and President Trump.They just go whichever way the political winds blow.That’s why the Radical Left has dominated this issue from as far back as I can remember. They’ve outraised us...They’ve outspent us...And then they’ve strong-armed spineless officials into selling out the American people.Frankly, if we want to take our country back, we need **NumbersUSA** to rally American patriots from across our great land. That’s why I wanted to drop in this little note today to accompany the letter from Roy Beck, the founder of **NumbersUSA**.He’ll tell you all about the wonderful work they’re doing, and I’d ask you to consider supporting them however you see fit. We have a narrow window to make a difference, and we need your help now more than ever. God Bless you and God Bless America!
---
**Senator Ted Cruz** for **NumbersUSA**

low-level judges are saying, Birthright Citizenship for tourists and illegal aliens is not written into the Constitution.Rather, the 14th Amendment that contains Birthright Citizenship was enacted to grant full citizenship to the slaves freed by Abraham Lincoln — along with their children and their children’s children. It was not meant to apply to foreign visitors...**And it was _definitely not_ for illegal aliens.**In fact, the text of the 14th Amendment clearly states that it only applies to “persons born or naturalized in the United States, **_AND_** subject to the jurisdiction thereof.” But over time, government bureaucrats stretched the 14th Amendment and automatically gave U.S. citizenship to every birth to illegal aliens, and even to foreign nationals vacationing in the United States.Now, the situation has gotten completely out of hand...**In 2023 alone, there were roughly 350,000 births to illegal aliens in the U.S. Tourists gave birth to another 40,000.** These so-called “anchor babies” can keep illegal alien parents from getting deported and give a legal basis for a whole chain of migrants to push their way into America.Is it any surprise that human traffickers and even high-end birth tourism companies are making billions of dollars?This is not by accident – it’s by design. In fact, the Obama State Department changed U.S. visa rules to explicitly allow women to travel to America for the purpose of giving birth in 2015!Thankfully, the Trump administration overturned this rule and pushed back on illegal immigration on a number of fronts.**_But Trump can’t do it alone._**

**Fortunately, grassroots organizing is what NumbersUSA does best.** Over the past thirty years, we’ve grown from a small staff into the largest single-issue advocacy group in the United States.Back in 1996, we pioneered the tactic of masses of grassroots voters faxing elected officials directly. In 2007, when Ted Kennedy (remember him?) was trying to grant amnesty to millions of illegal aliens, NumbersUSA mobilized citizens in such numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard.The New York Times “blamed” NumbersUSA as the key factor in blocking Kennedy’s decades-long mass amnesty dream.It was a real David-and-Goliath struggle, and we won. Fast forward to 2025, and our populist immigration position is gaining traction in Washington.The DC power brokers are now calling us when they need to mobilize America-First patriots across the country.To be clear, that’s not because they want to talk to me, Roy Beck. It’s because they know that NumbersUSA is the connection point for 8 million members who understand how our immigration system is utterly broken......and what it will take to fix it.We’ve never had a President like Donald Trump who gets this issue on such a visceral level. But it takes more than just one man to reverse this open borders insanity. He needs a lot of congressional action to back him up and to make improvements permanent.**In our decades on Capitol Hill, we have learned that nothing grabs attention like fired-up American patriots just like you.** And there’s no denying the impact when a mountain of responses pours in from across the country.It proves that the immigration action we’re calling for isn’t just coming from me, or the great folks at NumbersUSA, or even Senator Ted Cruz—**no, it’s the unmistakable _DEMAND _of the American people.**And at that point, a politician doesn’t need one ounce of courage. clean_body: Obama State Department changed U.S. visa rules| | | | | | | | Peter,Communities across America remain overwhelmed by millions of illegal aliens President Biden waved across the border. The biased media keeps flooding our airwaves with open borders propaganda.And billionaires like George Soros are propping up Leftist NGOS, radical activists, and political puppets to advance the globalist, anti-American agenda of the oligarchs.They want to keep all of Biden’s illegal aliens in this country and turn America into a socialist “Open Society.” For the past fifty years, they’ve undermined American workers, American culture, and the American Dream...But I’m not writing today just to tell you about how open borders have hurt hard-working Americans.You already know that. I’m writing to tell you about the organization that is poised to put the screws to these open borders politicians and reshape the entire public discussion around immigration.That organization is You may not have heard of them before, but since I took office in 2013, I’ve seen time after time how powerful they are in exerting public pressure on wishy-washy politicians.NumbersUSA harnesses the power of over 8 million grassroots members all focused on one issue: immigration.They are the voice on Capitol Hill for an America-first immigration agenda.And they grade every member of Congress to show who truly puts America first on immigration and who just talks a big game on the campaign trail. I’m honored that, after twelve years of service, NumbersUSA calculates I’ve earned an “A” on my career immigration report card. This sort of pressure and public accountability are vital if we want to execute President Trump’s immigration agenda. You see, many of my colleagues don’t have deeply held convictions like you, me, and President Trump.They just go whichever way the political winds blow.That’s why the Radical Left has dominated this issue from as far back as I can remember. They’ve outraised us...They’ve outspent us...And then they’ve strong-armed spineless officials into selling out the American people.Frankly, if we want to take our country back, we need NumbersUSA to rally American patriots from across our great land. That’s why I wanted to drop in this little note today to accompany the letter from Roy Beck, the founder of NumbersUSA.He’ll tell you all about the wonderful work they’re doing, and I’d ask you to consider supporting them however you see fit. We have a narrow window to make a difference, and we need your help now more than ever. God Bless you and God Bless America! Senator Ted Cruz for NumbersUSA P.S. Roy’s email to you is included below. It will help explain how we can fix our national embarrassment of an immigration system. This couldn’t be coming at a more critical moment, so please read it and | | | Begin Forwarded Message:From : Roy Beck, NumbersUSA My Fellow Fighter, I’m writing to you today because I believe you’re an America First Patriot who’s sick of the open borders madness. And that’s exactly who I’m hoping to reach with my Birthright Citizenship Survey. "" We’re launching a nationwide campaign to educate and activate American patriots on the real intention of Birthright Citizenship......and the real disaster it has become for American workers and American citizens.As Ted Cruz says, "politicians go wherever the wind blows." So if you want action on immigration in this session of Congress, Senator Cruz needs your help to rally the troops and put pressure on his colleagues. "" Despite what the mainstream media and too many low-level judges are saying, Birthright Citizenship for tourists and illegal aliens is not written into the Constitution.Rather, the 14th Amendment that contains Birthright Citizenship was enacted to grant full citizenship to the slaves freed by Abraham Lincoln — along with their children and their children’s children. It was not meant to apply to foreign visitors...And it was definitely not for illegal aliens.In fact, the text of the 14th Amendment clearly states that it only applies to “persons born or naturalized in the United States, AND subject to the jurisdiction thereof.” But over time, government bureaucrats stretched the 14th Amendment and automatically gave U.S. citizenship to every birth to illegal aliens, and even to foreign nationals vacationing in the United States.Now, the situation has gotten completely out of hand...In 2023 alone, there were roughly 350,000 births to illegal aliens in the U.S. Tourists gave birth to another 40,000. These so-called “anchor babies” can keep illegal alien parents from getting deported and give a legal basis for a whole chain of migrants to push their way into America.Is it any surprise that human traffickers and even high-end birth tourism companies are making billions of dollars?This is not by accident – it’s by design. In fact, the Obama State Department changed U.S. visa rules to explicitly allow women to travel to America for the purpose of giving birth in 2015!Thankfully, the Trump administration overturned this rule and pushed back on illegal immigration on a number of fronts.But Trump can’t do it alone. Fortunately, grassroots organizing is what NumbersUSA does best. Over the past thirty years, we’ve grown from a small staff into the largest single-issue advocacy group in the United States.Back in 1996, we pioneered the tactic of masses of grassroots voters faxing elected officials directly. In 2007, when Ted Kennedy (remember him?) was trying to grant amnesty to millions of illegal aliens, NumbersUSA mobilized citizens in such numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard.The New York Times “blamed” NumbersUSA as the key factor in blocking Kennedy’s decades-long mass amnesty dream.It was a real David-and-Goliath struggle, and we won. Fast forward to 2025, and our populist immigration position is gaining traction in Washington.The DC power brokers are now calling us when they need to mobilize America-First patriots across the country.To be clear, that’s not because they want to talk to me, Roy Beck. It’s because they know that NumbersUSA is the connection point for 8 million members who understand how our immigration system is utterly broken......and what it will take to fix it.We’ve never had a President like Donald Trump who gets this issue on such a visceral level. But it takes more than just one man to reverse this open borders insanity. He needs a lot of congressional action to back him up and to make improvements permanent.In our decades on Capitol Hill, we have learned that nothing grabs attention like fired-up American patriots just like you. And there’s no denying the impact when a mountain of responses pours in from across the country.It proves that the immigration action we’re calling for isn’t just coming from me, or the great folks at NumbersUSA, or even Senator Ted Cruz—no, it’s the unmistakable DEMAND of the American people.And at that point, a politician doesn’t need one ounce of courage. Just a pinch of common sense will be enough to realize that voting against the American people is a “one-way ticket to Palookaville.”That’s how you take a nationwide network of Patriots and turn it into victories at the ballot box, in Congress, and for generations of Americans to come.That’s what NumbersUSA is all about. We have the experience, we have the playbook, but we need your help to execute on Birthright Citizenship and many other key immigration issues.Since we don’t take a penny from dark money, corrupt NGOs, or the government, we rely on patriots just like you to transform our vision into concrete action. "" If you can’t make a larger donation at this time, I hope you’ll just cover the cost to process your survey—$3.91. We’ve run enough of these campaigns on Capitol Hill to know that it takes a veritable army of American patriots to get through to these elected officials.And the only way to assemble an army is with a call that goes out all across the nation. "" Thank you and God bless you today! | | Roy Beck Founder and PresidentNumbersUSA | | | P.S. I need to hear what you’re seeing where you are — and how you’re thinking about Birthright Citizenship and immigration as a whole. ---

Thank you,

Congressman Zach Nunn

_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

name: Tracey Mann
subject: The Work is Far From Over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mann for Congress, Inc
body:
Help us deliver for President Trump and the American People. | | |
---
| |
---
| **Dear Kansan,**

I don’t need to tell you—** _America is finally getting back on track_** , and that’s thanks to the bold, decisive leadership of President Donald J. Trump.

After four painful years under Joe Biden’s failed presidency, the American people made their voices heard — and now, with President Trump back in the White House, we are witnessing the return of strength, prosperity, and common sense in Washington.
_**Our border is dramatically more secure and illegal border crossings have plummeted to record lows. The wall is being finished, and law enforcement finally has a Commander-in-Chief who has their back.

Inflation is dropping. The Federal bureaucracy is being cut. President Trump’s pro-growth agenda is bringing jobs and investment back to American communities.

American energy dominance is returning. Needless regulations are being rolled back, and our nation is no longer being held hostage by foreign oil.**_
**_President Trump is doing exactly what he promised: putting America First, defending our values, and restoring respect for our Constitution at home and abroad_****.**

But the work is far from over.

The Left is already working overtime to obstruct President Trump’s agenda and undo the progress we’ve made. We need strong, conservative allies in Congress who will stand with the President and keep fighting to protect our freedoms and our future.

That’s why I’m asking you to join me in this fight. With your support, we can secure the Trump agenda, hold the line against the radical Left, and ensure a safer, freer, and more prosperous America for the next generation.
**_Will you chip in before the end of the month to help us deliver for President Trump and the American people_****?**

You can ([Click Here](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=3a1823313a&e=a9d1410029)) or visit my website at [www.traceymann.com](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=1329b2dea2&e=a9d1410029) to learn more or contribute online.

**Together, we are making America great again—and this time, we’re finishing the job.**

**Yours in the fight,**
**Tracey Mann**
**P.S.** I do not serve in Congress to be a caretaker in the slow demise of America. I serve to fight and work to make our country stronger. With President Trump back in the White House, we have a real chance to do just that. Please donate today ([Click Here](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=40cbe92d58&e=a9d1410029)) to join us in the fight.

By law, the maximum amount an individual may contribute is $7,000 ($14,000 per couple) per election cycle ($3,500 toward each of the 2026 primary and general elections).

Federal multi-candidate PACs may contribute $5,000 per election. Federal law prohibits corporate and foreign national contributions. Contributions from labor unions, federal-government contractors, national banks, and foreign nationals without permanent residency status are prohibited.

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Jimmy Kimmel
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Hi, it’s Gabby Giffords. I wanted to make sure you saw this message from Jimmy Kimmel.
As I write this, Republicans in Congress are trying to pass a bill to make gun silencers even easier to obtain. This comes right as the Trump admin sided with a far-right group to effectively legalize machine guns.
Let me be clear: The only people who benefit from these actions are criminals and the corporations selling these devices. _It’s shameful, which is why we cannot stop fighting._
[**I hope you’ll read Jimmy’s message below, then rush a donation to help GIFFORDS PAC continue this work.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june25.m4W6Vr&refcode=em250603-1-b&t=1&akid=10538%2E3935704%2E0WiltR)

_\---------- Begin forwarded message ---------
From: Jimmy Kimmel
Subject Will you support my friends at GIFFORDS PAC today?
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com _
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june25.m4W6Vr&refcode=em250603-1-b&t=2&akid=10538%2E3935704%2E0WiltR)
---
Hi there, Jimmy Kimmel here.
I know you’re used to seeing me on your TV screen, but today I’m reaching out to you about an important topic close to my heart: _ending America’s gun violence crisis._
Gun violence isn’t always in the headlines, and it can be far too easy for us to go about our daily lives and forget that it’s happening each and every day. But for the families who now have empty seats at their dinner table -- like the families who lost a child in Newtown, Parkland, or Uvalde -- they can never, ever forget.
[**GIFFORDS is doing lifesaving work at the forefront of the gun safety movement, and I'm proud to be an ambassador for this incredible organization. Will you join me today in supporting GIFFORDS PAC by making a contribution to support their crucial work?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june25.m4W6Vr&refcode=em250603-1-b&t=3&akid=10538%2E3935704%2E0WiltR)
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june25.m4W6Vr&refcode=em250603-1-b&t=4&akid=10538%2E3935704%2E0WiltR)**
Gun violence is a uniquely American epidemic. The leading cause of death for children in our nation is gun violence.
This is the only developed country in the world where this happens. We have to do something to change this.
Laws such as universal background checks, safe storage laws, and extreme risk protection orders would help ensure that guns can’t fall into the hands of people who shouldn’t have access to them. We call these laws common sense because that’s just what they are -- common sense.
It is long past time for our representatives to do their job and truly represent the American people. The majority of Americans support commonsense gun safety legislation._**But instead, the Trump administration is focused on making guns *even easier* to buy and lining the pockets of his gun lobby allies.**_
[**This is not a moment where we can sit back. We must be loud and use our collective voice to make a change. So please, will you make a commitment to ending our nation’s gun violence crisis by donating $3 to my friends at GIFFORDS PAC today? Your support at this moment is crucial:**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june25.m4W6Vr&refcode=em250603-1-b&t=5&akid=10538%2E3935704%2E0WiltR)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-june25.CEhNxI&amount=3&refcode=em250603-1-b&t=24&akid=10538%2E3935704%2E0WiltR)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-june25.zYHkRG&refcode=em250603-1-b&t=25&akid=10538%2E3935704%2E0WiltR)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-june25.kO3487&refcode=em250603-1-b&t=26&akid=10538%2E3935704%2E0WiltR)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-june25.YBJ-OM&refcode=em250603-1-b&t=27&akid=10538%2E3935704%2E0WiltR)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-june25.p6AJDp&refcode=em250603-1-b&t=28&akid=10538%2E3935704%2E0WiltR)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-june25.CEhNxI&refcode=em250603-1-b&t=29&akid=10538%2E3935704%2E0WiltR)**
---
****
Thanks for standing with me and the GIFFORDS team today. Your support is crucial to our ongoing fight to end gun violence.
\- Jimmy Kimmel
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june25.m4W6Vr&refcode=em250603-1-b&t=30&akid=10538%2E3935704%2E0WiltR)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=31&akid=10538%2E3935704%2E0WiltR) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Rick Larsen
subject: 15 local projects in Northwest Washington:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
Last month, I requested nearly $37 million dollars for fifteen local projects in the Fiscal Year 2026 spending bill.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108906590/549385953/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTlkNDljYi05YjQwLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=20QWfS1mt6HJa7oQo2T-gA7MyL2ZehmaO6f6xnFuUlg=&emci=5c820fa7-ed3f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=e99d49cb-9b40-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **Last month, I requested nearly $37 million for fifteen local projects in the Fiscal Year 2026 spending bill.** I secured more than $19.3 million for infrastructure projects in Northwest Washington in the Fiscal Year 2024 spending package, which was signed into law in March 2024. It is critical to keep this work going. My priority is to shape spending bills that invest in Northwest Washington communities because you cannot have a big league economy with a little league infrastructure. I will continue to work closely with community leaders and stakeholders to secure critical funding to create more jobs, build better infrastructure and improve vital services residents rely on. The projects I have requested funding for will help improve Northwest Washington's transportation system, invest in community services, promote education and workforce development, and invest in critical infrastructure:
* Over $7 million for a cleaner, greener, safer, and more accessible transportation system
* Over $11.5 million to invest in local community services all across Northwest Washington
* Over $5.5 million for education and workforce development
* Over $11.5 million for critical infrastructure

Funding projects like these will help make Northwest Washington an even better place to live, work, and raise a family. More soon, _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly:

clean_body: Last month, I requested nearly $37 million dollars for fifteen local projects in the Fiscal Year 2026 spending bill. | | | | Last month, I requested nearly $37 million for fifteen local projects in the Fiscal Year 2026 spending bill. I secured more than $19.3 million for infrastructure projects in Northwest Washington in the Fiscal Year 2024 spending package, which was signed into law in March 2024. It is critical to keep this work going. My priority is to shape spending bills that invest in Northwest Washington communities because you cannot have a big league economy with a little league infrastructure. I will continue to work closely with community leaders and stakeholders to secure critical funding to create more jobs, build better infrastructure and improve vital services residents rely on. The projects I have requested funding for will help improve Northwest Washington's transportation system, invest in community services, promote education and workforce development, and invest in critical infrastructure: Over $7 million for a cleaner, greener, safer, and more accessible transportation system Over $11.5 million to invest in local community services all across Northwest Washington Over $5.5 million for education and workforce development Over $11.5 million for critical infrastructure Funding projects like these will help make Northwest Washington an even better place to live, work, and raise a family.
