name: Roy Beck
subject: Birthright Citizenship was never meant for illegal aliens
body:
I’m writing to you today because I believe you’re an America First Patriot who’s sick of the open borders madness.

| | |
#
---
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zh4gubut8gijci0b5a2591epjmq3dgukktg959lo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge2ob2c9h2bs)
---
My Fellow Fighter, I’m writing to you today because I believe you’re an America First Patriot who’s sick of the open borders madness.** ****And that’s exactly who I’m hoping to reach with my _Birthright Citizenship Survey_. ** **[**Would you be able to set aside five minutes to fill out the survey linked here?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu34rn9e4luie6pvq3u0nc2o8fg4o3rpve5c4ppg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge2ob2c9h2bs)** We’re launching a nationwide campaign to educate and activate American patriots on the real intention of Birthright Citizenship... ...and the real disaster it has become for American workers and American citizens.**[And that all starts with this Birthright Citizenship Survey that I’m asking you to complete today.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zukum6k157cuiqjj8f5vakd8567v89a4rnpvrnpg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge2ob2c9h2bs)** Despite what the mainstream media and too many low-level judges are saying, Birthright Citizenship for tourists and illegal aliens is not written into the Constitution.Rather, the 14th Amendment that contains Birthright Citizenship was enacted to grant full citizenship to the slaves freed by Abraham Lincoln — along with their children and their children’s children. It was not meant to apply to foreign visitors...**And it was _definitely not_ for illegal aliens.**In fact, the text of the 14th Amendment clearly states that it only applies to “persons born or naturalized in the United States, **_AND_** subject to the jurisdiction thereof.” But over time, government bureaucrats stretched the 14th Amendment and automatically gave U.S. citizenship to every birth to illegal aliens, and even to foreign nationals vacationing in the United States.Now, the situation has gotten completely out of hand...**In 2023 alone, there were roughly 350,000 births to illegal aliens in the U.S. Tourists gave birth to another 40,000.** These so-called “anchor babies” can keep illegal alien parents from getting deported and give a legal basis for a whole chain of migrants to push their way into America.Is it any surprise that human traffickers and even high-end birth tourism companies are making billions of dollars?This is not by accident – it’s by design. In fact, the Obama State Department changed U.S. visa rules to explicitly allow women to travel to America for the purpose of giving birth in 2015!Thankfully, the Trump administration overturned this rule and pushed back on illegal immigration on a number of fronts.**_But Trump can’t do it alone._**
---
[ **Take the Survey** ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3orkgd8fap8moh626v8va29chgqo1ak2snvigtg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge2ob2c9h2bs)
---
**Fortunately, grassroots organizing is what NumbersUSA does best.** Over the past thirty years, we’ve grown from a small staff into the largest single-issue advocacy group in the United States.Back in 1996, we pioneered the tactic of masses of grassroots voters faxing elected officials directly.In 2007, when Ted Kennedy (remember him?) was trying to grant amnesty to millions of illegal aliens, NumbersUSA mobilized citizens in such numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard. The New York Times “blamed” NumbersUSA as the key factor in blocking Kennedy’s decades-long mass amnesty dream.It was a real David-and-Goliath struggle, and we won.Fast forward to 2025, and our populist immigration position is gaining traction in Washington.The DC power brokers are now calling us when they need to mobilize America-First patriots across the country. To be clear, that’s not because they want to talk to me, Roy Beck.It’s because they know that NumbersUSA is the connection point for 8 million members who understand how our immigration system is utterly broken......and what it will take to fix it. We’ve never had a President like Donald Trump who gets this issue on such a visceral level.But it takes more than just one man to reverse this open borders insanity. He needs a lot of congressional action to back him up and to make improvements permanent.**In our decades on Capitol Hill, we have learned that nothing grabs attention like fired-up American patriots just like you.** And there’s no denying the impact when a mountain of responses pours in from across the country.It proves that the immigration action we’re calling for isn’t just coming from me and the great folks at NumbersUSA—**no, it’s the unmistakable _DEMAND_ of the American people.**And at that point, a politician doesn’t need one ounce of courage.Just a pinch of common sense will be enough to realize that voting against the American people is a “one-way ticket to Palookaville.”That’s how you take a nationwide network of Patriots and turn it into victories at the ballot box, in Congress, and for generations of Americans to come.That’s what NumbersUSA is all about. We have the experience, we have the playbook, but we need your help to execute on Birthright Citizenship and many other key immigration issues.Since we don’t take a penny from dark money, corrupt NGOs, or the government, we rely on patriots just like you to transform our vision into concrete action. **[**So after you fill out your survey, please make a generous donation of $35, $50, $100 or even as much as $500 or $1,000.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo5b9tb8db4orvid2sbog51mm7o2kg5pde2rc868_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge2ob2c9h2bs)****If you can’t make a larger donation at this time, I hope you’ll just cover the cost to process your survey—$3.91.** We’ve run enough of these campaigns on Capitol Hill to know that it takes a veritable army of American patriots to get through to these elected officials.And the only way to assemble an army is with a call that goes out all across the nation. **[**Your completed survey and your donation will be an indisputable sign that the time for change has come.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpff43iiddnbhmptqugjf3i5m214373ibtcagt08_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge2ob2c9h2bs)**
---
Thank you and God bless you today!
---
| | Roy Beck
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zleqteiab7rnr5tj955upc3dorjog0mbf57mdtq8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge2ob2c9h2bs)
---
Founder and President
---
NumbersUSA
---

---

clean_body: I’m writing to you today because I believe you’re an America First Patriot who’s sick of the open borders madness. | | | | | My Fellow Fighter, I’m writing to you today because I believe you’re an America First Patriot who’s sick of the open borders madness. And that’s exactly who I’m hoping to reach with my Birthright Citizenship Survey. We’re launching a nationwide campaign to educate and activate American patriots on the real intention of Birthright Citizenship... ...and the real disaster it has become for American workers and American citizens. Despite what the mainstream media and too many low-level judges are saying, Birthright Citizenship for tourists and illegal aliens is not written into the Constitution.Rather, the 14th Amendment that contains Birthright Citizenship was enacted to grant full citizenship to the slaves freed by Abraham Lincoln — along with their children and their children’s children. It was not meant to apply to foreign visitors...And it was definitely not for illegal aliens.In fact, the text of the 14th Amendment clearly states that it only applies to “persons born or naturalized in the United States, AND subject to the jurisdiction thereof.” But over time, government bureaucrats stretched the 14th Amendment and automatically gave U.S. citizenship to every birth to illegal aliens, and even to foreign nationals vacationing in the United States.Now, the situation has gotten completely out of hand...In 2023 alone, there were roughly 350,000 births to illegal aliens in the U.S. Tourists gave birth to another 40,000. These so-called “anchor babies” can keep illegal alien parents from getting deported and give a legal basis for a whole chain of migrants to push their way into America.Is it any surprise that human traffickers and even high-end birth tourism companies are making billions of dollars?This is not by accident – it’s by design. In fact, the Obama State Department changed U.S. visa rules to explicitly allow women to travel to America for the purpose of giving birth in 2015!Thankfully, the Trump administration overturned this rule and pushed back on illegal immigration on a number of fronts.But Trump can’t do it alone. Fortunately, grassroots organizing is what NumbersUSA does best. Over the past thirty years, we’ve grown from a small staff into the largest single-issue advocacy group in the United States.Back in 1996, we pioneered the tactic of masses of grassroots voters faxing elected officials directly.In 2007, when Ted Kennedy (remember him?) was trying to grant amnesty to millions of illegal aliens, NumbersUSA mobilized citizens in such numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard. The New York Times “blamed” NumbersUSA as the key factor in blocking Kennedy’s decades-long mass amnesty dream.It was a real David-and-Goliath struggle, and we won.Fast forward to 2025, and our populist immigration position is gaining traction in Washington.The DC power brokers are now calling us when they need to mobilize America-First patriots across the country. To be clear, that’s not because they want to talk to me, Roy Beck.It’s because they know that NumbersUSA is the connection point for 8 million members who understand how our immigration system is utterly broken......and what it will take to fix it. We’ve never had a President like Donald Trump who gets this issue on such a visceral level.But it takes more than just one man to reverse this open borders insanity. He needs a lot of congressional action to back him up and to make improvements permanent.In our decades on Capitol Hill, we have learned that nothing grabs attention like fired-up American patriots just like you. And there’s no denying the impact when a mountain of responses pours in from across the country.It proves that the immigration action we’re calling for isn’t just coming from me and the great folks at NumbersUSA—no, it’s the unmistakable DEMAND of the American people.And at that point, a politician doesn’t need one ounce of courage.Just a pinch of common sense will be enough to realize that voting against the American people is a “one-way ticket to Palookaville.”That’s how you take a nationwide network of Patriots and turn it into victories at the ballot box, in Congress, and for generations of Americans to come.That’s what NumbersUSA is all about. We have the experience, we have the playbook, but we need your help to execute on Birthright Citizenship and many other key immigration issues.Since we don’t take a penny from dark money, corrupt NGOs, or the government, we rely on patriots just like you to transform our vision into concrete action. you can’t make a larger donation at this time, I hope you’ll just cover the cost to process your survey—$3.91. We’ve run enough of these campaigns on Capitol Hill to know that it takes a veritable army of American patriots to get through to these elected officials.And the only way to assemble an army is with a call that goes out all across the nation. Thank you and God bless you today! | | Roy Beck Founder and President NumbersUSA | | | P.S. I need to hear what you’re seeing where you are — and how you’re thinking about Birthright Citizenship and immigration as a whole. name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: What an honor to welcome President Trump
body:
What an honor to welcome President DONALD TRUMP as the keynote speaker at Turning Point’s AMERICAFEST, the biggest and boldest celebration of our country and our freedoms!

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zsfk63o28b4n8ov17fbkerkok6jds7tsbslr5blo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge2ob2c9h2bs)
---
Friend, What an honor to welcome President DONALD TRUMP as the keynote speaker at Turning Point’s AMERICAFEST, the biggest and boldest celebration of our country and our freedoms! Friend, thanks to YOU, thousands of young people have been inspired by the President’s message of FREEDOM, PATRIOTISM, and AMERICAN GREATNESS... **...and the Turning Point Generation –– as I call these high school and college students –– are leading MASSIVE GENERATIONAL CHANGE among young people.**
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zpugf5jlt3k82gqj0n815vikp66k9f0s5fiaiv90_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge2ob2c9h2bs)
---
To celebrate this PRO-AMERICA MOMENTUM, I wanted to send you a LIMITED EDITION “47” hat to honor our 47th president: DONALD TRUMP. _**[_**All I ask for in return is a gift of ANY amount to help Turning Point USA inspire MILLIONS MORE kids to LOVE AMERICA again in the year ahead!**_](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zei7sgra8ikh0rhbonqkhcmmg5mnfav9tot1vdfg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge2ob2c9h2bs)**_
---
[ **Make your gift & claim your “47” hat!**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z33ikpmlcqghc7ms1ksf3umi4vruemrbouoougrg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge2ob2c9h2bs)
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z8rs9dufo6pkofnuunch9tbjkadihkumfal3vp60_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge2ob2c9h2bs)
---
Thanks to generous patriots like YOU, Turning Point USA:
* **Leads the BIGGEST and MOST IMPACTFUL patriotic student movement** in American history, with 820,000+ student activists in ALL 50 states,

* **Reaches nearly EVERY smartphone and computer in our country with POWERFUL, PRO-AMERICA content** –– as only Turning Point USA can go HEAD-TO-HEAD with the Fake News Media in online reach, AND

* **Continues to INSPIRE millions of kids to LOVE AMERICA again** , with a MASSIVE SWING in favor of conservative principles among young people under age 25!

But while we’re seeing MAJOR WINS every day ... we must keep up our momentum until we TOTALLY WIN the American Culture War against the “Woke” Left! _**[Please, Friend, make your gift of any amount today to help Turning Point USA make MILLIONS MORE kids LOVE AMERICA again, and I’ll send YOU a limited-edition “47” hat as my personal thanks.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zupjerlbdk51ec2jjt1v34tskuoqbiuck5iu7tvg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge2ob2c9h2bs)**_
---
[ **Make your gift & claim your “47” hat!**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zmkhifk6m556m3appal67ccubkbglqif8t79rcqg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge2ob2c9h2bs)
---
Thank YOU for your patriotism, moral courage, and generous support of the 820,000+ America-loving young people of Turning Point USA. Working together, I know we will totally defeat the “Woke” Left to WIN the American Culture War and restore PATRIOTISM and FREEDOM as our country’s way of life again! Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zem5m9q76lhlt68mvsdlbo9v39ptkj3ras23pjn8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge2ob2c9h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5uk7p782ab8qfuvtci8170sfnbveg9okbehu0gg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge2ob2c9h2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb7er64brdf6kua355g5cqo0t2ec63e8ibft9j4g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge2ob2c9h2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqnhmf771hfnlrnpfqdnae58jhrjgcj4n5fp1gig_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge2ob2c9h2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvd0qn0hog56mpo3n9m24keef9psv7a8f8qg32i8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge2ob2c9h2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z803q58eqqfp0h3egjgalvpreuqo2a4d3fbq04go_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge2ob2c9h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlgog84hjduf67s7vrdv9sln16mqef3kuld8e1og_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge2ob2c9h2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs1eevr7ktbqpg3gvig1mamehn2si5npg4char28_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge2ob2c9h2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd71bipf8453egdaeeoesfaevkot5vv8ebsr31h0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge2ob2c9h2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---

In just his first few months, Trump has already left a path of terror, destruction, and chaos.

He's **pardoned** every single January 6th rioter, **accused** USAID of being corrupt and dismantled it, **investigated** FBI agents who worked on Jan. 6 cases, **froze** funding for Medicare, Social Security, and more, enacted **tariffs** on our allies, Canada and Mexico, gave **Elon Musk unlimited access** to government servers, **withdrew** from the World Health Organization and the Paris Climate Agreement, and **MORE**.

We're TERRIFIED about what he could do in the next four years.

We NEED two Republicans to do the right thing and vote in favor of his impeachment!

But this vote is risky, and they'd be bucking their party.

name: Roy Beck
subject: Birthright Citizenship was never meant for illegal aliens
body:
I’m writing to you today because I believe you’re an America First Patriot who’s sick of the open borders madness.

| | |
#
---
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ztllpvsa1qircuamgotpt4bs1kvtk2up8em7561g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjgeapj6c9h2bs)
---
My Fellow Fighter, I’m writing to you today because I believe you’re an America First Patriot who’s sick of the open borders madness.** ****And that’s exactly who I’m hoping to reach with my _Birthright Citizenship Survey_. ** **[**Would you be able to set aside five minutes to fill out the survey linked here?**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zcfnrdqlag3lso6ce84aj6a3qp5ikp05m4jcjqlg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjgeapj6c9h2bs)** We’re launching a nationwide campaign to educate and activate American patriots on the real intention of Birthright Citizenship... ...and the real disaster it has become for American workers and American citizens.**[And that all starts with this Birthright Citizenship Survey that I’m asking you to complete today.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zu57kejm5abctff89o5cqdv5e6m261cdbc303pcg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjgeapj6c9h2bs)** Despite what the mainstream media and too many low-level judges are saying, Birthright Citizenship for tourists and illegal aliens is not written into the Constitution.Rather, the 14th Amendment that contains Birthright Citizenship was enacted to grant full citizenship to the slaves freed by Abraham Lincoln — along with their children and their children’s children. It was not meant to apply to foreign visitors...**And it was _definitely not_ for illegal aliens.**In fact, the text of the 14th Amendment clearly states that it only applies to “persons born or naturalized in the United States, **_AND_** subject to the jurisdiction thereof.” But over time, government bureaucrats stretched the 14th Amendment and automatically gave U.S. citizenship to every birth to illegal aliens, and even to foreign nationals vacationing in the United States.Now, the situation has gotten completely out of hand...**In 2023 alone, there were roughly 350,000 births to illegal aliens in the U.S. Tourists gave birth to another 40,000.** These so-called “anchor babies” can keep illegal alien parents from getting deported and give a legal basis for a whole chain of migrants to push their way into America.Is it any surprise that human traffickers and even high-end birth tourism companies are making billions of dollars?This is not by accident – it’s by design. In fact, the Obama State Department changed U.S. visa rules to explicitly allow women to travel to America for the purpose of giving birth in 2015!Thankfully, the Trump administration overturned this rule and pushed back on illegal immigration on a number of fronts.**_But Trump can’t do it alone._**
---
[ **Take the Survey** ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z3vc347d4u6htbgvdogdeqvkqos0sgkvpc87tp38_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjgeapj6c9h2bs)
---
**Fortunately, grassroots organizing is what NumbersUSA does best.** Over the past thirty years, we’ve grown from a small staff into the largest single-issue advocacy group in the United States.Back in 1996, we pioneered the tactic of masses of grassroots voters faxing elected officials directly.In 2007, when Ted Kennedy (remember him?) was trying to grant amnesty to millions of illegal aliens, NumbersUSA mobilized citizens in such numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard. The New York Times “blamed” NumbersUSA as the key factor in blocking Kennedy’s decades-long mass amnesty dream.It was a real David-and-Goliath struggle, and we won.Fast forward to 2025, and our populist immigration position is gaining traction in Washington.The DC power brokers are now calling us when they need to mobilize America-First patriots across the country. To be clear, that’s not because they want to talk to me, Roy Beck.It’s because they know that NumbersUSA is the connection point for 8 million members who understand how our immigration system is utterly broken......and what it will take to fix it. We’ve never had a President like Donald Trump who gets this issue on such a visceral level.But it takes more than just one man to reverse this open borders insanity. He needs a lot of congressional action to back him up and to make improvements permanent.**In our decades on Capitol Hill, we have learned that nothing grabs attention like fired-up American patriots just like you.** And there’s no denying the impact when a mountain of responses pours in from across the country.It proves that the immigration action we’re calling for isn’t just coming from me and the great folks at NumbersUSA—**no, it’s the unmistakable _DEMAND_ of the American people.**And at that point, a politician doesn’t need one ounce of courage.Just a pinch of common sense will be enough to realize that voting against the American people is a “one-way ticket to Palookaville.”That’s how you take a nationwide network of Patriots and turn it into victories at the ballot box, in Congress, and for generations of Americans to come.That’s what NumbersUSA is all about. We have the experience, we have the playbook, but we need your help to execute on Birthright Citizenship and many other key immigration issues.Since we don’t take a penny from dark money, corrupt NGOs, or the government, we rely on patriots just like you to transform our vision into concrete action. **[**So after you fill out your survey, please make a generous donation of $35, $50, $100 or even as much as $500 or $1,000.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2znmckbgcqn07uaaajtnvhsepnod7fg15k2r9hbto_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjgeapj6c9h2bs)****If you can’t make a larger donation at this time, I hope you’ll just cover the cost to process your survey—$3.91.** We’ve run enough of these campaigns on Capitol Hill to know that it takes a veritable army of American patriots to get through to these elected officials.And the only way to assemble an army is with a call that goes out all across the nation. **[**Your completed survey and your donation will be an indisputable sign that the time for change has come.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zuteio4ufhe4f4489l31q9uunreclau1oqg37pmg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjgeapj6c9h2bs)**
---
Thank you and God bless you today!
---
| | Roy Beck
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zpo2aq9vh901oaghkmk4kh8llngv8mufdm7n8us0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjgeapj6c9h2bs)
---
Founder and President
---
NumbersUSA
---
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z39n8ldeldfbochkonkomc7d58s5j16tbb4gudug_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjgeapj6c9h2bs)
---
| | **P.S.** I need to hear what you’re seeing where you are — and how you’re thinking about Birthright Citizenship and immigration as a whole. **[So please, don’t delay — click here or the button below to complete your Birthright Citizenship Survey and stand with us today!](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z6fet1pqqmugj25g9gmvijb8mn96nnhtmkhnpq68_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjgeapj6c9h2bs)**
---
**Take the Survey**
---
|
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zbg7mam47u388rnjrrqim6grl1j8nfck624hn2ug_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjgeapj6c9h2bs)
---
NumbersUSA is a nonpartisan, nonprofit organization that believes better immigration policy is possible and needed. As America’s largest single-issue advocacy group, NumbersUSA is focused exclusively on immigration reform. NumbersUSA empowers over 8 million grassroots supporters spread across every congressional district to impact immigration policy with information, tools, access, and influence.
---
**NumbersUSA.com**
---
|
---
**NumbersUSA Education & Research Foundation**1201 Wilson Blvd 25th FloorArlington, VA 22209
---

Pop Acta Media | First Look News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zrntlmrrnk5ed5vrvtpanbcub5mjr71ejbqdfc28_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjgeapj6c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq6d5iepon3dtnmqpq7d9neprqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshgmaoj4s5gm49fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z40o7i448qr6pscsnuaf359snam92jaeqsev0pgg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjgeapj6c9h2bs)_

[](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zucouplsb2a8sprb0ho9c4d2rqr9pqp6isp4f85g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjgeapj6c9h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

While prices for monthly access across Substack are being raised, I'm dropping mine.
I incur some costs in the work I do, but I have always believed in making information accessible when it's critical for the public to know.
That's why I'm dropping the price of my monthly and annual subscriptions for new subscribers.
The average Substack subscription costs $8 per month.
I'm dropping mine to $1.75 per month, or $17.50 for one year.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..J329qKJ7JtHOYjVOILjgoqEwS5c8iyWfn2NFu5AZ1cM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=165115515)
* * *
The opening day of **Capitol Hill Ocean Week (CHOW) 2025** carried less the air of a scientific gathering than that of a sleek tech convention, where optimism in innovation hummed just beneath the surface.
The lighting was soft, the branding crisp, the atmosphere thick with the scent of capital--and not the intellectual kind. If the shift in tone felt jarring to longtime attendees, it was also, unmistakably, by design.
In the months following the Trump administration's deep and deliberate slashes to ocean science funding, the character of CHOW has evolved--or devolved, depending on whom you ask. Where once it stood as a bastion of evidence-based research and policy-driven dialogue, it now flirts with the glossy promises of entrepreneurial salvation. Science, it seems, is no longer the main attraction. Innovation is. Or rather, the idea of innovation as imagined by the investment class...

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 6/3/2025
body:
Congress must back DOGE to cut waste and energize GOP voters for 2026
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi folks,
🎟️ Seats are going fast for the **[Mountain Majesty Gala](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**! Don’t miss your chance to be part of Colorado’s premier patriotic evening on June 21st—[secure your spot](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) before it’s too late.

Listen to today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Colorado made national headlines this week after a [Molotov cocktail attack](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) at a peaceful rally in Boulder injured 12—FBI says the suspect aimed to “kill all Zionists.” Meanwhile, CPW [euthanized “Wolf 2405”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) after a string of livestock killings in Pitkin County, and Jeffco Schools face a [federal Title IX probe](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) over a controversial overnight trip sleeping arrangement.

🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** Sen. Rubio is pushing back on [foreign censorship](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) with visa bans for officials who target U.S. speech, while Elon Musk’s DOGE has exposed $175B in waste. GOP leaders are [urging Congress to act fast](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—seeing a clear path to energize voters and cut government bloat ahead of 2026.
🗣️ **Commentary Spotlight...** This week’s commentary zeroes in on the moral and financial costs of Colorado’s political status quo. C. J. Garbo calls the Boulder attack what it was: [terrorism, not a “clash,”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and warns against the growing normalization of antisemitic violence disguised as activism. Meanwhile, Mike O’Donnell sounds the alarm over [Colorado’s swelling public payroll](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), arguing that unchecked government growth is driving inflation and crushing the private sector.
This is the Mountain Minute for Tuesday, June 3, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Ganahl: Congress must back DOGE to cut waste and energize GOP voters for 2026](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY HEIDI GANAHL, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Under President Donald Trump, the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE)—led by Elon Musk—is lighting a fire under Republican voters ready to rip out Washington’s waste at the roots.
Launched in February 2025 via Executive Order 14158, DOGE has identified $175 billion in savings through asset sales, contract cancellations, and fraud crackdowns, including more than 12 million supposed Social Security recipients listed as over 120 years old—zombie accounts draining taxpayer dollars.
DOGE’s mission to eliminate waste has the people behind it—73% of Americans, including 89% of Republicans, support the effort. That kind of backing makes it a political powerhouse.
Yet, as of now, Congress has not voted on codifying DOGE’s proposed $9.4 billion rescissions package, risking the enthusiasm of the GOP base ahead of the 2026 midterms.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**DON'T MISS OUT ON THE MOUNTAIN MAJESTY GALA —LIMITED TICKETS AVAILABLE 🎟️ **
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[GET YOUR TICKET HERE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[O’Donnell: One in 20 workers is a state employee—who’s footing the bill?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* One in every 20 workers in Colorado is now employed by the state government—a record high that reflects years of one-party control and aggressive bureaucratic expansion.
* Nearly half of all new jobs added in early 2025 were government positions, intensifying concerns about Colorado’s shrinking private tax base and rising cost of living.
* Critics argue the payoff for this ballooning administrative state is minimal, as public services lag behind while regulatory burdens and household debt continue to climb.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Boulder terrorist planned attack for a year, told police his goal: “Kill all Zionists”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [DENVER GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* A 45-year-old Egyptian national, Mohamed Sabry Soliman, threw a Molotov cocktail into a peaceful demonstration on Boulder’s Pearl Street Mall, injuring 12 people—many elderly, including a Holocaust survivor.
* Soliman, who overstayed a visa and was living in Colorado Springs, told investigators his goal was to “kill all Zionists” and admitted planning the attack for over a year.
* The FBI is treating the case as ideologically motivated terrorism; Colorado officials condemned the act and ordered increased security at Jewish institutions statewide.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Two investigations signal Education Department’s pivot from Pride Month to Title IX enforcement](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [DAILY WIRE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* The U.S. Department of Education is launching a Title IX investigation into Jefferson County Public Schools in Colorado for allowing overnight accommodations to be based on gender identity rather than biological sex, leading to incidents like an 11-year-old girl being assigned to share a bed with a transgender-identifying male on a school trip.
* The investigation, announced during Title IX’s 53rd anniversary, reflects the Trump administration's push to restore the original intent of Title IX protections for women and girls.
* This follows the Biden administration’s controversial attempt to redefine “sex” under Title IX to include gender identity—a proposal that was ultimately withdrawn after overwhelming public backlash.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[Garbo: Boulder wasn’t a clash, it was terrorism](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY C. J. GARBO****| COMMENTARY | JUNE 2** _What happened in Boulder was an act of terrorism, plain and simple. The alleged actions of Mohamed Sabry Soliman, targeting Jews in what authorities have rightly identified as an ideologically motivated, antisemitic attack, must be condemned in the strongest possible terms._
**[Devotional: Why your heart needs the breastplate of righteousness](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | JUNE 1** _In a swirling sea of spiritual confusion—where feelings often masquerade as faith, manmade systems can overshadow true surrender, and emotional highs might be mistaken for holiness—it’s no wonder that many sincere believers feel exposed, exhausted, and uncertain._
__
**[The COvid Chronicles May 16–23, 2020: Deaths dipped—but the definition got slippery](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY RMV EDITORIAL BOARD | COMMENTARY | MAY 31** _More than two months into government-mandated shutdowns, Coloradans had lost patience—and begun reclaiming their fearlessness. After surrendering jobs, shuttering schools, isolating loved ones, and forfeiting springtime rites of faith and family, many started asking the obvious: What was all this really for?_
__

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**🥤 DID YOU KNOW?** Vernors is **America’s oldest soda** , first crafted in Michigan in 1866 and patented in 1880. This barrel-aged ginger ale still has a loyal following in the Midwest—though Dr. Pepper, launched in 1885, is better known nationwide.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "A good thing to remember, especially those in politics: 'Whom the gods wish to destroy they first call promising.'" – Cyril Connolly
|
---

[SUBSCRIBE FOR FREE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: June is Pride Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
In May, I teamed up with my colleagues Senator Tammy Baldwin and Senator Cory Booker to reintroduce the Equality Act.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108909151/549394742/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmE1ZDg2OS1hMDQwLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hTJ9wxR7lDc_4OgBeb0AMdOecYoNss68V0Ruhap4hTY=&emci=f0fb658c-e93f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=f2a5d869-a040-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7731215)
---

| | June is Pride Month — a time to celebrate love, identity, and the courage of LGBTQ+ Americans who've fought to make sure this country lives up to its highest ideals. It's also a time to recommit to the work we still need to get done to ensure every one of our LGBTQ+ neighbors has the freedom and opportunity to live as their authentic selves. **In May, I teamed up with my colleagues, Senator Tammy Baldwin and Senator Cory Booker, to reintroduce the Equality Act. The Equality Act is bold, historic legislation to make comprehensive civil rights protections for LGBTQ+ Americans the law of the land. Equality should never depend on your zip code.** Despite the progress we've made, it's painfully clear: equal justice is still not a reality for everyone in America. The Trump Administration, MAGA Republicans, and right-wing state legislatures are escalating coordinated attacks on the rights, security, and freedoms of LGBTQ+ Americans in statehouses, courtrooms, and classrooms nationwide. The Equality Act is about freedom. The freedom for everyone to fully participate in every aspect of life — the freedom to live openly, love who you love, and live as your authentic self without fear. Generations of Americans have marched, voted, organized, and raised their voices to fight for a vision of America as a free and equal nation for all. **By leading the Equality Act, I am fighting to expand freedom and open the doors of opportunity for everyone.** Back in 2007 as the Speaker of the Oregon House, I successfully led the fight to secure equality for Oregonians, and it is way past time for Congress to do the same for all LGBTQ+ Americans — no exceptions — by passing my Equality Act. **I will always fight to protect LGBTQ+ lives, break down barriers to opportunity and equality, and be a strong, vocal ally in public service and in solidarity.** Happy Pride Month! Onward! _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly:

clean_body: In May, I teamed up with my colleagues Senator Tammy Baldwin and Senator Cory Booker to reintroduce the Equality Act. | | | | June is Pride Month — a time to celebrate love, identity, and the courage of LGBTQ+ Americans who've fought to make sure this country lives up to its highest ideals. It's also a time to recommit to the work we still need to get done to ensure every one of our LGBTQ+ neighbors has the freedom and opportunity to live as their authentic selves. In May, I teamed up with my colleagues, Senator Tammy Baldwin and Senator Cory Booker, to reintroduce the Equality Act. The Equality Act is bold, historic legislation to make comprehensive civil rights protections for LGBTQ+ Americans the law of the land. Equality should never depend on your zip code. Despite the progress we've made, it's painfully clear: equal justice is still not a reality for everyone in America. The Trump Administration, MAGA Republicans, and right-wing state legislatures are escalating coordinated attacks on the rights, security, and freedoms of LGBTQ+ Americans in statehouses, courtrooms, and classrooms nationwide. The Equality Act is about freedom. The freedom for everyone to fully participate in every aspect of life — the freedom to live openly, love who you love, and live as your authentic self without fear. Generations of Americans have marched, voted, organized, and raised their voices to fight for a vision of America as a free and equal nation for all. By leading the Equality Act, I am fighting to expand freedom and open the doors of opportunity for everyone. Back in 2007 as the Speaker of the Oregon House, I successfully led the fight to secure equality for Oregonians, and it is way past time for Congress to do the same for all LGBTQ+ Americans — no exceptions — by passing my Equality Act. I will always fight to protect LGBTQ+ lives, break down barriers to opportunity and equality, and be a strong, vocal ally in public service and in solidarity. Happy Pride Month! Onward! Peter, it’s Valerie.

Over the weekend, we faced down our end-of-month fundraising deadline, and thanks to supporters like you, we were able to reach our goal. **I’m constantly humbled by your willingness to donate and share my vision for North Carolina, Peter.**

I’ve made a commitment to build a better future for our children, and a better life for our communities. I’m not slowing down, and neither will the progress we’re fighting for in NC-04.

**This is a critical time for us to stick together.** When we unite together, we all win and can fight against Trump and the GOP to show that we will not allow our democracy to be overthrown.

Together, we are unstoppable. Thank you for supporting me every step of the way.

With gratitude,

Valerie

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Hollywood is trying to turn our children against us
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zu2v8v2shnomopmnvus2k8av54f5plrraatrpbe8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge6oj2c5h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zn52iuc44i3brbgrf7o56brdnasq72d08cm5cofg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge6oj2c5h2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrb824oc4o8snl76i4k0i3geoh7ijjjf0s3pfh0o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge6oj2c5h2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2rsq117drc9jukdeju9hu5ha0l0emid4uk0upag_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge6oj2c5h2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zc67b75qovpu335u0nlmijqtu7n80rjterof2948_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge6oj2c5h2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zfhgehuv04g0u48qnees4mvl97t08uu35r4un1qo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge6oj2c5h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdh9927rlraurd2qlqdp80vdp3ner3p4qbatlpn8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge6oj2c5h2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zoj9tugpk0jsmmtsqhjlaihohl48ab5g83kkv44g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjge6oj2c5h2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---

---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---

---

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z6ncj24gjatd1q080lafe7rom6iklottpfh286jg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjgeapj6cph2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zp0p9dh25dl1vncugs90m4gvc1ohqlckpl86rgog_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjgeapj6cph2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z26p3fmch6p44t6odnjsrjm5aod9fkgi9odcsf98_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjgeapj6cph2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zuf8h699k7gmhqs4sks6skg1mopsofc60te9f5ag_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjgeapj6cph2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zm3uj6440maaspi9b59oe102i72stofeq0vacirg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjgeapj6cph2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z9fll5qru68cl33q788fqgtqno55isa3bmqlv97o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjgeapj6cph2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zimi3hunshlb1f6arbm86ojrfaillblmt6smilm8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjgeapj6cph2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zv9k03heqri3ntb77ql5bq0qcn4rvfaneapkmgh8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjgeapj6cph2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z06ct7t34u7378mv2jl4ra7j14m3j4888knv564o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjgeapj6cph2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---

Pop Acta Media | National Republican Polling
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zah5bf697ph5abfoh5nuoo1g1nm74hg434cesqeo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkeq32t5nmeq33cjl61qn4cdkmoq37c3nm6or9ctn6ej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp31clh69ob5c8gq48bi4bh28pr1c3ie1pb6cpj649fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z675f2eb0j2fg441apbhj5hn4al9matjqll7iq60_rp22sh2s8i6eob0sjgeapj6cph2bs)_

body:
We need all hands on deck >>
| **FIRST:** Donald Trump signed an executive order to _defund_ PBS — he is attacking any outlet that has the audacity to report truthfully about him!

Team: Last year, Congresswoman Marianette Miller-Meeks won reelection in Iowa _by just 0.19 points_ after a recount—the second-closest House race in the country.So what have the opponents of voting rights in Iowa's state legislature done? That's right -- **they just passed a bill lowering the recount threshold to _0.15 points_.** But they made this change across the board, right? To be fair? _Of course not._ Candidates for local elections and the state legislature can still request a recount if their race is within 1% (or 50 votes). For races for Congress and statewide office -- the most competitive races -- the tally must be within 0.15%. **This is yet another case of opponents of voting rights changing the rules to protect themselves and their power.** The law's vote manager claims that this bill was passed to "preserve fairness", while all it really does is protect his political party from potential losses while restricting campaigns from making sure every vote counts. **[Team, chip $25 or whatever you can today as we fight bills like this around the country and protect our right to be heard in our elections>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108911616/549402515/1723810624?am=25.00&contactdata=n6Bs/HpHBZPtIIIcECjuut9B+Dcddk80EXYRJRCyXHCFROdUpXcmJjGNw1OvaznJRvkoL9wFg+x2W7r1pUjOZaGKf4YNrZF0UszowXlnEpI=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNjZGE0MDAwLWE1NDAtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=62i_Bl4SHFEeRaI6aIQ1uU1TmBH0J8aW7Sjutn_7MgI=&emci=fa05f283-9040-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=3cda4000-a540-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=33603084)**

clean_body: Des Moines Register: Iowa is changing when candidates can request a recount — and who conducts them. Here's how.| | | | | Team: Last year, Congresswoman Marianette Miller-Meeks won reelection in Iowa by just 0.19 points after a recount—the second-closest House race in the country.So what have the opponents of voting rights in Iowa's state legislature done? That's right -- they just passed a bill lowering the recount threshold to 0.15 points. But they made this change across the board, right? To be fair? Of course not. Candidates for local elections and the state legislature can still request a recount if their race is within 1% (or 50 votes). For races for Congress and statewide office -- the most competitive races -- the tally must be within 0.15%. This is yet another case of opponents of voting rights changing the rules to protect themselves and their power. The law's vote manager claims that this bill was passed to "preserve fairness", while all it really does is protect his political party from potential losses while restricting campaigns from making sure every vote counts. If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Those aren't the only changes -- this new law puts partisan county auditors and their staffs in charge of the recount instead of a board chosen by the campaigns in the race. Want to guess which party controls most of Iowa's county auditor positions? Yes, the one that just passed this bill into law.Take it from Iowa state Sen. Sarah Trone Garriott, who has been through two recounts following elections for her Senate seat:"Currently in our process, the county auditor and their staff, they’re very present, they support the process, they’re very engaged ," she said. "But taking out the candidates’ representatives and the neutral party,putting it on a partisan elected official and the staff who are supervised and employed by them does not make it more fair. " It's clear that all this new law does is create opportunities for opponents of voting rights to suppress votes before they can be cast and the controlling party to silence votes after the election by having them tossed in a recount -- just like we saw in North Carolina with a race that was not settled until 6 months after Election Day. | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. clean_body: We’re building something unstoppable. | = Thank you, thank you, thank you. JanePAC has felt a shift in momentum this year, and you helped create it. We’ve met every single grassroots fundraising goal we’ve set together — and that’s no small thing. Because of that support, we’ve endorsed some of the boldest climate champions in the country, in places like Virginia and New Jersey, where the fights are tough and the stakes couldn’t be higher. And we’re seeing results. We’ve racked up five big wins so far in high-stakes downballot races, thanks in part to contributions we received from grassroots supporters like you. That’s people power in action. If you’ve chipped in, shared our work, forwarded an email, or simply believed in what we’re building, I am profoundly grateful to have you in this movement. Now, as we enter June, we’re facing our next big test — our end-of-quarter goal of $75,000 in online grassroots donations by June 30. And we need your support to get there, because we have a LOT to do. Every dollar we raise this month will fund our work to endorse courageous climate leaders at every level of government and push back against everything that Donald Trump and his allies are doing in Washington to sabotage our planet’s future. So take a moment to feel proud of what you’ve helped accomplish. You’re part of a massive community of grassroots supporters who care deeply about leaving behind a clean, livable world. | = = Xx Jane | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

body:

Now that we have your attention, we're pleading with you:

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: Just a matter of time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
Hi Friend, It was only a matter of time. Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi just couldn’t stand that we passed President Trump’s Big Beautiful Bill to extend the Trump Tax Cuts, restore the SALT deduction for 98% of Staten Island and southern Brooklyn taxpayers and provide real tax relief for seniors living on Social Security.

| | | | Hi Friend,

It was only a matter of time.

Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi just couldn’t stand that we passed President Trump’s Big Beautiful Bill to extend the Trump Tax Cuts, restore the SALT deduction for 98% of Staten Island and southern Brooklyn taxpayers and provide real tax relief for seniors living on Social Security.

Right after we passed it, Schumer and Pelosi went on the attack and launched their handpicked candidate to win our seat.

Their candidate is already raising money online and I need your help to keep up with the Democrats’ Money Machine.

Can you chip in?

[NicoleMalliotakis.com/donate](https://nicolemalliotakis.emlnk9.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GE6J3ea5HV._g5GWOdw16IkudAkj~ZkYnfEKaHOEKBAyEy.0OFs237ziNLwlfYwbHLFInmi)

Please donate now to protect our seat.

Thank you,
Nicole

---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/wMrACZD8VZ1D50QTyvgxV2ICF2-vQwOZ6fw_3CLXn2QizZP9gDpKoU8pgTQoQdoYJAaDXVCvl8npoNXCmBbJ7zC6pL7oni__tR53K2ecExVM9_47jqtwiuDYFeCu6IqfJ0U9YA1CIwqgfkearFrHSnpQ1q3k2cLAn15qKalHe6bwv0dhl4F86D12B7v5bhwNkyuwxBe72k26QuyEmUeJA7rQOLUD0y3j6-DCvLJhiMOj3Bx34DAJCxW0hSV63S3KpUIVxZzFErBmfanAD2gxa7KjQqaR7hkqsrAnV2sjptAc7wMBd4uP0he8UogVHETJJANjSxoemPZ1MwdBc9E-4JcdIuGRDBHAjniLtB2Dm2KviQ8k07LFbR9xbpe2oxFD8UjWLILeXl2ecMMQiwzom6ZQ3OJf2TpFJQH2pAPNPxU6Erxd-7le3ZSw-qNI8_Xp3GGizuMn1IUf5NymGw/XnmK4CiqLF2w1uwT-FR1L-4SoTicwNcj/9).

Responding will take only a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is very important to us...because, thanks to the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), we are able now to see in detail the horrendous waste of taxpayer money that has been going on at the hands of unelected and unaccountable federal bureaucrats.

Under the administrative state that has largely come to replace our Constitution over the past century, Americans citizens have been ruled without their consent. Nothing could run more counter to the principles on which our great country was founded almost 250 years ago.

The more we hear about taxpayer funded boondoggles such as sponsoring a transgender opera in Colombia and supporting research at China's Wuhan lab (yes, the same lab where COVID-19 originated!), the more we should be committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To make it happen, we need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will revive and preserve liberty? **Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/8BoMsYSfvchXz-n5x7T5ye3mKUrI4Hk5MALriGlubD6W4rstOaWb0ggDFmeNsVzdr3xYiXoLzWzB6kW0SyX90cyvRgMWemT2z09js-6sRBl_k9MSdSJXgXPPEXjGK8oJuVzfFEUFz5x5BvYyxMdx_TNl1jlj5VmNKOjRQr3mHBXf6dEQ6qYlPQIr7GaVQG3c4Fr6O41nfMcXkdMa1RZlJgU6GbhNHr4WNRdkbzUz4bNawxj7SqyZvn8Rg7p6AayY0T6s--AtbGPPAEpSNp22Vf2b_HbXx2T1Ne_ynGwVT6Y0YaJsve3oEyNpRyN698DV4SXCVCV2PUmliCeTzGCkTN-S0Qen2r3RKGyXaJd9SLV2-T2UWK7wRFLOvglJ3grWTGEs2PGn8ExXxedWH8_yxqWlAZFCPOUo57x8Al57a4GZbw105qL10Wz6Yt2WwiR3pUd-swbQo61GXZyE9Q/0FMy1HPpUEtEIfybuTENS0wHOaZZo0fT/9)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The administrative state is a grave threat to our country--and will continue to be until constitutional rule is fully restored.

Hillsdale College promotes this restoration of the Constitution in all of its many educational outreach efforts, including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs held on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty and limited government.

Your support of these efforts is essential...because unlike other American colleges and universities, Hillsdale refuses to accept any government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans.

Please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for your partnership in defense of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/8Btl_DKzFrZdCAeMn0GLdoRfKJ67gl9eRKXywDJKv3ElnXXBp4v__MiOwBbywp_YWNzVCwYrBGcktCNjRnmNoWJewbCMHP8lg0zrDsGizV0zTFiM42k4oWa71yBjIJraQhjdVS4h3GWxZTRLmTwkM2wM_fLiyRXcVRfIxvwbCdu9h_zUqlxayXzKdSahaYgxX7dl-5c7OnUka6_ksOgihuX7tYjfOoVUTk4h1__925jwtgzB_MhjKnUII_nm1roP_AAR-zoN4jZeq64uNsuXmNciZlgsv6Pf15L1SOU75U0oXtLOh0FHmKFpbQF47jwT1PjM_WMqRJ_2Z_SyWJko77rtaxVjieTs7bPXDVC5EzjeEE_xpTC6OScH3RVF2F2cu_upt0FunRXtcX_AwAqNza-uTPCTS82iGM0DH9cE7RMFjC8mQvM2dN5-ihGoN20muq3gmzQN1eFeLN2Omw/r7YNBvzZRzRvkuvxdVjVfw_zAs_2uABw/9)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty.
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

clean_body: | | | Thank you for opening my email. 99% of people scroll right past — but not you. That means everything to me. I’m Derrick Evans: a husband, father, and rancher from West Virginia. I’m just a working man with a family to raise and bills to pay—not a D.C. insider with a team of lobbyists and lawyers on speed dial. In 2021, my life was flipped upside down. I was thrown into a Biden Regime Gulagfor almost 100 days. Why? Because I peacefully protested on January 6th – standing up for President Trump and the 74 million Americans who voted for him. Biden sent a FBI SWAT TEAM to bustdown my front door. My wife and kids were terrified. Prison was going to be my home now. I wore my cross necklace every day in Biden’s Gulag. It reminded me that I can’t give up on life, give up on my family, or give up on my country. ____________________________________ President Trump OFFICIALLY PARDONED ME on January 20th, 2025. It was an honor to meet him and say thank you for giving me and 1,500 J6 prisoners our freedom back.____________________________________ I will never take my freedom for granted again. That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate – something I NEVER imagined doing. Where I’m from in West Virginia, we don’t trust politicians. And for good reason. The D.C. elites have sold us out —shipping our coal, lumber, and factory jobs to China. Allowing millions of illegal aliens to take over our neighborhoods and undercut our wages. Wasting our tax dollars overseas while rural America crumbles. West Virginians aren’t the only ones feeling this. Hard-working families are gettingCRUSHED in all 50 states. I’m fighting to fix that. This is the most important race of my life — and it won't be easy. I’m not backed by billionaires or political “experts”. My campaign is 100% powered bypatriots like you. If you’re tired of all of the lies, corruption, and tone-deaf leadership in Washington —I need you in this fight with me. 99% of Republicans will ignore this message. Even fewer will donate. Will you be the 1% who steps up in a major way? $10, $20, or $30 today could change everything. Let’s take our country back and finish what we started under President Trump. THANK YOU FOR YOUR SUPPORT! Derrick Evans Former Biden Regime PrisonerRepublican for U.S. Senate | | Paid for by Evans for WV 50 MOUNTAINEER DRPRICHARD, WV 25555 | | |

# TUESDAY, June 3, 2025
