If you don 't want to miss any of my hard-hitting reports and commentary, please subscribe today!_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..cRgUOW_ZNjdLxFOzCapvPDw7amAbqDh5OjopztUGBRY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=164362629)
On May 16, 2025, [Moody's Corporation downgraded](https://substack.com/redirect/60d51679-298e-45f2-8beb-8b5110e777ab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the United States' credit rating from Aaa to Aa1, citing the "ballooning national debt" as the primary justification. The credit downgrade decision comes as Moody's continues to [champion](https://substack.com/redirect/b9cb32d8-87a0-4019-9797-c98da7c33ba6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) and environmental, social, and governance (ESG) priorities--initiatives that stand in sharp contrast to the Trump Administration's efforts to eliminate DEI and ESG practices from federal agencies. Notably, Moody's Chief Executive Officer Robert Fauber has also publicly criticized election integrity measures in the aftermath of the 2020 election, raising questions about the ideological motivations behind the downgrade.
## **Robert Fauber 's Political History Linked to Moody's Credit Downgrade**
Robert Fauber, who has served as Moody's CEO [since January 2021](https://substack.com/redirect/af62d100-758c-400c-af2b-136be8c01d9d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), has played a central role in directing the company's corporate agenda. Prior to his current role, Fauber held several senior positions at Moody's, including President and Chief Operating Officer (Nov. 2019-Dec. 2020), President of Moody's Investors Service (2016-2019), and Global Head of the MIS Commercial Group (2013-2016). In the aftermath of the 2020 election, Fauber publicly opposed election integrity efforts. On January 6, 2021, he [told](https://substack.com/redirect/e55ed4c7-a977-41df-9aa5-80823119a69e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) _CNN_ , "I am shocked and saddened by the scenes of violence and disorder unfolding today in Washington, DC. It is a fundamental attack on the rule of law and is simply unacceptable." Two days earlier, _Variety_ [reported](https://substack.com/redirect/5ee8a76b-b185-4b69-9dee-02c3ab1169fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that Fauber had signed a letter urging Congress to certify Joe Biden's electoral victory.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..cRgUOW_ZNjdLxFOzCapvPDw7amAbqDh5OjopztUGBRY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=164362629)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0cf5c3fc-3983-4f3f-983c-f468b9731d91?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/267f7cb8-df2a-4c82-b92b-931713ee0182?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9fd4b269-a46f-43a9-944f-1f6f7d3baeb6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## **Moody 's Promotes DEI as Core to Its Corporate Credit Strategy**
Moody's has consistently advanced DEI as a pillar of its corporate sustainability strategy. In a March 2024 [post](https://substack.com/redirect/a4efefac-fad5-4346-8255-b50b4424acf3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on X, the company stated, "Increasing gender diversity in labor markets and on boards may improve governance and credit quality." The post [linked](https://substack.com/redirect/c9f10e2c-8691-40f6-9954-c22e3080991b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to a broader discussion on how such trends impact the global economy and businesses performance.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/91a08573-b565-47db-afc1-84dc63e5b56e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## **Moody 's Used DEI Messaging to Shape Post-Pandemic Policy**
In June 2021, Moody's highlighted its DEI commitments in a [post](https://substack.com/redirect/27828ff8-2276-4b42-8248-dbd4e4ec93a2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) stating, "How will diversity, equity and inclusion strengthen corporate sustainability and help businesses recover from the pandemic?" The post referenced Moody's executive Marina Albo's participation in a roundtable hosted by EY and the Spanish newspaper _Expansi on_, and [linked](https://substack.com/redirect/b2beccc5-9033-4a60-b530-b645ae9bf94c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to the publication's coverage.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/62b3094d-0bf5-4444-bff7-a6c33a2c0403?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
LOOMER UNLEASHED is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..cRgUOW_ZNjdLxFOzCapvPDw7amAbqDh5OjopztUGBRY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=164362629)
## **LGBTQ+ Initiatives Highlight Moody 's Internal DEI Focus**
In September 2021, Moody's further promoted its DEI initiatives with a [post](https://substack.com/redirect/832ab0d8-3a1f-4419-8ed7-1449ef48e0f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) stating, "Do you wonder what it's like to be LGBTQ+ at Moody's? Join us to hear from EMEA employees about our inclusive culture and their experiences." The post included hashtags such as #LGBTQIA, #diversity, and #inclusion--along with a [link](https://substack.com/redirect/4bed9d5d-7ee3-40cf-82ce-1ad2f508104f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to the company-hosted discussion.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/50f34c2c-c877-4472-88f6-315a7ad3cf30?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## **Financial Support Tied to Social Justice**
It is also worth noting that Moody's issued a DEI report in 2020, outlining its corporate commitment to social equity initiatives. According to _Sustainability_[reporting](https://substack.com/redirect/b2541fe6-f05d-4402-ab6c-b9cd0d57bee8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the company pledged $2.2 million to support Black communities. Chief Diversity Officer DK Bartley stated, "The work of breaking down barriers for underrepresented groups in the workplace, in finance, and in society starts with advancing Black culture."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c14ccca5-1a9f-48a5-ab4f-4271bd21a175?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## **ESG Ratings Framework Linked to Political Risk Factors**
Moody's also integrates ESG [factors](https://substack.com/redirect/c53d1f6f-746e-45d9-bc38-e087ad89661c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) into its credit rating methodologies. As stated on its website, the firm provides "an overview of exposure to environmental, social and governance considerations--and their impact on ratings--for sectors on a regional and global scale." A June 2024 post on X warned, "Climate change will exacerbate water scarcity and hazards worldwide, causing social turmoil and harming activities such as agriculture, manufacturing and tourism," The post included a [link](https://substack.com/redirect/fef7748d-db47-409c-9f6f-4b532371b0f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to an accompanying infographic on the topic.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6dbe8c0a-29f2-4e9b-ac37-8a7dd5122199?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/19f5b4f4-8fdb-47aa-8c49-0b54b3eb9ccd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## **Trump 's Push Against DEI and ESG Sparks Backlash from Moody's**
The Trump administration has taken an aggressive stance against DEI and ESG frameworks, denouncing them as discriminatory and economically distortive. Executive actions have targeted corporate DEI [programs](https://substack.com/redirect/6f79a163-162d-429c-816d-7917e9f79b57?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), while proposed policies seek to [limit](https://substack.com/redirect/af463721-9893-4a8e-8923-a7724f452973?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ESG-based investing. In this context, Moody's outspoken support for DEI and ESG raises legitimate questions about whether political bias may have influenced its decision to downgrade the U.S. credit rating--a move that directly undermines the Trump administration's economic agenda.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..cRgUOW_ZNjdLxFOzCapvPDw7amAbqDh5OjopztUGBRY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=164362629)

Two days earlier, Variety that Fauber had signed a letter urging Congress to certify Joe Biden's electoral victory. | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- Moody 's Promotes DEI as Core to Its Corporate Credit Strategy Moody's has consistently advanced DEI as a pillar of its corporate sustainability strategy. In a March 2024 on X, the company stated, "Increasing gender diversity in labor markets and on boards may improve governance and credit quality." The post to a broader discussion on how such trends impact the global economy and businesses performance. | | ---|---|--- Moody 's Used DEI Messaging to Shape Post-Pandemic Policy In June 2021, Moody's highlighted its DEI commitments in a stating, "How will diversity, equity and inclusion strengthen corporate sustainability and help businesses recover from the pandemic?" The post referenced Moody's executive Marina Albo's participation in a roundtable hosted by EY and the Spanish newspaper Expansi on, and to the publication's coverage. | | ---|---|--- LOOMER UNLEASHED is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. LGBTQ+ Initiatives Highlight Moody 's Internal DEI Focus In September 2021, Moody's further promoted its DEI initiatives with a stating, "Do you wonder what it's like to be LGBTQ+ at Moody's? Join us to hear from EMEA employees about our inclusive culture and their experiences." The post included hashtags such as #LGBTQIA, #diversity, and #inclusion--along with a to the company-hosted discussion. | | ---|---|--- Financial Support Tied to Social Justice It is also worth noting that Moody's issued a DEI report in 2020, outlining its corporate commitment to social equity initiatives. According to Sustainability, the company pledged $2.2 million to support Black communities. Chief Diversity Officer DK Bartley stated, "The work of breaking down barriers for underrepresented groups in the workplace, in finance, and in society starts with advancing Black culture." | | ---|---|--- ESG Ratings Framework Linked to Political Risk Factors Moody's also integrates ESG into its credit rating methodologies. As stated on its website, the firm provides "an overview of exposure to environmental, social and governance considerations--and their impact on ratings--for sectors on a regional and global scale." A June 2024 post on X warned, "Climate change will exacerbate water scarcity and hazards worldwide, causing social turmoil and harming activities such as agriculture, manufacturing and tourism," The post included a to an accompanying infographic on the topic. | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- Trump 's Push Against DEI and ESG Sparks Backlash from Moody's The Trump administration has taken an aggressive stance against DEI and ESG frameworks, denouncing them as discriminatory and economically distortive. Executive actions have targeted corporate DEI , while proposed policies seek to ESG-based investing. In this context, Moody's outspoken support for DEI and ESG raises legitimate questions about whether political bias may have influenced its decision to downgrade the U.S. credit rating--a move that directly undermines the Trump administration's economic agenda. Peter, We’re now just two weeks out from Georgia’s upcoming election — and while it might not be grabbing national headlines, **the impact on everyday life here in the Peach State could be significant**. On the ballot is a Special Primary Election for Georgia’s Public Service Commission. If you’re not familiar, this Commission plays a **BIG ROLE** in setting utility rates across the state — meaning the outcome of this race could directly affect how much Georgians pay for electricity and other essential services. Right now, Georgia Republicans in Washington — including Buddy Carter — are moving forward with proposals that would cut core programs like Medicaid, Medicare, and Social Security. At the same time, Trump’s tariffs have led to rising prices for everyday goods, adding pressure to already tight household budgets. With household costs rising, **this election is an important opportunity for Georgians to weigh in on who’s making decisions that impact their monthly bills**. [We need to reach out to as many voters as possible in these final 2 weeks. Will you make a contribution of $15, $25 or any amount you can give to help us fund outreach and engagement to make sure voters know what’s at stake and how to participate these last two weeks. »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108924636/549446450/1596490833?amount=15&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_060325_2WEEKS_2x30DO-60DC-60DD_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGQ5MTI2MS1jYjQwLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E_HvOZmZKoY3CfE5CIKDVZrKc3TqWphHIukNWzKjjrM=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter, We’re now just two weeks out from Georgia’s upcoming election — and while it might not be grabbing national headlines, the impact on everyday life here in the Peach State could be significant. On the ballot is a Special Primary Election for Georgia’s Public Service Commission. If you’re not familiar, this Commission plays a BIG ROLE in setting utility rates across the state — meaning the outcome of this race could directly affect how much Georgians pay for electricity and other essential services. Right now, Georgia Republicans in Washington — including Buddy Carter — are moving forward with proposals that would cut core programs like Medicaid, Medicare, and Social Security. At the same time, Trump’s tariffs have led to rising prices for everyday goods, adding pressure to already tight household budgets. | Peter, this could transform the race for Governor:

In audio obtained by The Guardian, Winsome Earle-Sears said _"[women] need to make our choices before we're pregnant—not, you know, after. You already made a choice!"_

As horrifying as that sounds, it doesn't even scratch the surface when it comes to her extremism on women's rights.

Sears previously called abortion "genocide." Before that, she endorsed a Texas bill that banned abortion after six weeks of pregnancy with zero exceptions for victims of rape or incest.

Let's be clear: _Winsome Earle-Sears is dangerously out of touch._

But polls give her a path to victory and we're running behind her campaign on ad spending.

[_**Abigail can't protect our reproductive freedoms unless she wins decisively this November. name: Katie Porter
subject: This is what showing up looks like
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39777%2E3422442%2EUtHmDO)
Hello from Orange County, Derek!
This weekend, California Democrats had our convention right here in Orange County. There was no better place for it, because we know how to beat Trump and win hard races here—experience that I’m proud to bring to my campaign for governor.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250603_1_ak?refcode=em20250603-39777&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39777_3422442_UtHmDO&akid=39777%2E3422442%2EUtHmDO)
I was particularly excited to catch up with people who volunteered for my past campaigns. I couldn’t have won any of my tough Congressional races without them, and it’s that same energy that’s going to power this campaign and down-ballot Democrats to victory in 2026.
It’s clear from the recent election that Democrats have real work to do to earn back the trust of the American people. To do that, we have to show up in communities, hear the voices of people on the ground, and come together as activists and leaders to chart a path forward.
I was heartened to hear that people are resonating with my focus on economic issues and my experience messaging on them:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250603_1_ak?refcode=em20250603-39777&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39777_3422442_UtHmDO&akid=39777%2E3422442%2EUtHmDO)
**[Democrats’ road to victory is for us to show up and keep showing up. Can you chip in $5 today, so we have the resources to get me campaigning in every part and pocket of California?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250603_1_ak?refcode=em20250603-39777&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39777_3422442_UtHmDO&akid=39777%2E3422442%2EUtHmDO)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250603_1_ak?refcode=em20250603-39777&refcode2=39777_3422442_UtHmDO&akid=39777%2E3422442%2EUtHmDO)
Thanks,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250603-39777&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39777_3422442_UtHmDO&akid=39777%2E3422442%2EUtHmDO)**

name: Jasmine Crockett
subject: MTG: Play stupid games, win stupid prizes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio House Democratic Campaign Committee, 545 E Town St
body:
|
---
I have to laugh, y’all. Marjorie Taylor Greene has spent her entire career sucking up to Donald Trump and destroying all her credibility in an endless quest to win his favor. **But even that wasn’t enough to win her his support for her doomed Senate campaign:** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108924946/549447429/273633830?refcode=250603_Jasmine_Games&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTI3ZmRiMS1jYzQwLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=biga0cw1n2lYbbfCxGRe_N6s4cFVaf3LTiqV5mr_s98=)** As I say: **Play stupid games, win stupid prizes._And Marge has been playing stupid games her entire career._** Before she came to Congress, she peddled conspiracy theories through deranged Facebook videos and QAnon chat rooms. name: Lee Johnson
subject: Let’s Fire Lindsey Graham
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108924903/549447346/2109746102?refcode=250603_MFC_Johnson_FireLindseyGraham&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGYzOTYyMy1jYzQwLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s8jSBeZzrQlIM-hVPcY4PmWa011JfWkM9U5HUY4RFLw=) When people tell you who they are, believe them. For years Lindsey Graham has:
* Flip flopped on major issues impacting South Carolinians
* Done anything it takes to stay close to power
* Turned his back on South Carolina.

For over two decades, we’ve watched as Lindsey climbed the ranks in Washington. Lindsey has been focused on his career, not his constituents. It’s time that we do something about it. We know Washington is broken. But I believe America is still a land of opportunity and our best days are still ahead of us. We can build a better future through innovation — but that takes new leaders. In this campaign, I have pledged to not take any corporate PAC money because lawmakers should listen to their constituents, not special interests.. That’s also why I’ve pledged to serve no more than two terms as a Senator - to make sure that leadership in Washington stays fresh and accountable. South Carolina deserves a Senator who will follow through on their promises. [**Chip in whatever you can, split with Seth Moulton, and help us build that coalition of South Carolinians that believe in unity and civility.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108924916/549447357/2036686014?refcode=250603_MFC_Johnson_FireLindseyGraham&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGYzOTYyMy1jYzQwLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s8jSBeZzrQlIM-hVPcY4PmWa011JfWkM9U5HUY4RFLw=) Together we can help turn this ship around, send Lindsey Graham packing, and take a step towards building a better South Carolina together. Thanks,
Lee Johnson
Candidate for U.S. Senate

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: I want to be transparent about where we’re at.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Since this is a grassroots campaign, I want to be transparent with you. Our fundraising hit an unexpected dip these last few days—it happens sometimes and I don’t want to alarm you. But, I want to take a moment to share why this is important.
Unlike most other House campaigns, we operate differently. We invest in community organizing year-round and full-time permanent staff who execute all aspects of this campaign.
The Trump trifecta has taken hold, and so too have their billionaire, right-wing donors.
In order to fight back through mass movement politics, we need the resources to bring even more people into this campaign and continue to sustain our operation even in the “off year.”
I don’t curry favor with billionaires or attend fancy cocktail fundraisers. This campaign is made possible by people like you, firstname. [If you can afford it, can I count on your support today?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250603.97cj2p&refcode=em20250603-9001-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9001%2E2526796%2EePXf5i)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250603.97cj2p&refcode=em20250603-9001-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=9001%2E2526796%2EePXf5i)**
Just a few years ago, I was a waitress wiping down a bar. I am vividly familiar with the value of a hard earned dollar. I also don’t expect that every supporter will contribute to every email we send—that would be way too much!
When thousands of people come together to chip in, it all adds up and allows me to focus on legislating, and not worry about checking in with my campaign manager about our fundraising numbers.
**If you are in a position to do so, here’s a personalized link where you can pitch in:**
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250603?personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250603.97cj2p&refcode=em20250603-9001-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=9001%2E2526796%2EePXf5i)
Whether you can donate today or not, thank you so much for being a part of this campaign. On behalf of my entire team: we’re so grateful that you’re here.
Pa’lante,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250603?refcode=em20250603-9001-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&refcode2=9001_2526796_ePXf5i&akid=9001%2E2526796%2EePXf5i)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250603-9001-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=23&akid=9001%2E2526796%2EePXf5i)**

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: Thank you.
body:
|
#
Hi there, I wanted to take a moment to **thank you. ** Because of your support, we hit our May fundraising goal – laying the groundwork for a strong finish to the second FEC quarter at the end of this month. And that foundation mattered – because we faced a relentless wave of Republican attacks throughout the month. In fact, we’ve tallied GOP spending against us at nearly a __half a million dollars.__ Don’t get me wrong, folks: that’s a lot, but we’re not intimidated. Every dollar special interests spend attacking us only reinforces why this race matters – and why we need to keep pushing forward. **Because while they flooded the airwaves, we stayed focused on what really matters: delivering for Mid-Michigan families. ** We showed up, we spoke out, and kept working hard – just like we always do. That’s the heart of this campaign, and it’s what your support makes possible. Thanks again for being part of this team. \- Kristen **P.S.[If you didn’t get a chance to pitch in toward our May goal, a small donation of $3 would go a long way in keeping our momentum headed into June.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108925378/549448905/846650059?refcode=em-6.3.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDI1OTg4My1jZTQwLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JwvVWQIejvbXUDrOesWK_-Kw3Xm_-ueBVpExkaYj_bU=)** | [Donate ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108925380/549448906/846650059?refcode=em-6.3.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDI1OTg4My1jZTQwLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JwvVWQIejvbXUDrOesWK_-Kw3Xm_-ueBVpExkaYj_bU=)

name: Fair Fight
subject: A Democratic Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
Five Southern states that could pave the path to a new U.S. Senate majority. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108925761/549450551/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250603_ff_SenateMajority_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTM0MjcyNy1jZjQwLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hIu6H2-PHaAjN3nprjXQ_TAmSFRhYoB9gyrNozzpfs0=&emci=b5342727-cf40-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=be342727-cf40-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1037277)

| | “Brutal.” “Tough.” “Difficult.” “Challenging.” “Daunting.” Those are some of the words people have used to describe the 2026 U.S. Senate map for Democrats. But even if you only look at one region of the country, there’s a path for Democrats to retake control of the chamber. We’re talking about the South — where potential blockbuster races are flying under the radar. You know the stakes in **Georgia** , where voting rights champion Senator Jon Ossoff is up for re-election next year. Punchbowl News calls him “the most endangered Senate Democratic incumbent.” We’re ready to fight by his side again, just like we helped power him to victory in 2020 and 2021. And of course **North Carolina** will also be a major battleground — a chance to go on offense and flip a Republican-held seat. The GOP only won the 2020 and 2022 North Carolina Senate races by just under two points and just over three points. And last year, Democrats won the races for governor, lieutenant governor, attorney general, and state Supreme Court. But — hear us out — you shouldn’t sleep on the Senate races in **Mississippi** and **Louisiana**. And there’s very good reason to believe that **Texas** can also be competitive. Keep reading to learn more. **Four chances to go on offense. One pivotal place to play defense. All in the South. And they can all add up to a Democratic Senate.** [**We don’t duck the tough fights — we jump in headfirst. We’ll keep tackling voter suppression in the South and around the country so the American people have a fair chance to make their voices heard in 2026 and beyond. And your support helps make this work possible. Chip in $30 now if you can.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108925764/549450554/1069921273?amount=30&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250603_ff_SenateMajority_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTM0MjcyNy1jZjQwLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hIu6H2-PHaAjN3nprjXQ_TAmSFRhYoB9gyrNozzpfs0=) _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ | [Chip in $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108925765/549450556/1069921273?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250603_ff_SenateMajority_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTM0MjcyNy1jZjQwLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hIu6H2-PHaAjN3nprjXQ_TAmSFRhYoB9gyrNozzpfs0=) | [Chip in $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108925768/549450558/1069921273?amount=25&express_lane=true&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250603_ff_SenateMajority_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTM0MjcyNy1jZjQwLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hIu6H2-PHaAjN3nprjXQ_TAmSFRhYoB9gyrNozzpfs0=)

---|---
Let’s review some recent history.
In 2023, Republicans only won the Mississippi governor’s race by a margin of 50.9% to 47.7%. The election came down to just under 30,000 votes — less than half the capacity at the Ole Miss football stadium.
In Louisiana, a Democrat got elected governor in 2015 _and re-elected_ in 2019. Not to mention: earlier this year, commanding majorities of Louisiana voters _rejected_ the power-grabbing constitutional amendments that Republicans pushed at the ballot box, with Black voters leading the way at a higher turnout rate than their white counterparts.
And get this: in Texas, a recent 2026 Senate poll showed a potential Democratic nominee edging out the Republican who was leading in the primary polling.
**Look: races don’t just _become_ winnable. You _make_ them winnable. **And even if you fall short, you lay the groundwork for future victories in the years to come.
But it starts with making sure the GOP can’t nab victories through voter suppression.
**In Georgia, North Carolina, Mississippi, Louisiana, Texas, and all around America, Republicans have continued trying to silence people’s voices — especially people of color, young voters, and rural communities — by placing barriers in front of the ballot box.**
[**With dedicated support from activists like you, the Fair Fight team will continue combating GOP voter suppression — so Americans get a fair shake at holding MAGA Republicans accountable at the ballot box. Chip in now to power this work.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108925786/549450576/1069921273?amount=30&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250603_ff_SenateMajority_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTM0MjcyNy1jZjQwLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hIu6H2-PHaAjN3nprjXQ_TAmSFRhYoB9gyrNozzpfs0=)

clean_body: Five Southern states that could pave the path to a new U.S. Senate majority. | | | “Brutal.” “Tough.” “Difficult.” “Challenging.” “Daunting.” Those are some of the words people have used to describe the 2026 U.S. Senate map for Democrats. But even if you only look at one region of the country, there’s a path for Democrats to retake control of the chamber. We’re talking about the South — where potential blockbuster races are flying under the radar. You know the stakes in Georgia , where voting rights champion Senator Jon Ossoff is up for re-election next year. Punchbowl News calls him “the most endangered Senate Democratic incumbent.” We’re ready to fight by his side again, just like we helped power him to victory in 2020 and 2021. And of course North Carolina will also be a major battleground — a chance to go on offense and flip a Republican-held seat. The GOP only won the 2020 and 2022 North Carolina Senate races by just under two points and just over three points. And last year, Democrats won the races for governor, lieutenant governor, attorney general, and state Supreme Court. But — hear us out — you shouldn’t sleep on the Senate races in Mississippi and Louisiana. And there’s very good reason to believe that Texas can also be competitive. Keep reading to learn more. Four chances to go on offense. One pivotal place to play defense. All in the South. And they can all add up to a Democratic Senate. = If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Let’s review some recent history. In 2023, Republicans only won the Mississippi governor’s race by a margin of 50.9% to 47.7%. The election came down to just under 30,000 votes — less than half the capacity at the Ole Miss football stadium. In Louisiana, a Democrat got elected governor in 2015 and re-elected in 2019. Not to mention: earlier this year, commanding majorities of Louisiana voters rejected the power-grabbing constitutional amendments that Republicans pushed at the ballot box, with Black voters leading the way at a higher turnout rate than their white counterparts. And get this: in Texas, a recent 2026 Senate poll showed a potential Democratic nominee edging out the Republican who was leading in the primary polling. Look: races don’t just become winnable. You make them winnable. And even if you fall short, you lay the groundwork for future victories in the years to come. But it starts with making sure the GOP can’t nab victories through voter suppression. | Peter,

Thanks to you, grassroots donors across the country, we were able to leverage our match.

Together, you helped us unlock matched donations to train and support Democratic women ready to lead. That means double the investment in future candidates, future mayors, future state reps, and future fighters for our rights.

This match campaign came at a critical moment. With Trump back in the White House and basic freedoms under attack, you stepped up. You didn’t wait. You acted.

From all of us at Emerge: **thank you.** We’re proud to have you as part of this movement.

— Team Emerge

subject: We can regain the greatness we lost.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
| [](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=5276112076f64659a621184973b33abd&_e=gqUT_XX30zQJz7OWrIDM5bv35ifB0KpnMb462iX-PFJOat7J-0lVPIvjHhGP_Q9MlkIolIwFcIHGsO9tgbACmHwxlq20lu4pBG0LL-ZzCLlL4cyiwTvzMNE8GwR2deiyUddbJN0LD_MV5WpquoR8vjaj4Xq-I4qLImnGBHOvj2zlbifsl72dUwOmeZ9R1keX8mO4uzExj88Iqsa-j9z0m97AEYb6mTQ6qPiP_px2MIvHkfhyGCIw2ZpbGKRkk4vkpQ__pRecAXxL8AfZmj-VuMaMLcGIMYU50ihxLLu6Gw613oVDUv6NiBGmikFCoJVloibpBnwJ6xo884-SVVSZYy3fNR1FS-BySV31EAHvXxU%3D)

Friend,

I'll keep this message short - in fact, you can read it in less than 10 seconds.

I served in Afghanistan; I know that bad leadership can get people killed.

Pete Hegseth is starting to review what went wrong and what haphazard decisions cost the lives of 13 Americans during our withdrawal from Afghanistan.

The left won't make it easy, but under Pete Hegseth and President Trump's leadership, we have a chance to regain the strength and resolve we lost.

I'm ready to do my part once again and help restore this country to greatness. My only question for you is, are you ready to stand by my side? | [**YES**](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=5276112076f64659a621184973b33abd&_e=gqUT_XX30zQJz7OWrIDM5bv35ifB0KpnMb462iX-PFJOat7J-0lVPIvjHhGP_Q9MlkIolIwFcIHGsO9tgbACmHwxlq20lu4pBG0LL-ZzCLlL4cyiwTvzMNE8GwR2deiyUddbJN0LD_MV5WpquoR8vp2eRPWhz8iLUiZHOd6SZoHzG9m8z3C1gYed_0rcPUJLFtHrlSrLG_rdqCPJAzjF8Sx7xZdp031GKmEJeEQwiAmIudE8zMdG8SJq7ykGbcVLoSOWHMpQ3qrz8A6R1WiySHlWw71HHdQsODGXKOIIAsTIoLbpqLiWe3j3YYtXnVZY4vP9vjZ7bjeG3F1U4iCvZw%3D%3D)
---

Thank you,

Pat Harrigan

name: Erika Donalds
subject: The Byron I know
body:
He told me America needs President Trump
| | | | |
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3e152e8f5258463ea6bb7d27b06dcce2&_e=GfAgCdec1Us5eqavtV3tmAbeh0zeHFzSuzGfPCGpRiwHOOK3pFtYsvAq3O2cSIoO9onEd4tCOexW-KtYL8Dza8otBoBjInE5bIIwXqOQkRHNf1YiJhhEYHM_YfRCkSAnSrm9Torwi1Ilfn5VLSBBrYKX9yKUaNknIrBnZgDLarkZ0V-1Ihy2IOAr7BgxxOiDX14AG81Hs7rRWu9BARl6kZvmGP7Q_l5Dg9LouPtp4gbMOu2PsIKlrYMJlkPmLoDI51nzg9OIBkLuJ08pgjuv3KmxkuvdEtK5P3qN3lvMpVMPXwiUf9sFoMiC1nUJsuw1tLuMm_pL5hwmTGbntVBg6cHyRncRcFyt3tziWrKSAdREVEE05aLQD5iabgTDyRj65fKyzIc9mRFYTkP-Pj5pqg%3D%3D)
|
---
I’m here to tell you the truth about the Byron I know.
My name is _Erika Donalds_ , I’m the proud mother of three beautiful sons, and I can no longer stay silent.
I was _**scared**_ for my children during the previous administration.
Democrats opened our borders and welcomed criminals into our lives.
Then they tore apart our safety and defunded the police.
And worst of all, they _**targeted**_ our children by forcing radical woke agendas into schools.
I’ll _never forget_ what my husband, Byron Donalds, told me when I was the most scared I’ve ever been under Biden.
**“Erika, we need President Trump in the White House, and I will not let him lose”.**
I knew when he looked me in the eyes and gave me his word that America would be back on track, and by the blessings of God, **MAGA** emerged victorious.
Now he’s _**[running for Governor of Florida](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3e152e8f5258463ea6bb7d27b06dcce2&_e=GfAgCdec1Us5eqavtV3tmAbeh0zeHFzSuzGfPCGpRiwHOOK3pFtYsvAq3O2cSIoO9onEd4tCOexW-KtYL8Dza8otBoBjInE5bIIwXqOQkRHNf1YiJhhEYHM_YfRCkSAnSrm9Torwi1Ilfn5VLSBBrYKX9yKUaNknIrBnZgDLarkZ0V-1Ihy2IOAr7BgxxOiDX14AG81Hs7rRWu9BARl6kZvmGP7Q_l5Dg9LouPtp4gbMOu2PsIKlrYMJlkPmLoDISIlkrtQGvxsiJmQmzyQ3vreUUCqLTZrZOuM6bj7gF2T3vgRA4bvMCe7SAkADea-NwSMnJ47-fxqMzt-jrx15dSSV6KkzMsx1DokL-l5bdKMrN_u9r-Ocxg9Y4f1xwW3fqLiEd-RcCOSpjiRCribTYg%3D%3D)**_ to bring the America First agenda home and keep our great state red, but the backlash from the radical-left has been overwhelming.
They saw everything he did to help President Trump, and they won’t admit it, but they’re terrified of the _**true Patriot**_ that Byron is.
But I know Byron - President Trump tasked him with keeping Florida MAGA Country, and that’s what he intends to do.
So it’s with a humble heart and the grace of God that I ask you to _**[join me today](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3e152e8f5258463ea6bb7d27b06dcce2&_e=GfAgCdec1Us5eqavtV3tmAbeh0zeHFzSuzGfPCGpRiwHOOK3pFtYsvAq3O2cSIoO9onEd4tCOexW-KtYL8Dza8otBoBjInE5bIIwXqOQkRHNf1YiJhhEYHM_YfRCkSAnSrm9Torwi1Ilfn5VLSBBrYKX9yKUaNknIrBnZgDLarkZ0V-1Ihy2IOAr7BgxxOiDX14AG81Hs7rRWu9BARl6kZvmGP7Q_l5Dg9LouPtp4gbMOu2PsIKlrYMJlkPmLoDIYxMktgeMCCO_sCpKgChSD0bN5200wmLVS7r-57S4Gzz1gRJk6bZc8yaj3Lax4M4t5Ozpg4lWHTTqxgyAkado3_edkFs5967C1b4uYXkfhPUeyPbD980Ckc9DIgwdad8xeaMIslV9zxa64bwCWdhX0Q%3D%3D)**_ and support his race by chipping in whatever you can below:

---
Peter,
---
All of my life, those closest to me – and even those who only knew me from politics – have known me to be a _helper_.
---
I helped take down the mob in New York...
---
I helped unify our city and our country as America’s mayor after tragedy struck on September 11th...
---
I helped keep our streets and our citizens safe...
---
And I helped successfully defend President Trump from one of the Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable.
---
Those were the headlines that defined me to so many Americans like _YOU_.
---
But over the last year, I’ve instead woken up in the mornings to headlines like these:
---

**_“Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...”_**
_[MSNBC]_

**_“Giuliani bankruptcy case dismissed, opening door to creditors pursuing collection”_**
_[CNBC]_

**_“Giuliani Disbarred from the Practice of Law in New York” _**
_[New York Times]_

---
**And sadly, as I stare down the Democrats’ _FINAL_ sham indictment against me, I am now the one forced to ask _you_ to help _me_. **
---
That’s truly something I NEVER wanted to have to say, Peter...
---
_Asking for help as opposed to offering it unsettles me to my core._
---
But I hope you understand that you truly are my FINAL HOPE.
---
_**Right now in Arizona, the Democrat Attorney General is seeking to use a _state-level_ charge that President Trump cannot pardon in order to throw me in prison until I’m 100 years old!** _
---
My crime? Refusing to forsake the TRUTH and standing by the side of my dear friend and our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump.
---
_And the punishment the Left wants in return? My personal, professional, and financial ruin along with me taking my last breath in a prison cell!_
---
Make no mistake, if we can’t beat this sham case here and now, if we fail to secure true justice and my ultimate vindication, then this scheme of the Left’s can be used against every last red-blooded patriot as the Deep State’s bulletproof measure to TAKE DOWN their political enemies.
---
And the _ONLY_ way to defeat a regime like the Deep State is to **NEVER,_EVER_ SURRENDER** to it.
---
_...Just ask President Trump!_
---
The Democrats unjustly filed my MUGSHOT under **booking # 2313757.**
---
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/2gGm7Ka_CriOrgtW2SYxSu0wjX-eLEczj5IxcHgwWCHdi3gwqH1vN_EsBIZ-8pXxQsR78yjh-mYsiHRY8DoDeORmbyUSCzTcyJ9cxwFUHJbcPymp4l3giCQiLOfj-Kj5mzax5UK0SxN41e6ssvICNjAk_vhP0DJVwbAam2C5-GPcIziseXLspw2RifA3MvahtMYt9Boj-c3NAOmx_jdlTtW_Umvbv1LWEQZ8OtNfHsTXOXTM4_OVeXT7vvF6WJMa8h8LSW3tt_Pmli4leORtR2z8yOMb5dxJEQKeJrr5_Ct8BDr7zbZa8j6Fzxrw15Ky2UXhk2ya2RYDn9j4xhW-Eab8n3eK-SKyIWMzp0kum7O9PtJy17M12YNQUXy-8_skXtMumQrCAa7yMSyMWMvT57KYiEoKsHD-jaRwA2FUj58PGQqDTWfO9hOX5LFdnOk9ZVwvMrlIlXpukYN1mARiwXcFU3qhFKcp0NPrnuN2q4pU9fccPlYrVVJd3kVYLw/3tQvxB9ycQNUon2w-LWpjiyC2NRYhpEH/9)
__
---
_So, to show these left-wing crooks that good and honest Americans like _YOU_ will also never surrender as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise **$231,375.70** for my Legal Defense Trust to win this last fight for my freedom and justice. _

clean_body: ........................ | Peter, All of my life, those closest to me – and even those who only knew me from politics – have known me to be a helper. I helped take down the mob in New York... I helped unify our city and our country as America’s mayor after tragedy struck on September 11th... I helped keep our streets and our citizens safe... And I helped successfully defend President Trump from one of the Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable. Those were the headlines that defined me to so many Americans like YOU. But over the last year, I’ve instead woken up in the mornings to headlines like these: “Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...” [MSNBC] “Giuliani bankruptcy case dismissed, opening door to creditors pursuing collection” [CNBC] “Giuliani Disbarred from the Practice of Law in New York” [New York Times] And sadly, as I stare down the Democrats’ FINAL sham indictment against me, I am now the one forced to ask you to help me. That’s truly something I NEVER wanted to have to say, Peter... Asking for help as opposed to offering it unsettles me to my core. But I hope you understand that you truly are my FINAL HOPE. Right now in Arizona, the Democrat Attorney General is seeking to use a state-level charge that President Trump cannot pardon in order to throw me in prison until I’m 100 years old! My crime? Refusing to forsake the TRUTH and standing by the side of my dear friend and our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump. And the punishment the Left wants in return? My personal, professional, and financial ruin along with me taking my last breath in a prison cell! Make no mistake, if we can’t beat this sham case here and now, if we fail to secure true justice and my ultimate vindication, then this scheme of the Left’s can be used against every last red-blooded patriot as the Deep State’s bulletproof measure to TAKE DOWN their political enemies. And the ONLY way to defeat a regime like the Deep State is to NEVER,EVER SURRENDER to it. ...Just ask President Trump! The Democrats unjustly filed my MUGSHOT under booking # 2313757. So, to show these left-wing crooks that good and honest Americans like YOU will also never surrender as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise $231,375.70 for my Legal Defense Trust to win this last fight for my freedom and justice. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust |

name: =?iso-8859-13?q?Ken=FFTravius?= Coleman, United for Democracy
subject: Tell Paramount: Stand up for freedom of the press
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
“In the United States of America, presidents do not get to punish or censor the media for criticizing them.” | |
---
Peter, The First Amendment and its guarantee of freedom of the press is the bedrock of American democracy. **But Trump is testing the waters for an assault on these freedoms with his lawsuit against CBS.** Last year, then-candidate Trump sued CBS over a “60 Minutes” interview with Vice President Kamala Harris he didn’t like, stirring up a slander campaign in an attempt to silence and intimidate the press. The lawsuit should be an easy win for CBS under the First Amendment. But after filing two motions to overturn the case, CBS’ parent company Paramount is now considering settling. **Settling with Trump instead of fighting for freedom of the press would be a sinister capitulation to his authoritarian attacks on our basic rights—and it would embolden him to wage an extortion campaign against those who dare to publish truthful negative reporting on him.** Now, Senator Bernie Sanders is leading a letter with nine other Democratic senators urging Paramount and its controlling shareholder Shari Redstone not to back down to Trump and give up freedom of the press without a fight. [**Join Senator Sanders and send a letter to Paramount’s Shari Redstone today. Tell her not to give Trump a victory in his attacks on our First Amendment rights.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_HLQpgr9njXNQRWqI7iti8VD5H93HBN7LJpNj5Bbr3XZHdR9DP2EuzyIk7HpvaVrOW9Z4EeIqBWAysNY6Rv_gzEopRtYyfEIAwkL3LGNJAdpAXRJIabZUFVGDTXe_cAjqeAOGIPhmUUM48AG1-c1rEvicfPWybLkyJZj4oOlWJx-Y640307gnyPIdtib0iwb5oRby4MoDSu3fIe1fg48YPOzpzlo3c4D-39qYygbvfGoCdX1mfyFkOMXsTI1TRRQFxcA3s_jLTKWfENsXBP-4wTiXLyrngjCCTXjZCYVqWz2wciGbFZ2Uecxyqi4nTmdw8JEOEPBQLEv0YAacWoXpPmS1UM99zrJuO3pp4kqkLgo2v-wg5qDSJjEGbbYSd3pEKg4-K6Df5cq4Rg16kAvPlmh06Dg8vZDjM7eQCUfEZelEz9lqK0b7iZBdizNzMfEmbKWUv5szZpsLSVShtckQAZecPEsKyIX19C3pnao6BRni4kbS8lMWR1SSK24b_mMJ9AlbsrfpAYklujx-b84Vt/4h1/vbWCCGAkTu-2csGxo-Dcgw/h0/h001.V7WN1xrXBsfJkHCVxLkSTeTDmtthQ5UR2U2JSbAzzyc) [SIGN & SEND](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_HLQpgr9njXNQRWqI7iti8VD5H93HBN7LJpNj5Bbr3XZHdR9DP2EuzyIk7HpvaVrOW9Z4EeIqBWAysNY6Rv_gzEopRtYyfEIAwkL3LGNJAdpAXRJIabZUFVGDTXe_cAjqeAOGIPhmUUM48AG1-c1rEvicfPWybLkyJZj4oOlWJx-Y640307gnyPIdtib0iwb5oRby4MoDSu3fIe1fg48YPOzpzlo3c4D-39qYygbvfGoCdX1mfyFkOMXsTI1TRRQFxcA3s_jLTKWfENsXBP-4w-dAjdgXtWQ_4T-o0kIF7vyPjC1IBDTgkk1AuFI_YeFgZ42tSoPo5WnaIQBO1rdGTqeV6ggcX465U_BUnF9b08Ew4jkZgxa1VHcaVQ6U7HsWHfhZByHuxXkvdDlCKu9CRVV7wpoGhwNQXWrtkI7YYtp1NYSqMwaxe2fTwvZc-bTH_fittH_XFjumoCqAeIJSgRymW4ATxrGzQ0r13_IXqaETs3mR-uDJhjSVd9O9S6vMLpej5tWn3FfyEMYq67gcp/4h1/vbWCCGAkTu-2csGxo-Dcgw/h1/h001.qdw3bFIw_ToEgCVqXqO0MgFIfIUAkC_odzwT4Y690us) The senators’ letter made the stakes of this case extremely clear:
> _“This lawsuit is an attack on the United States Constitution and the First Amendment. It has absolutely no merit and it cannot stand. In the United States of America, presidents do not get to punish or censor the media for criticizing them.”_
**They’re exactly right.** This case isn't just about CBS—it’s about our very democracy, and whether we allow Trump to strip us of our First Amendment rights. Experts say Paramount likely wants to settle with Trump so they can get permission for a giant, moneymaking merger. Redstone has already pushed CBS to monitor “60 Minutes” content and delay negative stories about Trump until after the deal is done. **We cannot sit by while a giant media company considers selling our First Amendment rights to a wannabe dictator.** Trump’s attacks on CBS are a brazen attempt to silence opposition—and what happens in this case will either show him that the people will stand up for their rights, or that he can run roughshod over the Constitution with no consequences. [**Join Senator Sanders and his colleagues and tell Paramount chair Shari Redstone: Don’t surrender to Trump’s attacks on the First Amendment. Stand up for freedom of the press.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_HLQpgr9njXNQRWqI7iti8VD5H93HBN7LJpNj5Bbr3XZHdR9DP2EuzyIk7HpvaVrOW9Z4EeIqBWAysNY6Rv_gzEopRtYyfEIAwkL3LGNJAdpAXRJIabZUFVGDTXe_cAjqeAOGIPhmUUM48AG1-c1rEvicfPWybLkyJZj4oOlWJx-Y640307gnyPIdtib0iwb5oRby4MoDSu3fIe1fg48YPOzpzlo3c4D-39qYygbvfGoCdX1mfyFkOMXsTI1TRRQFxcA3s_jLTKWfENsXBP-4w2kyMhk-hsDtWQxfbcKnJ0Vj2_LiqsVcPfVYo_2vlvx5IZ-xBkpghdnSt0f2Is9dhmLlKfv4tk-Uafbat2aZkEj2rda53IVbvV1cmKa1oTZf_WxkEGzy8l2hSl_HGLH0rWwdt9WnI3JaIOycjNxzgNcAI477OTGQH2rtwlpdCm0qdOOw-WWGAqvSaTbrAY19oqNL1HAyXs6VaIY-B1zHTvv7VEGtCuSLlu2JEhK6DmCxE6xd3cMlLLBHSo3fq-Bcs/4h1/vbWCCGAkTu-2csGxo-Dcgw/h2/h001.ZjbK_UVKtIo46fLrk4QxDHjM4_RKArtTuRMf6Silovw) Thank you for fighting for our First Amendment rights, Ken’Travius Coleman
United for Democracy

Friend, I’m back from our traveling BRAVE Books church tour and I have important news for you... We got into three public schools where I read BRAVE Books to nearly 1,400 children -- reaching them with the Christian-inspired messages of... ...bravery, humility, and loving your enemies. Can you believe it? The Holy Spirit is stirring hearts and minds in ways we haven’t seen for some time in our country. And that’s why starting today, BRAVE Books is launching a new initiative to bring our mission into public schools and libraries. [**And we can’t do it without you, Friend!**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j82umzAQhZ_G7EBm7BhYsAglpFJ_dC9po9sVGvyTuBcHYiBR-vQVEcpmFme-M2cOuqGz5pGTpCAAZ6tGAkDYlgBc_9ydn_-6b_twSK7_wqv46TbLFr6s6A1e8EXi6bM4vO8_vmbj6WP7-7u-vt_iFz49Bv2C19BIO7TdoiZloHJmFOWBzuOEp1kGmRDBOU-5ySCJpeIGcSO1RKQyjXnGUhRMmsDmQGFDBWXAIGYsolIleqNQxpK1PIkJp8-cCJ32VmI8Tnf0vu9dJHsXdPl5mobx-VhFoBq1nL2O8KJVPy0Egar1eNNh2_efI4EqM2hQSh5K0ULIqdBhm6o0NIiYIuWtNnq5xap5cs3Yz15qwsqi3If17khALLLTys6OsHL3Y1UkugHt6UJYuTaCpij3TVFvj7umfns7NPXu2Bx-betwGatt0t49LQJoc_dx4HM13G3X2VEkhNPTs_vS9JbD_wAAAP__PtaWIA) Specifically, as we prepare for the 250th birthday of our nation, BRAVE Books aims to counter the Left’s lies about America... ...by getting a minimum of 1,000 “Raising Patriots” book bundles into as many schools and libraries as we can by July 4, 2025. Friend, if you haven’t seen the “Raising Patriots” book bundle, it features five BRAVE Books that teach foundational, conservative values to encourage children to be God-loving, patriotic Americans. _Son of Truth_ \-- Honesty.

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108926283/549452150/-664592562?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmMzZTA0ZS1kMTQwLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9RRE5V4eTay5lDaxFVMivF6jj0vPcBVbjDZh1Xg5HwI=)
Trump, who famously campaigned to “drain the swamp” is refilling it – one pardon at a time: | _**Trump’s clemency spree extends to ex-gangster, rapper, former congressmen**_ _****__**Todd and Julie Chrisley released from prison after pardons from Trump**_ _****__**Trump pardons former New York congressmember and Connecticut governor**_ _****__**Trump is stretching his pardon power – to the delight of his MAGA acolytes**_
---
For all the talk of law and order, it’s clear: if you have a rap sheet and a red hat, Trump’s got a pen ready.
**This isn’t leadership. It’s pay-to-play, swamp-style.**
And here’s the kicker: these same MAGA forces are working state by state to erode our democracy – undermining voting rights, spewing misinformation, and trying to rig elections from the inside.

name: Team Linda
subject: the tariff chaos continues
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sanchez
body:
President Trump’s reckless tariffs were temporarily blocked by a federal court. But just hours later, an appeals court put them back in effect, reigniting the economic chaos they caused in the first place.

| Peter,

President Trump’s reckless tariffs were temporarily blocked by a federal court. But just hours later, an appeals court put them back in effect, **reigniting the economic chaos they caused in the first place.**

The result? Massive **uncertainty** for businesses. **Skyrocketing prices** on everyday goods. Billions in **lost sales.** _And working families are caught in the middle._

Congresswoman Linda Sánchez is leading the fight to stop this abuse of power. As the top Democrat on the Trade Subcommittee, she’s calling out Trump’s lawless overreach — and pushing legislation to rein in his dangerous trade agenda once and for all.

Her bill — the **Stopping a Rogue President on Trade Act** — would block Trump’s global tariffs, end his unilateral trade war, and put Congress back in charge. But Republican leaders are siding with Trump and blocking every attempt to stop him.

Linda is standing firm — but she needs your help. In Georgia, at least two women have died of preventable infections, after hours in agony, because doctors weren't able to perform the abortion procedures that could have saved them. At the same time, the Republican-majority state government disbanded its _entire, 32-person maternal mortality review committee_ — that's the committee that would have investigated cases like these and held the state of Georgia accountable for these deaths.

And in Texas, at least three pregnant women have also died trying desperately to get abortion care that doctors were not able to provide due to state bans. One of those women hemorrhaged to death while having a miscarriage in a hospital bed because her doctors couldn't perform the procedure she needed (which is also used to end pregnancies).

Let me say that again: **Doctors are being prevented from doing their jobs because of abortion bans in their states — and their patients are dying as a result.**

Republicans write and pass abortion bans _knowing_ their policies will kill people. It is our mission and our duty to get these cruel, dangerous extremists out of office.

clean_body: We MUST get anti-choice Republicans out of office | = Content warning: This message mentions death and medical negligence. While stories like this are important in understanding the true impact of abortion bans, if you need to avoid reading details, please take care of yourself. Peter, There is no way to sugarcoat this fact: Abortion bans are killing pregnant people, and the anti-choice Republicans responsible for those bans are doing everything they can to hide that fact from the public. = | = In Georgia, at least two women have died of preventable infections, after hours in agony, because doctors weren't able to perform the abortion procedures that could have saved them. At the same time, the Republican-majority state government disbanded its entire, 32-person maternal mortality review committee — that's the committee that would have investigated cases like these and held the state of Georgia accountable for these deaths. And in Texas, at least three pregnant women have also died trying desperately to get abortion care that doctors were not able to provide due to state bans. One of those women hemorrhaged to death while having a miscarriage in a hospital bed because her doctors couldn't perform the procedure she needed (which is also used to end pregnancies). Let me say that again: Doctors are being prevented from doing their jobs because of abortion bans in their states — and their patients are dying as a result. Republicans write and pass abortion bans knowing their policies will kill people. It is our mission and our duty to get these cruel, dangerous extremists out of office. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for taking a stand, Jessica Mackler (she/her/hers) President, EMILYs List EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. = = Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
